name: Riley Gaines
subject: This evil is widespread
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqhrvqb7kil6e07sjlc6lloahhc9k72e8219308g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chim1o72c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z19v4udkh8i50ctfsfe9v2o58d2d41ohilhl6rao_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chim1o72c9h2bs)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcliasesr4jpo22kmo72bctn3b31sgdbbi2fi3k8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chim1o72c9h2bs)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl89lribrseirgabk48vkle8dmnqnqh3h7418r7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chim1o72c9h2bs) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjimb08cfj1i519p4ohkh8vt47v4s1dvdfpv5m2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chim1o72c9h2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znua55he7umd40st1r9b2klqf7l91k7fke5ua9ig_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chim1o72c9h2bs), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | American Briefing PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: Bah! Humbug!
body:
Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z79c36v1k2qt840d7mr36cr4nnab1vptjvlk309g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chim9pr4cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College released an online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zv1kp320sb9vontgeiqiqmkfpemouuvr2u5us2uo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chim9pr4cph2bs)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

Real American Reporting

subject: The next four years are going to be better than we could have ever imagined

body:

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol" – Our free online course
body:
Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrpi061dr4etlvqgs8jdl7cicm1e6tp2kiocttu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm4ob6cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College released an online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z47icdir2gk5pkhgp32jnr7n6r953fu9spp70oo0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm4ob6cph2bs)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Rep Nancy Mace
subject: SHOCKING: Biden pardons Hunter despite saying he wouldn’t.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Mace
body:
RESPOND NOW:

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4eidgrbeqrjdn14in0eddi76u9cnmdognhkopk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm2oj6c9h2bs)

[ ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdj986gth3tpqu6bquarbapv4d2ubtj6cia1q4sg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm2oj6c9h2bs)
**SHOCKING: Biden pardons Hunter despite saying he wouldn't. **
This is a COMPLETE farce.
Remember when Biden repeatedly swore to the American people that he would NEVER pardon his son?
Nancy Mace here.

[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf4ibirg4b4momgcgbs7kibqd05889buo4d8v948_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm2oj6c9h2bs)
_**Honestly, I 'm not even shocked - Biden's memory is as unreliable as his word.**_
**We all know exactly what 's going on here:** Biden's cronies are once again exploiting the system, bending the law to their will.
The same Democrats who relentlessly warned us about **Trump "abusing his power"** now have **NO issue** doing the exact same thing, if it benefits them.
This pardon is a clear demonstration of the Left's corrupt and deceitful agenda, one that they will NEVER stop trying to force on the American people.
Even worse, Biden tried to justify Hunter's charges as a "miscarriage of justice," claiming they were politically motivated.
**But let 's not forget how the Left mercilessly HUNTED Trump during his campaign with a political WITCH HUNT of their own!**
It's painfully obvious that the phrase "no one is above the law" only applies if you're not on the Left's side.
**_Imagine if Trump had been the one to pardon his son... the outrage would have been deafening._**
**[So, tell me - do you believe Biden should be pardoning Hunter?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgkkokssvsqd7dreib19inof4b2cu99dqanrc6cg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm2oj6c9h2bs)**
Your response is critical!
We need to show Biden that the American people WILL NOT stand for this betrayal!
Let your voice be heard NOW!
[RESPOND NOW >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z91tt7f8sgdts8c7fc77kj7h3gbdn0cau9afmmog_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm2oj6c9h2bs)

name: Eric Burlison
subject: Mark my words... these people will destroy this country
body:
I often wondered why politicians were powerless to secure our borders

|
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs22a9o9uhrso8v7nnvi2gm46oapk870dchj9v6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm2oj6c5h2bs)
Friend,

When it’s time to get reelected, politicians make all the promises in the world to fix everything they just haven’t gotten around to...

But _follow through_ on those promises? Not so much.

Have you ever thought, “If these people won’t represent my interest, then I’ll just have to do it myself?” **...You’re NOT alone.**

I often wondered why politicians were powerless to secure our borders, solve the national debt, or stop funding global wars while our country suffers. Then, I decided to take action.

Thankfully, Young Americans for Liberty Foundation was there to help. YAL Foundation is one of the few organizations that offers training that can take you from activist to representative and how to be a champion for liberty once elected to office.

**In fact, I consider myself one of their success stories.**

I’m Congressman Eric Burlison from Southwest Missouri. YAL Foundation’s efforts have been essential to my career in public service.

[I told Jeff Frazee, the Founder of YAL Foundation, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to train the next generation of liberty leaders. Will you please chip in toward that goal with a donation of $10 or more?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvl1424sh56uktn44j9cd2srujttr8loh3svidh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm2oj6c5h2bs)
[Donate](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zakr9k0vvggocvg369l0jkourgorcpecdaclg90o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm2oj6c5h2bs)
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm6lago5n2l7k6lkl83urvkcbklq9flam9c0j81o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm2oj6c5h2bs)
_YAL’s chief operating officer, Sean Themea, and I speaking at FreedomFest 2024 in Las Vegas._
My life would not have been the same without the support of Young Americans for Liberty Foundation. Their mission is to advance liberty across the country by–

1) **Identifying** Youth Leaders through a National Campus Program
2) **Educating** through On-Campus Activism Events
3) **Training** Students, Activists, and Legislators on How to Make Liberty Win!

This elite training gives both YAL students the advantage when fighting for liberty on campus and legislators the advantage when standing up to the Uniparty in office. Other organizations just can’t match!

_YAL’s training took me from freedom activist to the Freedom Caucus_ , and with your support, I want to help train even more students to fight for liberty.

[Young Americans for Liberty Foundation is one of the only organizations training future leaders in this country who can fight for our freedom. That’s why I am personally committed to helping them raise $20,000 before the end of the month. Will you please donate $10 or more toward that goal?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze7car7v6qmrqgu34qfibu565dlu73ltsgl7fs4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm2oj6c5h2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z13p1lgjtvk30p5vf6qrdmb1m0m692ek2flmcp78_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm2oj6c5h2bs)

[Donate $20.24](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7qn9r9reqh56khsp49hcbs15avbt2t68atiovio_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm2oj6c5h2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6v0549st809032usis36b4l8up0ef3of7jgi81o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm2oj6c5h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdmkf4kkqlmdf21kigtuc321g66s9cqp59bfol58_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm2oj6c5h2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znja2461n3plne04iokuil1il7b080rcl6nvc7pg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm2oj6c5h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb7preu28q2ek17kanm0rl8hcfvhgugd0642rb6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm2oj6c5h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkstfojmf3gjs8t3ucc7renrs2upjle25nehle08_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm2oj6c5h2bs)
Throughout my career, I have worked to keep the government from infringing upon our rights.

When I first got elected to the House in Missouri, there was a senior member who pulled me aside on a Committee hearing and said, _**“Son, let me tell you how things _really_ work up here and what you’re going to do.”**_

Long story short, I didn’t play ball. Instead, I found a way to pass Constitutional Carry in Missouri. I’m also happy to say that the same guy is the guy that I beat in the congressional primary.

And it all started because YAL Foundation helped train me.

[Donating today is one of the best ways to help liberty win across the country. Can you donate $20.24, $35, $100, or any amount to support Young Americans for Liberty Foundation?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkkfr0lqnaevk17nssf7fr2u4q889ik4jb37g3n0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm2oj6c5h2bs)

In liberty,

Congressman Eric Burlison

_Young Americans for Liberty Foundation is a nonprofit organization formed under section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Young Americans for Liberty Foundation are deductible as charitable contributions to the extent permitted by law. No goods or services were given in exchange for this contribution._

**SHOCKING: Biden pardons Hunter despite saying he wouldn't. **
This is a COMPLETE farce.
Remember when Biden repeatedly swore to the American people that he would NEVER pardon his son?
Nancy Mace here.

[****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1184gg8uf7b5geo8al78ck9ar459roljnhnb770_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhmap34cph2bs)
_**Honestly, I 'm not even shocked - Biden's memory is as unreliable as his word.**_
**We all know exactly what 's going on here:** Biden's cronies are once again exploiting the system, bending the law to their will.
The same Democrats who relentlessly warned us about **Trump "abusing his power"** now have **NO issue** doing the exact same thing, if it benefits them.
This pardon is a clear demonstration of the Left's corrupt and deceitful agenda, one that they will NEVER stop trying to force on the American people.
Even worse, Biden tried to justify Hunter's charges as a "miscarriage of justice," claiming they were politically motivated.
**But let 's not forget how the Left mercilessly HUNTED Trump during his campaign with a political WITCH HUNT of their own!**
It's painfully obvious that the phrase "no one is above the law" only applies if you're not on the Left's side.
**_Imagine if Trump had been the one to pardon his son... the outrage would have been deafening._**
**[So, tell me - do you believe Biden should be pardoning Hunter?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zifjehssq6spf2fhidu1nhk0vlu3r9tu57mmn1c8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhmap34cph2bs)**
Your response is critical!
We need to show Biden that the American people WILL NOT stand for this betrayal!
Let your voice be heard NOW!

Donald Trump’s announcement of Republican Florida sheriff Chad

name: Eric Burlison
subject: Mark my words... these people will destroy this country
body:
I often wondered why politicians were powerless to secure our borders

|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znb1snj9irop2igsg6u38dt8heqv1duiat2pe8t0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm6p76cjh2bs)
Friend,

When it’s time to get reelected, politicians make all the promises in the world to fix everything they just haven’t gotten around to...

But _follow through_ on those promises? Not so much.

Have you ever thought, “If these people won’t represent my interest, then I’ll just have to do it myself?” **...You’re NOT alone.**

I often wondered why politicians were powerless to secure our borders, solve the national debt, or stop funding global wars while our country suffers. Then, I decided to take action.

Thankfully, Young Americans for Liberty Foundation was there to help. YAL Foundation is one of the few organizations that offers training that can take you from activist to representative and how to be a champion for liberty once elected to office.

**In fact, I consider myself one of their success stories.**

I’m Congressman Eric Burlison from Southwest Missouri. YAL Foundation’s efforts have been essential to my career in public service.

[I told Jeff Frazee, the Founder of YAL Foundation, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to train the next generation of liberty leaders. Will you please chip in toward that goal with a donation of $10 or more?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zacumbk4244pm1ifnovd6ej36ed8elfhteimlnn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm6p76cjh2bs)
[Donate](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zna0f887av1038p8hr7tavstpfvi3eq2i1mv34l0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm6p76cjh2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9o81vgih5k334elru3diih7ps4i7cpbuucppc38_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm6p76cjh2bs)
_YAL’s chief operating officer, Sean Themea, and I speaking at FreedomFest 2024 in Las Vegas._
My life would not have been the same without the support of Young Americans for Liberty Foundation. Their mission is to advance liberty across the country by–

1) **Identifying** Youth Leaders through a National Campus Program
2) **Educating** through On-Campus Activism Events
3) **Training** Students, Activists, and Legislators on How to Make Liberty Win!

This elite training gives both YAL students the advantage when fighting for liberty on campus and legislators the advantage when standing up to the Uniparty in office. Other organizations just can’t match!

_YAL’s training took me from freedom activist to the Freedom Caucus_ , and with your support, I want to help train even more students to fight for liberty.

[Young Americans for Liberty Foundation is one of the only organizations training future leaders in this country who can fight for our freedom. That’s why I am personally committed to helping them raise $20,000 before the end of the month. Will you please donate $10 or more toward that goal?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk9ori87b896oj6rfvuegk382noh69udoohc82e8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm6p76cjh2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3ea53s74hggmiksgegn9oqg9thcn6egmraie4po_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm6p76cjh2bs)

[Donate $20.24](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh5kba0uant88g1fnq90sarmkvbpte31e2ecj070_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm6p76cjh2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze0ula204avefrfp9af9d3rrg8o4j5lcdee19png_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm6p76cjh2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znq4q4qg56g2pr183t5osncd9j8tp39l7d6gm11g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm6p76cjh2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2fu0fqmh0en5nq4qa6686v08k10l7cjn6oqi38g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm6p76cjh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp4hg1cif4alndbqbbmj0dqligkjo45rukcrr3o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm6p76cjh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z47ovvplt9hscrtugl6aq1vvsj80gnhmn7ap981g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm6p76cjh2bs)
Throughout my career, I have worked to keep the government from infringing upon our rights.

When I first got elected to the House in Missouri, there was a senior member who pulled me aside on a Committee hearing and said, _**“Son, let me tell you how things _really_ work up here and what you’re going to do.”**_

Long story short, I didn’t play ball. Instead, I found a way to pass Constitutional Carry in Missouri. I’m also happy to say that the same guy is the guy that I beat in the congressional primary.

And it all started because YAL Foundation helped train me.

[Donating today is one of the best ways to help liberty win across the country. Can you donate $20.24, $35, $100, or any amount to support Young Americans for Liberty Foundation?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z96ip5tqc5fsdokcnt3ehd3n8sovfpjnjpkkt4io_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm6p76cjh2bs)

In liberty,

Congressman Eric Burlison

Contributions to Young Americans for Liberty Foundation are deductible as charitable contributions to the extent permitted by law. No goods or services were given in exchange for this contribution._

clean_body: I often wondered why politicians were powerless to secure our borders | | | Friend, When it’s time to get reelected, politicians make all the promises in the world to fix everything they just haven’t gotten around to... But follow through on those promises? Not so much. Have you ever thought, “If these people won’t represent my interest, then I’ll just have to do it myself?” ...You’re NOT alone. I often wondered why politicians were powerless to secure our borders, solve the national debt, or stop funding global wars while our country suffers. Then, I decided to take action. Thankfully, Young Americans for Liberty Foundation was there to help. YAL Foundation is one of the few organizations that offers training that can take you from activist to representative and how to be a champion for liberty once elected to office. In fact, I consider myself one of their success stories. I’m Congressman Eric Burlison from Southwest Missouri. YAL Foundation’s efforts have been essential to my career in public service. YAL’s chief operating officer, Sean Themea, and I speaking at FreedomFest 2024 in Las Vegas. My life would not have been the same without the support of Young Americans for Liberty Foundation. Their mission is to advance liberty across the country by– 1) Identifying Youth Leaders through a National Campus Program 2) Educating through On-Campus Activism Events 3) Training Students, Activists, and Legislators on How to Make Liberty Win! This elite training gives both YAL students the advantage when fighting for liberty on campus and legislators the advantage when standing up to the Uniparty in office. Other organizations just can’t match! YAL’s training took me from freedom activist to the Freedom Caucus , and with your support, I want to help train even more students to fight for liberty. Throughout my career, I have worked to keep the government from infringing upon our rights. When I first got elected to the House in Missouri, there was a senior member who pulled me aside on a Committee hearing and said, “Son, let me tell you how things really work up here and what you’re going to do.” Long story short, I didn’t play ball. Instead, I found a way to pass Constitutional Carry in Missouri. I’m also happy to say that the same guy is the guy that I beat in the congressional primary. And it all started because YAL Foundation helped train me. In liberty, Congressman Eric Burlison Young Americans for Liberty Foundation is a nonprofit organization formed under section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Young Americans for Liberty Foundation are deductible as charitable contributions to the extent permitted by law. No goods or services were given in exchange for this contribution. GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# Join or Renew your BIZPAC Membership
_Good Morning,_ _I hope you are planning to attend the BIZPAC Christmas reception._ _Kim, Sonu and I have been diligently working to produce one of the most fun, exciting and classiest Christmas receptions BIZPAC has ever held for our members. (see attached Christmas party invite) and RSVP with Kim@BIZPAC.us)_ _So, we are reaching out to ask TWO things from our members:_ _1) please bring a qualified member candidate with you to the Christmas Party...you never know, it might be just the thing their business needs to go to the next level_ _2) If you have not just joined or renewed, please Upgrade or Renew your membership today. BIZPAC needs your support to do our work in the Texas Legislature that has already started with bill filings._ _We ask for your support today. https://bizpac.us/join-now_ _See the special opportunities for membership below with our new VIP Founders Club._ _Sincerely,_
_JL Trahan_

name: Eric Burlison
subject: Mark my words... these people will destroy this country
body:
I often wondered why politicians were powerless to secure our borders

|
---
| | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zd4qjffqpd457au29h4me9pft9284snrtqt3sht8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm1pr4c9h2bs)
Friend,

When it’s time to get reelected, politicians make all the promises in the world to fix everything they just haven’t gotten around to...

But _follow through_ on those promises? Not so much.

Have you ever thought, “If these people won’t represent my interest, then I’ll just have to do it myself?” **...You’re NOT alone.**

I often wondered why politicians were powerless to secure our borders, solve the national debt, or stop funding global wars while our country suffers. Then, I decided to take action.

Thankfully, Young Americans for Liberty Foundation was there to help. YAL Foundation is one of the few organizations that offers training that can take you from activist to representative and how to be a champion for liberty once elected to office.

**In fact, I consider myself one of their success stories.**

I’m Congressman Eric Burlison from Southwest Missouri. YAL Foundation’s efforts have been essential to my career in public service.

[I told Jeff Frazee, the Founder of YAL Foundation, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to train the next generation of liberty leaders. Will you please chip in toward that goal with a donation of $10 or more?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zn1i54mja7e0hgdlpt42l8vicv3nv3lh4s5a0u0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm1pr4c9h2bs)
[Donate](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z2qdr8d5eq0aubsikn45j6aqbbqdf5p59u8mf0m8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm1pr4c9h2bs)
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zrqi4cgiiuja8f24i6087poi79nks6bdvjgj4m8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm1pr4c9h2bs)
_YAL’s chief operating officer, Sean Themea, and I speaking at FreedomFest 2024 in Las Vegas._
My life would not have been the same without the support of Young Americans for Liberty Foundation. Their mission is to advance liberty across the country by–

1) **Identifying** Youth Leaders through a National Campus Program
2) **Educating** through On-Campus Activism Events
3) **Training** Students, Activists, and Legislators on How to Make Liberty Win!

This elite training gives both YAL students the advantage when fighting for liberty on campus and legislators the advantage when standing up to the Uniparty in office. Other organizations just can’t match!

_YAL’s training took me from freedom activist to the Freedom Caucus_ , and with your support, I want to help train even more students to fight for liberty.

[Young Americans for Liberty Foundation is one of the only organizations training future leaders in this country who can fight for our freedom. That’s why I am personally committed to helping them raise $20,000 before the end of the month. Will you please donate $10 or more toward that goal?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zcq1l92ivo8esoe0rmhokceogafsqms5023lm868_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm1pr4c9h2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z6pdi86pkcbnqp21l62emroq2o10dllfqhnakoso_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm1pr4c9h2bs)

[Donate $20.24](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zh71rn4lrei518f9t6js50l870jo2vjhuu01s40g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm1pr4c9h2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zv6k03pells40a2etg1bpkg6jj460iq2pfamc1n8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm1pr4c9h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zq1usmpjkcq2imccval6e20enp80h8ij2udut01o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm1pr4c9h2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z4tulg86ej7r4hjkco3mpim1o1h0ursk4djtvnq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm1pr4c9h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z8rf8tvuojuueri7qqng3ubnufjcrh1kqh3g9md8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm1pr4c9h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zcj0h5u2m2rhb02ebbejq5rl4cahmpoqjsrusrs0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm1pr4c9h2bs)
Throughout my career, I have worked to keep the government from infringing upon our rights.

When I first got elected to the House in Missouri, there was a senior member who pulled me aside on a Committee hearing and said, _**“Son, let me tell you how things _really_ work up here and what you’re going to do.”**_

Long story short, I didn’t play ball. Instead, I found a way to pass Constitutional Carry in Missouri. I’m also happy to say that the same guy is the guy that I beat in the congressional primary.

And it all started because YAL Foundation helped train me.

[Donating today is one of the best ways to help liberty win across the country. Can you donate $20.24, $35, $100, or any amount to support Young Americans for Liberty Foundation?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zsrnvp0bjnpo7jn6qt6mnulngfvo7oaqphc9rq6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm1pr4c9h2bs)

In liberty,

Congressman Eric Burlison

Contributions to Young Americans for Liberty Foundation are deductible as charitable contributions to the extent permitted by law. No goods or services were given in exchange for this contribution._

### It's long past due that Joe Biden lead from the front and use the awesome power of the Presidency to protect the most marginalized in America
| | [Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Dec 2

---

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=152442930&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNDQyOTMwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMzE1MTg1MSwiZXhwIjoxNzM1NzQzODUxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.b2ufgLYQmhu7qhEgsc7TDpU_PsSWuE8YKWuaNm6wA0Y&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/biden-pardons-hunter-but-he-cannot?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

President Biden has pardoned his son, Hunter Biden, of all the federal charges against him. While this is triggering partisan outrage, the real issue isn't whether Hunter receives a pardon--it is whether Biden goes further? With his presidency nearing its conclusion, Biden has the opportunity to take transformative action to uphold justice, protect democracy, and slow the MAGA agenda. But will he? **Let 's Address This.**
**Quick Note!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. **Subscribe and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..BNR8KCTeTcV3xJWWgr-FsfWa3qKeWE-ObE_5OAVJCgw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=152442930)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9bd52c3c-99db-44da-a0b1-5a3f03b06339?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It never made sense to me that Joe Biden promised to never pardon Hunter. We all knew this was a false promise, and yesterday we were all proven right. Biden's flip-flopping has helped no one, and given MAGA Republicans fodder to claim outrage. That said, a closer look shows the MAGA outrage is performative and nothing more. And the receipts are worth citing when critics try to equivocate between Trump and Biden on the issue of Presidential pardons.
### Trump Pardoned War Criminals, Cronies, and His Family
First, let's put things in perspective. There is no equivocation between Joe Biden flip flopping and eventually pardoning his son Hunter to protect him from malicious GOP prosecution, and Donald Trump literally pardoning white supremacists like Sheriff Joe Arpaio and convicted murderous war criminals like Eddie Gallagher, and his own family criminal syndicate.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/08cd8c3e-a61e-4bac-b15e-aa04641aab73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump pardoned 15 people, including Dustin Heard (from left), Evan Liberty, Nicholas Slatten and Paul Slough, the four former government contractors convicted for a 2007 massacre in Baghdad that murdered more than a dozen Iraqi civilians. [Photo Credit: AP]
Donald Trump granted clemency to dozens of individuals whose actions embodied the worst abuses of power. Among them were convicted war criminals like:
1. **Clint Lorance** : Convicted of second-degree murder for ordering his troops to fire on unarmed Afghan civilians, killing two men in 2012.
2. **Mathew Golsteyn** : Accused of murdering an unarmed Afghan detainee in 2010 and burying his body, an act Golsteyn admitted to.
3. **Edward Gallagher** : A Navy SEAL convicted of posing with the corpse of a teenage ISIS fighter he was accused of stabbing to death in Iraq in 2017. Gallagher's own team testified about his history of shooting civilians and other alleged war crimes.

Trump's pardons of these men were condemned by senior military leaders, legal experts, and veterans who argued they undermined the rule of law and U.S. military ethics. Yet MAGA Republicans celebrated these actions as bold, patriotic moves.
It wasn't just war criminals, Trump pardoned plenty of political allies guilty of major crimes. Here's a short list for consideration:
* **Michael Flynn:** Lying to the FBI about Russian contacts.
* **Paul Manafort:** Tax fraud, bank fraud, and hiding foreign accounts.
* **Roger Stone:** Witness tampering, obstruction of justice, and lying to Congress.
* **Steve Bannon:** Fraud related to the "We Build the Wall" fundraiser.
* **George Papadopoulos:** Lying to the FBI about Russian contacts.
* **Alex van der Zwaan:** Lying to investigators about Ukraine.

And it wasn't just major criminals, Trump also pardoned his own family. For example, he pardoned Charles Kushner, his son-in-law Jared Kushner's father, who was convicted of federal tax evasion, illegal campaign contributions, and witness tampering. Prosecuted by former Republican presidential candidate Chris Christie, the crimes were described as "one of the most loathsome, disgusting crimes" Christie had ever seen. Yet not only did Trump pardon Charles Kushner, but has also now appointed Charles Kushner as Ambassador to France.
And finally, the lack of self awareness from Republicans is truly breathtaking. Consider [my response to convicted felon Dinesh D'Souza](https://substack.com/redirect/453a7767-d01f-46da-87b5-511fac3ba662?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), whom Trump pardoned, as he pretended to claim he cares about rule of law.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6144b2a8-40dc-4cc7-baba-c0f281482879?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
MAGA's hypocrisy is glaring. The same people who cheered Trump's pardons of war criminals and corrupt family members now express outrage over Hunter Biden's nominal drug charges, despite his willingness to address his legal issues. The double standard is undeniable. But we cannot stop the conversation at merely calling out MAGA hypocrisy. We must also delve into affirmatively upholding justice and human rights for all Americans. What does that look like?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..BNR8KCTeTcV3xJWWgr-FsfWa3qKeWE-ObE_5OAVJCgw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152442930)
### Biden Must Go Beyond Hunter
If Biden is willing to pardon Hunter--and he has--then it is just one more reason why he must act on other pressing injustices as well. Right now some 40 Americans remain on federal death row, their lives at risk due to a system riddled with racial bias and wrongful convictions. Remember, 1 in 11 Americans executed are later proved innocent all along. Knowing this, Trump reinstated federal executions after a 17-year moratorium, rushing through executions in his final months. Biden can and must commute these sentences to life in prison, signaling his commitment to justice. And given the massive racial injustice and disproportionate targeting of Black Americans (note, half of all death row exonerations are of Black people), this is a powerful opportunity for Biden to protect racial justice in America. Finally, as I've pointed out before, abolishing the death penalty is not just morally correct, [it is also fiscally wise](https://substack.com/redirect/00144e58-da83-48a5-bebc-ac94c89e75df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
### Protecting Abortion Access and Cancelling Student Debt
Beyond clemency, Biden can and should use his executive authority to address other urgent issues. Abortion access remains under attack nationwide, leaving millions without the care they need. Biden could issue an executive order protecting abortion access at the federal level, buying time and creating legal obstacles to slow down future MAGA rollbacks.
Similarly, Biden has the authority to cancel all student debt through executive action. He has already used his authority as President to cancel $175B in student debt. Now its time to finish the job, as they say. Such a move would lift the financial burden off 40 million Americans shackled by $1.7 trillion in debt--many of whom face compounding interest rates designed to exploit them. And if Trump wants to try to reverse this executive order, then let him try. Let Trump explain to 40 million hard working Americans why the exploitative debt they were just released from, is now being tied to them once more--all while Trump cancels another $2 trillion in taxes for America's 815 wealthiest billionaires.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..BNR8KCTeTcV3xJWWgr-FsfWa3qKeWE-ObE_5OAVJCgw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152442930)
### Justice Over Politics
Abolishing the federal death penalty, protecting abortion access, and canceling student debt is not just the right thing to do, these moves would also fulfill campaign promises Biden made 4 years ago, and create meaningful barriers to MAGA authoritarianism in the years ahead.
Meanwhile, MAGA Republicans have proven they care not for justice or accountability. They've celebrated Trump's blatant abuses of power, from pardoning war criminals to rehabilitating family members convicted of grotesque crimes, to [grifting off the Holy Bible for personal profit](https://substack.com/redirect/e6c140d9-b345-4184-88a1-0b4d3792f370?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Democrats must stop worrying about MAGA's bad-faith attacks and focus instead on protecting the rights of the American people. Biden must act boldly, decisively, and without apology. Justice demands it, and the future of our country depends on it.

clean_body: It's long past due that Joe Biden lead from the front and use the awesome power of the Presidency to protect the most marginalized in America | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! It's long past due that Joe Biden lead from the front and use the awesome power of the Presidency to protect the most marginalized in America | | | Dec 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | President Biden has pardoned his son, Hunter Biden, of all the federal charges against him. While this is triggering partisan outrage, the real issue isn't whether Hunter receives a pardon--it is whether Biden goes further? With his presidency nearing its conclusion, Biden has the opportunity to take transformative action to uphold justice, protect democracy, and slow the MAGA agenda. But will he? Let 's Address This. Quick Note! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. Subscribe and join the movement. | | ---|---|--- It never made sense to me that Joe Biden promised to never pardon Hunter. We all knew this was a false promise, and yesterday we were all proven right. Biden's flip-flopping has helped no one, and given MAGA Republicans fodder to claim outrage. That said, a closer look shows the MAGA outrage is performative and nothing more. And the receipts are worth citing when critics try to equivocate between Trump and Biden on the issue of Presidential pardons. Trump Pardoned War Criminals, Cronies, and His Family First, let's put things in perspective. There is no equivocation between Joe Biden flip flopping and eventually pardoning his son Hunter to protect him from malicious GOP prosecution, and Donald Trump literally pardoning white supremacists like Sheriff Joe Arpaio and convicted murderous war criminals like Eddie Gallagher, and his own family criminal syndicate. | | ---|---|--- Trump pardoned 15 people, including Dustin Heard (from left), Evan Liberty, Nicholas Slatten and Paul Slough, the four former government contractors convicted for a 2007 massacre in Baghdad that murdered more than a dozen Iraqi civilians. [Photo Credit: AP] Donald Trump granted clemency to dozens of individuals whose actions embodied the worst abuses of power. Among them were convicted war criminals like: 1. Clint Lorance : Convicted of second-degree murder for ordering his troops to fire on unarmed Afghan civilians, killing two men in 2012. 2. Mathew Golsteyn : Accused of murdering an unarmed Afghan detainee in 2010 and burying his body, an act Golsteyn admitted to. 3. Edward Gallagher : A Navy SEAL convicted of posing with the corpse of a teenage ISIS fighter he was accused of stabbing to death in Iraq in 2017. Gallagher's own team testified about his history of shooting civilians and other alleged war crimes. Trump's pardons of these men were condemned by senior military leaders, legal experts, and veterans who argued they undermined the rule of law and U.S. military ethics. Yet MAGA Republicans celebrated these actions as bold, patriotic moves. It wasn't just war criminals, Trump pardoned plenty of political allies guilty of major crimes. Here's a short list for consideration: Michael Flynn: Lying to the FBI about Russian contacts. Paul Manafort: Tax fraud, bank fraud, and hiding foreign accounts. Roger Stone: Witness tampering, obstruction of justice, and lying to Congress. Steve Bannon: Fraud related to the "We Build the Wall" fundraiser. George Papadopoulos: Lying to the FBI about Russian contacts. Alex van der Zwaan: Lying to investigators about Ukraine. And it wasn't just major criminals, Trump also pardoned his own family. For example, he pardoned Charles Kushner, his son-in-law Jared Kushner's father, who was convicted of federal tax evasion, illegal campaign contributions, and witness tampering. Prosecuted by former Republican presidential candidate Chris Christie, the crimes were described as "one of the most loathsome, disgusting crimes" Christie had ever seen. Yet not only did Trump pardon Charles Kushner, but has also now appointed Charles Kushner as Ambassador to France. And finally, the lack of self awareness from Republicans is truly breathtaking. Consider , whom Trump pardoned, as he pretended to claim he cares about rule of law. | | ---|---|--- MAGA's hypocrisy is glaring. The same people who cheered Trump's pardons of war criminals and corrupt family members now express outrage over Hunter Biden's nominal drug charges, despite his willingness to address his legal issues. The double standard is undeniable. But we cannot stop the conversation at merely calling out MAGA hypocrisy. We must also delve into affirmatively upholding justice and human rights for all Americans. What does that look like? Biden Must Go Beyond Hunter If Biden is willing to pardon Hunter--and he has--then it is just one more reason why he must act on other pressing injustices as well. Right now some 40 Americans remain on federal death row, their lives at risk due to a system riddled with racial bias and wrongful convictions. Remember, 1 in 11 Americans executed are later proved innocent all along. Knowing this, Trump reinstated federal executions after a 17-year moratorium, rushing through executions in his final months. Biden can and must commute these sentences to life in prison, signaling his commitment to justice. And given the massive racial injustice and disproportionate targeting of Black Americans (note, half of all death row exonerations are of Black people), this is a powerful opportunity for Biden to protect racial justice in America. Finally, as I've pointed out before, abolishing the death penalty is not just morally correct, . Protecting Abortion Access and Cancelling Student Debt Beyond clemency, Biden can and should use his executive authority to address other urgent issues. Abortion access remains under attack nationwide, leaving millions without the care they need. Biden could issue an executive order protecting abortion access at the federal level, buying time and creating legal obstacles to slow down future MAGA rollbacks. Similarly, Biden has the authority to cancel all student debt through executive action. He has already used his authority as President to cancel $175B in student debt. Now its time to finish the job, as they say. Such a move would lift the financial burden off 40 million Americans shackled by $1.7 trillion in debt--many of whom face compounding interest rates designed to exploit them. And if Trump wants to try to reverse this executive order, then let him try. Let Trump explain to 40 million hard working Americans why the exploitative debt they were just released from, is now being tied to them once more--all while Trump cancels another $2 trillion in taxes for America's 815 wealthiest billionaires. Justice Over Politics Abolishing the federal death penalty, protecting abortion access, and canceling student debt is not just the right thing to do, these moves would also fulfill campaign promises Biden made 4 years ago, and create meaningful barriers to MAGA authoritarianism in the years ahead. Meanwhile, MAGA Republicans have proven they care not for justice or accountability. They've celebrated Trump's blatant abuses of power, from pardoning war criminals to rehabilitating family members convicted of grotesque crimes, to . Democrats must stop worrying about MAGA's bad-faith attacks and focus instead on protecting the rights of the American people. Biden must act boldly, decisively, and without apology. Justice demands it, and the future of our country depends on it. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. name: Eric Burlison
subject: Mark my words... these people will destroy this country
body:
I often wondered why politicians were powerless to secure our borders

|
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3dphc5ogmitt5gc12aeub8k0dd1gmdben8godng_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm9or6clh2bs)
Friend,

When it’s time to get reelected, politicians make all the promises in the world to fix everything they just haven’t gotten around to...

But _follow through_ on those promises? Not so much.

Have you ever thought, “If these people won’t represent my interest, then I’ll just have to do it myself?” **...You’re NOT alone.**

I often wondered why politicians were powerless to secure our borders, solve the national debt, or stop funding global wars while our country suffers. Then, I decided to take action.

Thankfully, Young Americans for Liberty Foundation was there to help. YAL Foundation is one of the few organizations that offers training that can take you from activist to representative and how to be a champion for liberty once elected to office.

**In fact, I consider myself one of their success stories.**

I’m Congressman Eric Burlison from Southwest Missouri. YAL Foundation’s efforts have been essential to my career in public service.

[I told Jeff Frazee, the Founder of YAL Foundation, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to train the next generation of liberty leaders. Will you please chip in toward that goal with a donation of $10 or more?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeae3a6lsjtb0o602bfv2h8cc5sl5s8ii9t1sdu0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm9or6clh2bs)
[Donate](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs79lt5e89u14q8sdk7r9jldg28p45ksarlcvpv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm9or6clh2bs)
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfql56hhdibhulh2id7id2f7034q81604c7ltm6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm9or6clh2bs)
_YAL’s chief operating officer, Sean Themea, and I speaking at FreedomFest 2024 in Las Vegas._
My life would not have been the same without the support of Young Americans for Liberty Foundation. Their mission is to advance liberty across the country by–

1) **Identifying** Youth Leaders through a National Campus Program
2) **Educating** through On-Campus Activism Events
3) **Training** Students, Activists, and Legislators on How to Make Liberty Win!

This elite training gives both YAL students the advantage when fighting for liberty on campus and legislators the advantage when standing up to the Uniparty in office. Other organizations just can’t match!

_YAL’s training took me from freedom activist to the Freedom Caucus_ , and with your support, I want to help train even more students to fight for liberty.

[Young Americans for Liberty Foundation is one of the only organizations training future leaders in this country who can fight for our freedom. That’s why I am personally committed to helping them raise $20,000 before the end of the month. Will you please donate $10 or more toward that goal?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5o4bbqpvh3n3jnl2suer43r7kul3snoocdakj4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm9or6clh2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhd1e7mjg48fgs2jo3mispjir76notmaf6uvgc6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm9or6clh2bs)

[Donate $20.24](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg35foeq8hi5vq3db0g6snlvkrgd20u6ldebv0dg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm9or6clh2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq7tm8j9u2lo9t1fg3kc9keae7mcnachmud1abf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm9or6clh2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2b21pgclcaujn2v1ui9fpksq75pnoevptt1c7b8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm9or6clh2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkkmabm87oevdb6vec0fsjrolmn32hq5cgj9ahr0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm9or6clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcmg91e76qm742e29pshtvun0m6gl1qmr33qutb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm9or6clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuskle6ru9tj07hkhl2ehlia74hgml99odhmdrhg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm9or6clh2bs)
Throughout my career, I have worked to keep the government from infringing upon our rights.

When I first got elected to the House in Missouri, there was a senior member who pulled me aside on a Committee hearing and said, _**“Son, let me tell you how things _really_ work up here and what you’re going to do.”**_

Long story short, I didn’t play ball. Instead, I found a way to pass Constitutional Carry in Missouri. I’m also happy to say that the same guy is the guy that I beat in the congressional primary.

And it all started because YAL Foundation helped train me.

[Donating today is one of the best ways to help liberty win across the country. Can you donate $20.24, $35, $100, or any amount to support Young Americans for Liberty Foundation?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuv259pe1k0n2sifi34khg2fiou7b7plk7mk1070_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm9or6clh2bs)

In liberty,

Congressman Eric Burlison

_Young Americans for Liberty Foundation is a nonprofit organization formed under section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Young Americans for Liberty Foundation are deductible as charitable contributions to the extent permitted by law. No goods or services were given in exchange for this contribution._
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zku9ljg1485sno9qo6o39l3jrrl5190jkql5t37o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj3ctjmapj246h22sh2s8i6epj6chhm9or6clh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztnhqbb6mjn2ea9hc2pobehljdefolseacu2suj0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chhm9or6clh2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zma6r4g2cbs4g1l76t1744vhei5jovbimagia2go_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6cpi66p73cpim49fg)

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: They don’t control us
body:
It’s Monday...

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=7827b5fe0b294a74b03f220bf385b462&_t=VZip5vLMFTHp0XDgMz6Fm9VQLnBVjmiDZ7TH-lkjChdSeOkXhZ-8EYjmm53L0qBiooGXmr3Kr-ocEvKcf2ZimqPR-t26i_HAAHNUOe2KguvUD4ivMclDqJZ1myJW-i43)_
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7827b5fe0b294a74b03f220bf385b462&_e=1JsJHzoCCHr4KjxXyq6kRNXraZa-jOuLDOS17Eh3y7oFS63f58WmeXUqgNp_LTXk4u1n3_2THT5bs-ZMJ1QgzVgibYulkwYrn933Bsbm4TZQTscIQJswCmMbl7HwKLwhkYmTtKd6x2FUJjl9XvM0n98F_rtyDOUc15xeeasjw_m843VUJeVhOsQE-QYFLuNZxvCq075ORc5ZpPJuyVckX9mPS1jaqlN1edlK6WXdjG8FfB_P4BMUovHANU49ZDOKLn9tIaLGba9Vzg0dSw4nDX-o0EZvFPSPsR1wZmL5Ouu0KnA4Z-N1RB7GQKwN2UbSAvAOYuRF5zYK3I9UhgVI7I7tmpTX7TqBFx52E1XXcV56Cqy9qruH4MzqTieNdd-NTWcjF_aXMvxi8ID_v4sBDnd4gZSHRy4W2l_M-j15s4Q%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend, I hope you had a wonderful, restful, and blessed Thanksgiving weekend!

It's Monday (or as my kids affectionately call it, "Meeting Monday" because it is jam-packed with meetings with my team and others at the College.)

Before things get going, I wanted to give a quick heads-up about something.

It's about Giving Tuesday...Larry P. Arnn, the president of Hillsdale College (and my boss), has challenged us to make this our most successful Giving Tuesday yet. This year, he's challenged us to raise **$250,000 in a single day.**

**I 'm really going to need your help on this one!**

You probably already know about Giving Tuesday, a unique day of the year when many people donate to their favorite nonprofit organizations.

It's an important day for us here at Hillsdale, too. Here's why...

Our country has a rare opportunity to correct course in the next year. When so many Americans have shown they reject far-Left ideologies like socialism, we have a chance to restore liberty for the long term.

**And that will require sound education in our constitutional principles.**

But just as so many _Americans_ have shown they reject socialism, it has become clear that so many of our _institutions_ will continue to promote anti-American extremism no matter who is in office.

**But these institutions don 't control Hillsdale College--not by a longshot. **

One reason why is that the College refuses to accept even A SINGLE PENNY of taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans.

That means special giving days--like Giving Tuesday--are even more critical. After all, faithful friends like you help us stay independent.

When you support us, you help us preserve the independence that sets us apart from so many other American colleges and universities.

And your help allows us to educate millions of Americans both in Michigan and around this country--without being snared by bureaucratic strings.

**This is an education that will be critical in the coming year.**

A few years ago, we made an animated video about our independence from government money. Perhaps you've seen it, but if not, I've included a secure link below to watch it and share it with your friends.

The video is a great, **short** explanation of how and why we've taken this unique stance--and why your support is so vital.

As the video explains, supporters like you help **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans of all ages--including the youngest Americans in classrooms around the country--about the principles of liberty.

And after the last few years, you know how important these educational efforts are to restoring informed patriotism in America.

You can watch this short video here:

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/giving-tuesday-v-2024](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7827b5fe0b294a74b03f220bf385b462&_e=1JsJHzoCCHr4KjxXyq6kRNXraZa-jOuLDOS17Eh3y7oFS63f58WmeXUqgNp_LTXk4u1n3_2THT5bs-ZMJ1QgzVgibYulkwYrn933Bsbm4TZQTscIQJswCmMbl7HwKLwhkYmTtKd6x2FUJjl9XvM0n98F_rtyDOUc15xeeasjw_m843VUJeVhOsQE-QYFLuNZxvCq075ORc5ZpPJuyVckX9mPS1jaqlN1edlK6WXdjG8FfB_P4BMUovHANU49ZDOKxeWj-hsFd_Q8U8oxVsk2SrjqfhvHCQ7jIZtT4AVR0ag15t8JuOugKZExtQ854sl4Znpi_tWZVD61-ZZw3-aYeTzEOdX1uh7j5o7XvguFcgPf6M0UaQitU-yh06sQKnt4drHyWLmxepLvcpi4uN6RQNs_nObRhDcjtUeRmsaIAKY%3D)

And I hope you'll consider giving a gift to Hillsdale during this once-a-year giving opportunity. Your generosity will make a huge difference to us--and to liberty.

With gratitude always,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

**P.S. If you are too busy to go online tomorrow, you can make your special Giving Tuesday gift using the secure link below. **

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/giving-tuesday-v-2024](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7827b5fe0b294a74b03f220bf385b462&_e=1JsJHzoCCHr4KjxXyq6kRNXraZa-jOuLDOS17Eh3y7oFS63f58WmeXUqgNp_LTXk4u1n3_2THT5bs-ZMJ1QgzVgibYulkwYrn933Bsbm4TZQTscIQJswCmMbl7HwKLwhkYmTtKd6x2FUJjl9XvM0n98F_rtyDOUc15xeeasjw_m843VUJeVhOsQE-QYFLuNZxvCq075ORc5ZpPJuyVckX9mPS1jaqlN1edlK6WXdjG8FfB_P4BMUovHANU49ZDOKXFAZiZYDVQUaHewvGecTRBrjyQOp_wZ4wZvTwrkjFdUTgkAIyRf-wJQXvxP6hkO52QO0J6sT6mIGPFhTrvpNxaFQrF2WyftoXHcDx8fm9neUgseSmBPKVmq5jtKrlVYY6SsiJMe_ojehWomP6fK2tjMNktzsFf6B2SHSON52C2k%3D)

Thank you for all of your support on Giving Tuesday and throughout the year!
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=7827b5fe0b294a74b03f220bf385b462&_t=VZip5vLMFTHp0XDgMz6Fm9VQLnBVjmiDZ7TH-lkjChdSeOkXhZ-8EYjmm53L0qBiooGXmr3Kr-ocEvKcf2Zimu18Ax-pnVQkACMunR63sFxlvIe_gqR6z-G3EGgButqMgOXod3zJ3nFaLbYG735u1rVJQzMenw9ViBa2HYE9Bo0%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=7827b5fe0b294a74b03f220bf385b462&_t=VZip5vLMFTHp0XDgMz6Fm9VQLnBVjmiDZ7TH-lkjChdSeOkXhZ-8EYjmm53L0qBiooGXmr3Kr-ocEvKcf2ZimqPR-t26i_HAAHNUOe2KguvUD4ivMclDqJZ1myJW-i43).
---

name: Rep Nancy Mace
subject: SHOCKING: Biden pardons Hunter despite saying he wouldn’t.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Mace
body:
RESPOND NOW:

[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zjjkak7ch9in5elk2456sf159r3lqqghp52iimoo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chjm4pj6c5h2bs)

[ ](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z66soe4i2gssbjf301k8ta014lg6md6d1f51el80_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chjm4pj6c5h2bs)
**SHOCKING: Biden pardons Hunter despite saying he wouldn't. **
This is a COMPLETE farce.
Remember when Biden repeatedly swore to the American people that he would NEVER pardon his son?
Nancy Mace here.

[****](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zl41lh0ta905r1orqbeudokm3ioc2hhgtf0ja4j0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chjm4pj6c5h2bs)
_**Honestly, I 'm not even shocked - Biden's memory is as unreliable as his word.**_
**We all know exactly what 's going on here:** Biden's cronies are once again exploiting the system, bending the law to their will.
The same Democrats who relentlessly warned us about **Trump "abusing his power"** now have **NO issue** doing the exact same thing, if it benefits them.
This pardon is a clear demonstration of the Left's corrupt and deceitful agenda, one that they will NEVER stop trying to force on the American people.
Even worse, Biden tried to justify Hunter's charges as a "miscarriage of justice," claiming they were politically motivated.
**But let 's not forget how the Left mercilessly HUNTED Trump during his campaign with a political WITCH HUNT of their own!**
It's painfully obvious that the phrase "no one is above the law" only applies if you're not on the Left's side.
**_Imagine if Trump had been the one to pardon his son... the outrage would have been deafening._**
**[So, tell me - do you believe Biden should be pardoning Hunter?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z1o8bnsb3kckm4b137sbcmr1rnl8cvb492jrcfb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chjm4pj6c5h2bs)**
Your response is critical!
We need to show Biden that the American people WILL NOT stand for this betrayal!
Let your voice be heard NOW!
[RESPOND NOW >>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z8uiv6cbjd04pp4b4vudm3v3858qeel0376h7n0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chjm4pj6c5h2bs)
[CHIP IN $25 >>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z29v31noenmesckeeda4nisa4iem49hkuq4010m8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chjm4pj6c5h2bs)

We all know exactly what 's going on here: Biden's cronies are once again exploiting the system, bending the law to their will. The same Democrats who relentlessly warned us about Trump "abusing his power" now have NO issue doing the exact same thing, if it benefits them. This pardon is a clear demonstration of the Left's corrupt and deceitful agenda, one that they will NEVER stop trying to force on the American people. Even worse, Biden tried to justify Hunter's charges as a "miscarriage of justice," claiming they were politically motivated. But let 's not forget how the Left mercilessly HUNTED Trump during his campaign with a political WITCH HUNT of their own! It's painfully obvious that the phrase "no one is above the law" only applies if you're not on the Left's side. Imagine if Trump had been the one to pardon his son... the outrage would have been deafening. Your response is critical! Friend,

When I saw we brought back our "_I like my wine like I like my politics, RED,_ " wine glasses for Christmas, I knew this would be the perfect gift for my girlfriend.

name: Signature Request [via Team Marsha]
subject: Dear President Trump,
body:
We want your name at the VERY TOP of this letter!

| |
---
| | | Hey there -

Now that the election is behind us, we are putting together a letter of support for President Trump and want YOUR name to be at the very TOP.

You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. _**[So, Friend, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk4nsn56nt46hi2eo6v5jmmp3b2r9j1jq18jf9qg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chjmcoj6cjh2bs "So, Friend, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:")**_

---
| Dear President Trump,

I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States.

Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. _I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time._

From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts:

**1)** Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that **YOU** are the right person to lead America.

**2)** Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that **YOUR** leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans.

_Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration._

Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great.

Together, we will **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

Sincerely,

**[X_________________](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zscib433qjdb0p82oo1si3obeiphrangj0074ipg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chjmcoj6cjh2bs "X_________________")**
---
| | | [SIGN THE LETTER](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztoak839bspcbfi5ajkcuna3imqbaojoupm0rcso_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chjmcoj6cjh2bs "SIGN THE LETTER")
---

Thank you,

Team Marsha

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Another vote suppressor scam
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Opponents of voting rights will go any length to win. The suppressive legislation, the frivolous court cases, the lies about election results, the mass voter challenges... it's all part of a long-held strategy to discredit our elections.
We have to fight back, folks, and we have to start now. RUSH $25 or more to defend the right to vote, expand access to our elections, and make sure every vote counts >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120224_1&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120224_1&amount=25]
NYT: After Trump Took the Lead, Election Deniers Went Suddenly Silent [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120224_1&amount=25]
Team -- We all heard it.
Election deniers spent the weeks leading up to Election Day claiming -- without proof -- about widespread voter fraud that would harm the results, which is something that has never occurred in modern elections. Even Trump himself claimed “ massive CHEATING ” in Philadelphia on Election Day before the polls had even closed.
Once the results arrived the voices that had spent years shouting about election integrity suddenly faded to nothing. “ As soon as it started to look like Trump was going to win, the election denialism went very, very quiet, ” said Welton Chang, a co-founder and the chief executive of Pyrra Technologies, a company that monitors fringe social networks.
We know what this means. Once false claims of election fraud weren't needed to sow doubt about the results, they were discarded. Because they were made up all along.
We cannot abandon our fight for voting rights, Team. Fuel our work with $25 or whatever you can today and help us fight back against whichever lies opponents of voting rights come at us with next >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120224_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120224_1&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120224_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120224_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120224_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120224_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120224_1&amount=35]
It's clear: when denying the election’s outcome suddenly proved politically useless, the influencers and Trump allies seemed content to simply set it aside.
“ To the thousands of election integrity warriors: Thank you ,” read a post on X from Cleta Mitchell, a chief election denier and one of Trump's legal advisors.
In an interview after Election Day, Ms. Mitchell said the vigilance of her fellow activists had “ kept a lot of the serious things that happened in 2020 from happening again. ” She couldn't answer what those things were and how they might have occurred in 2024. Because she and many others won't believe any election results where they lose.
On Telegram, dozens of far-right channels monitored by The New York Times spent days leading up to the vote questioning its integrity and vowing to act with force if necessary to block what they viewed as a fraud. As the results rolled in, the tone shifted, warily at first and then gleefully.
This isn't over. The vote suppressors and election deniers are going to come at us again and again until our elections pale in comparison to what they are now. Pitch in with $25 or however much you can right today and protect our right to vote, now and for the future >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120224_1&amount=25]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120224_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120224_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120224_1&amount=25]

clean_body: Opponents of voting rights will go any length to win. The suppressive legislation, the frivolous court cases, the lies about election results, the mass voter challenges... it's all part of a long-held strategy to discredit our elections. We have to fight back, folks, and we have to start now. RUSH $25 or more to defend the right to vote, expand access to our elections, and make sure every vote counts >> [] Voter Action Project Logo [] NYT: After Trump Took the Lead, Election Deniers Went Suddenly Silent [] Team -- We all heard it. Election deniers spent the weeks leading up to Election Day claiming -- without proof -- about widespread voter fraud that would harm the results, which is something that has never occurred in modern elections. Even Trump himself claimed “ massive CHEATING ” in Philadelphia on Election Day before the polls had even closed. Once the results arrived the voices that had spent years shouting about election integrity suddenly faded to nothing. “ As soon as it started to look like Trump was going to win, the election denialism went very, very quiet, ” said Welton Chang, a co-founder and the chief executive of Pyrra Technologies, a company that monitors fringe social networks. We know what this means. Once false claims of election fraud weren't needed to sow doubt about the results, they were discarded. Because they were made up all along. We cannot abandon our fight for voting rights, Team. Fuel our work with $25 or whatever you can today and help us fight back against whichever lies opponents of voting rights come at us with next >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] It's clear: when denying the election’s outcome suddenly proved politically useless, the influencers and Trump allies seemed content to simply set it aside. “ To the thousands of election integrity warriors: Thank you ,” read a post on X from Cleta Mitchell, a chief election denier and one of Trump's legal advisors. In an interview after Election Day, Ms. Mitchell said the vigilance of her fellow activists had “ kept a lot of the serious things that happened in 2020 from happening again. ” She couldn't answer what those things were and how they might have occurred in 2024. Because she and many others won't believe any election results where they lose. On Telegram, dozens of far-right channels monitored by The New York Times spent days leading up to the vote questioning its integrity and vowing to act with force if necessary to block what they viewed as a fraud. As the results rolled in, the tone shifted, warily at first and then gleefully. This isn't over. The vote suppressors and election deniers are going to come at us again and again until our elections pale in comparison to what they are now. Pitch in with $25 or however much you can right today and protect our right to vote, now and for the future >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3).
