name: Rachana Desai Martin
subject: Defend your rights
body:
Make your 3X Giving Tuesday gift today | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98007410/515259359/59579377?sourceid=1150063&utm_campaign=25emkge-1114aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=3xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2E0MGU5Ni1jOGIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gqGUla5NAubXWDvjnugLNptBdHTyZaFOHXfhK7q-fe4=&emci=362825e7-92ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=6ca40e96-c8b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=954237)
---
Dear Peter,

The re-election of Donald Trump as U.S. president has brought a wave of emotions—anger, grief, fear, and uncertainty. These feelings are valid. They must fuel our determination to stand together and fight for reproductive rights.

In the months ahead, we expect relentless attempts to undermine our progress and unity. [**We cannot let these efforts weaken our resolve. Together, we must defend the rights of all people._That's why your tripled Giving Tuesday gift is so important this year._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98007411/515259360/59579377?sourceid=1150063&utm_campaign=25emkge-1114aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=3xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2E0MGU5Ni1jOGIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gqGUla5NAubXWDvjnugLNptBdHTyZaFOHXfhK7q-fe4=&emci=362825e7-92ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=6ca40e96-c8b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=954237) | [**URGENT: YOUR 3X GIFT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98007412/515259361/59579377?sourceid=1150063&utm_campaign=25emkge-1114aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=3xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2E0MGU5Ni1jOGIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gqGUla5NAubXWDvjnugLNptBdHTyZaFOHXfhK7q-fe4=&emci=362825e7-92ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=6ca40e96-c8b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=954237 "URGENT: YOUR 3X GIFT")
---
The election results signal an uphill battle: the composition of Congress may enable this administration to further erode our reproductive rights. We are fully prepared to respond to whatever challenges this administration brings, whether it’s restricting medication abortion by mail or reinstating a broader global gag rule that would disempower reproductive and human rights organizations.

I am proud to be at the Center, where we are unafraid to take on tough fights. [**We will use every tool at our disposal to block harmful policies, defend providers and patients, and challenge abuses of power.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98007413/515259362/59579377?sourceid=1150063&utm_campaign=25emkge-1114aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=3xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2E0MGU5Ni1jOGIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gqGUla5NAubXWDvjnugLNptBdHTyZaFOHXfhK7q-fe4=&emci=362825e7-92ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=6ca40e96-c8b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=954237)
[**DEFEND YOUR RIGHTS**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98007414/515259363/59579377?sourceid=1150063&utm_campaign=25emkge-1114aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=3xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2E0MGU5Ni1jOGIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gqGUla5NAubXWDvjnugLNptBdHTyZaFOHXfhK7q-fe4=&emci=362825e7-92ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=6ca40e96-c8b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=954237 "DEFEND YOUR RIGHTS")
---
The road ahead may be daunting, but together we are resilient. [**We need you in this fight. With your Giving Tuesday support, we will stand firm in defending reproductive rights and access to essential care.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98007415/515259364/59579377?sourceid=1150063&utm_campaign=25emkge-1114aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=3xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2E0MGU5Ni1jOGIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gqGUla5NAubXWDvjnugLNptBdHTyZaFOHXfhK7q-fe4=&emci=362825e7-92ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=6ca40e96-c8b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=954237)

Thank you for your unwavering commitment. Your support means everything in this critical moment.

With gratitude and resolve,

Rachana Desai Martin
Chief Government and External Relations Officer

When I checked our inventory at 8:10 AM, we were running DANGEROUSLY LOW. Because of all your hard work this election cycle, you deserve to snag the perfect gift for that special someone or even as a gift to yourself. "As a courtesy, I’m letting you have the FIRST chance to snag this limited-edition wine glass. " | | | "Generic Button" I'm about to place my order. name: Signature Request [via Team Marsha]
subject: Dear President Trump,
body:
We want your name at the VERY TOP of this letter!

| |
---
| | | Hey there -

Now that the election is behind us, we are putting together a letter of support for President Trump and want YOUR name to be at the very TOP.

You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. _**[So, Friend, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh8d7esunhpaefvmres1ahs959b896nt4assq2l0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chjm2p34cdh2bs "So, Friend, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:")**_

---
| Dear President Trump,

I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States.

Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. _I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time._

From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts:

**1)** Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that **YOU** are the right person to lead America.

**2)** Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that **YOUR** leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans.

_Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration._

Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great.

Together, we will **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

Sincerely,

**[X_________________](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z941n8r0rh5s5nbp9oc25aiofhmgq2i0np671r0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chjm2p34cdh2bs "X_________________")**
---
| | | [SIGN THE LETTER](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1ibm5244q414d5nb7lolbndltlstr4fjjtrn6bg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chjm2p34cdh2bs "SIGN THE LETTER")
---

Thank you,

Team Marsha

---
|
---
| Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account.

---

name: Jena For Colorado
subject: re: unity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Peter -
Did you see Jena’s message from last week? In the wake of the election, and in the uncertainty of what a Trump presidency may bring, it is important to remember that Coloradans must stick together to continue protecting our rights and shared values.
Read her message below, and thank you for being with us in the fight.
Jena For Colorado
----- Original Message -----
https://jenaforcolorado.com/ [https://jenaforcolorado.com/]
In times like these, when the stakes feel higher than ever, our strength lies in unity. Colorado is a beacon of progress, resilience, and compassion—a place where we come together to protect what matters most: our shared values of freedom, equality, and dignity for all.
Under Donald Trump, fundamental rights have been challenged across the country. But here in Colorado, we’ve drawn a line in the sand and stood firm to defend the values we hold dear.
This year, Colorado took bold action by codifying abortion rights into the state constitution and protecting same-sex marriage. This historic step not only protects these rights for Coloradans but also sends a powerful message to the nation: Colorado will not back down.
Now more than ever, we must stick together to defend these hard-won rights. We must unite as a community, across our differences, to ensure Colorado remains a place where everyone can live with freedom and dignity.
Thank you for being part of this fight. Together, we can protect our values, preserve our freedoms, and ensure Colorado remains a safe haven for all.
All the best,
Jena Griswold
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218

clean_body: Peter - Did you see Jena’s message from last week? In the wake of the election, and in the uncertainty of what a Trump presidency may bring, it is important to remember that Coloradans must stick together to continue protecting our rights and shared values. Read her message below, and thank you for being with us in the fight. Jena For Colorado ----- Original Message ----- [] In times like these, when the stakes feel higher than ever, our strength lies in unity. Colorado is a beacon of progress, resilience, and compassion—a place where we come together to protect what matters most: our shared values of freedom, equality, and dignity for all. Under Donald Trump, fundamental rights have been challenged across the country. But here in Colorado, we’ve drawn a line in the sand and stood firm to defend the values we hold dear. This year, Colorado took bold action by codifying abortion rights into the state constitution and protecting same-sex marriage. This historic step not only protects these rights for Coloradans but also sends a powerful message to the nation: Colorado will not back down. Now more than ever, we must stick together to defend these hard-won rights. We must unite as a community, across our differences, to ensure Colorado remains a place where everyone can live with freedom and dignity. Thank you for being part of this fight. Together, we can protect our values, preserve our freedoms, and ensure Colorado remains a safe haven for all. All the best, Jena Griswold Follow Jena Online: [] [] [] Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent. Jena for Colorado P.O. name: Speaker Johnson
subject: We need your feedback
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Fellow American, I've opened this up exclusively for TOP PATRIOTS like
you!

Guiding our country back on track is absolutely critical for
the future of our country and our Party. That's why we need our
Republican Party leaders on the same page.

As Speaker, I want to ensure that we're able to hit the ground
running as soon as President Trump puts his hand on the Bible in
January and returns to the White House.

But that can't happen if we don't have feedback from our top
conservatives. Fellow American, I'm reaching out to personally invite you
to complete my Official Speaker's Audit.

TAKE THE AUDIT >>

This isn't just another poll. Your response will help shape our
plans during the critical first months of the Trump
Administration.

You were selected to represent your state because we believe
you're one of our TOP conservatives, so I hope we can count on
your submission before we close the audit.

COMPLETE YOUR AUDIT ASAP

Sincerely,

Speaker Mike Johnson

TAKE THE AUDIT NOW >>

Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana

body:

Friend,

When I saw we brought back our "_I like my wine like I like my politics, RED,_ " wine glasses for Christmas, I knew this would be the perfect gift for my girlfriend.

_**[If you're thinking this would make the perfect gift for the Republican wine-lover in your life, then please place your order TODAY!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zspsnr8cetrqqtsskg79o44k7c3qla389qplrv10_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chjmao36cth2bs "If you’re thinking this would make the perfect gift for the Republican wine-lover in your life, then please place your order TODAY!")**_ When I checked our inventory at 8:10 AM, we were running **DANGEROUSLY LOW**.

Because of all your hard work this election cycle, you deserve to snag the perfect gift for that special someone or even as a gift to yourself. _**[As a courtesy, I'm letting you have the FIRST chance to snag this limited-edition wine glass.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0duebqdrcq3q04hrdrnaf6j6c83fehfl6fghmug_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chjmao36cth2bs "As a courtesy, I’m letting you have the FIRST chance to snag this limited-edition wine glass. Merry Christmas,

Daniel, House GOP HQ

| Peter: The Supreme Court is the highest court in the nation, and they need to be held to the highest standards. But thanks to Trump, the Court has been thrown into disarray:
* Samuel Alito flew a flag UPSIDE DOWN in SUPPORT of January 6th
* Clarence Thomas accepted more than $4 MILLION in gifts
* The superconservative majority OVERTHREW Roe v. Wade, despite its 50-year long precedent

As a result, approval of the Supreme Court is at an ALL-TIME LOW. But we need more data from folks like you, so take a minute to fill out this flash poll NOW. DO YOU APPROVE OF THE SUPREME COURT?

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Signature Request [via Team Marsha]
subject: Dear President Trump,
body:
We want your name at the VERY TOP of this letter!

| |
---
| | | Hey there -

Now that the election is behind us, we are putting together a letter of support for President Trump and want YOUR name to be at the very TOP.

You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. _**[So, Friend, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5pphcjr2btpmnifkp2u60hidthkrl5nmtdo8ilg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chjmao36cdh2bs "So, Friend, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:")**_

---
| Dear President Trump,

I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States.

Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. _I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time._

From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts:

**1)** Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that **YOU** are the right person to lead America.

**2)** Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that **YOUR** leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans.

_Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration._

Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great.

Together, we will **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

Sincerely,

**[X_________________](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk6u0bv5r0hh18mm231jfn0fkffhhf26u43gr5o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chjmao36cdh2bs "X_________________")**
---
| | | [SIGN THE LETTER](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zojtn1fj197apdth8b3054hn1hof0prhanotavc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6chjmao36cdh2bs "SIGN THE LETTER")
---

Thank you,

Team Marsha

---
|
---

name: Team Nina for Philly
subject: Nina Ahmad's Holiday Party is December 10th!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ninaholiday24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ninaholiday24]
Hi Friend,
I hope this email finds you renewed from the Thanksgiving celebration. As we approach the holidays, I am again reminded of the importance of coming together in the spirit of gratitude, celebration, support, and connectivity. During these difficult and chaotic times, community is more important than ever and and I am resolved to lean into those around me.
In that spirit, we hope that you will join us for a Birthday and Holiday Party on Tuesday, December 10th, 2024 from 5:30 pm - 7:00 pm at XI West - 3939 Chestnut Street, Philadelphia, PA 19104.
We will be collecting new toys to donate to Philadelphia children for the holidays. All donations are appreciated!
To RSVP, please click below or email AmandaDeMaria@DeMariaConsultingLLC.com.
We hope to see you there!
Nina

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Bah! Humbug!
body:
Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/f9bKqYMnHMBvu1nya9Rnaw~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College released an online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/f9bKqYMnHMBvu1nya9Rnaw~~/AARclAA~~~)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

Conservative Broadcast
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Conservative Direct
subject: Is income inequality the problem?
body:
In today's economic landscape, the topic of income inequality is more relevant than ever.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. Dear Friend, In today's economic landscape, the topic of income inequality is more relevant than ever. Themes like "the rich are just getting richer" are being used almost daily by pundits on TV and radio. With debate about wealth distribution and economic fairness increasing, understanding the true nature and impact of "income inequality" is crucial.

But amidst the noise, have we really stopped to consider what income inequality actually means and whether it's always harmful?
| | Hoover Research Fellow David Henderson tackles these pressing questions in his insightful new commentary for the Hoover Institution, **Income Inequality Isn't the Problem**. In this powerful piece, Henderson examines the complexities of income inequality, suggesting that under certain conditions, it can be beneficial.

This commentary is essential reading for anyone concerned about the future of our nation's economy. Henderson's analysis offers a fresh perspective, challenging the prevailing narrative surrounding income inequality. By exploring the nuances of this issue, he provides a more balanced view of what income inequality means for our society.

I invite you to access this thought-provoking commentary. [Click here](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=23abfb5bdc2d4ac0802481efe7d60dbe&_e=3bC8mKTJut7FYHkmxahjHtTPJysTalQZdn1M0URXDYuaULmwku3NEWddSWmQs5x7RduDvxVjpOFbqe9F3jje-0Q0ApCPHxu6R_dXdzB2SxGBTuhyTS3glgUXdSWTIwI6fu8n0pvKRmldJAncE395-VKPMMvXJOt3jwoNVoiO4O1FAJFL0TVa5DcTnmxTjQfjL6r9sJVlK-H_kduWL2ownXgo_QAA5rD6jP0EuFWPOopH3eUstYu7DqOqYnI6xP2WP9qK6xelS4i7tmlIBzqoSkrs7v3zbnC40AGJAdmwU14WpEvOMTZJLywi4DSMB5IB4luThnrVVMioJ4IcwsbN81aB1snh5GhxJ5davvEa7DhiAQGLVYfgUs7ujOYV8yN7Ox-Ae9j_-g-lSJauduI2Rw%3D%3D) to get your free copy of **Income Inequality Isn't the Problem** now. Let's dive into this critical conversation together and better understand what's really going on in our economy.
Thank you,
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---

Friend,

body:
Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9368333f08a4887b9f642005bb58856&_e=3BDRNFWkO7wgMJOVNuwl0dNyi6VhyZasGHdiExy0KA8Xg56JFHjEjeC3JqGuxjSodCn37GHr9HgPtT6t1ojwrnHJ3zxY2m0QDtSe08mfKXghFjg6RPjPvWNHc2mWUB2tUdB2hKX1QiR-WXWkL8_2Tfm9rLHJ59ybZ_ruOl8p-Z_DlVKbAqO_41PMJRqzKn_iSrgQ-zszRDprx6--IMdvaNn2cdeWmRr0x2k6hKukN-UF7VYB7TlPWisF2iXcNdUKa0SoWXYMECpl_Dl8gpI95DzkutRuf2NBoEj6k3YD7UAtX59fgEAa6opdDwUy7rL_2fyeTDin0_tqGenl0rlyPCU7ImRzoGpPeusyu1XmRzevq4Riz7FeaFtauo0gUuNz7YiOIKbM0j4BMbZhHt5J4vtp_FptEWlsY4YgIhd54cY%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College released an online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9368333f08a4887b9f642005bb58856&_e=3BDRNFWkO7wgMJOVNuwl0dNyi6VhyZasGHdiExy0KA8Xg56JFHjEjeC3JqGuxjSodCn37GHr9HgPtT6t1ojwrnHJ3zxY2m0QDtSe08mfKXghFjg6RPjPvWNHc2mWUB2tUdB2hKX1QiR-WXWkL8_2Tfm9rLHJ59ybZ_ruOl8p-Z_DlVKbAqO_41PMJRqzKn_iSrgQ-zszRDprx6--IMdvaNn2cdeWmRr0x2k6hKukN-UF7VYB7TlPWisF2iXcNdUK2E8Ky3PsBF0YK5twUlOzbqaLTrGg9M-lAWm797yjvLIV3IWSh2RG-zTP6JsT1l9AF34FaezleZwTNJhRFLrZVPaCK4Df3N3Wp7ZUby0qpR8ycSbw9Vj8qo_5mPZxsisDVRPZAyNwg67VAp8P424GZoGERWH8scwJOoQfE-H7ScY%3D)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

Conservatives Give
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

clean_body: I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Feds can't destroy razor wire Texas installed near Eagle Pass, appeals court rules,** " Texas Tribune's **Alejandro Serrano** and**Joshua Fechter** -- "A federal appeals court on Wednesday stopped the federal government from destroying a fence of razor wire that Texas installed along the U.S.-Mexico border near Eagle Pass to deter migrants from entering the country illegally.

The ruling, criticized by activists, came hours before Mexico President **Claudia Sheinbaum** told President-elect **Donald Trump** that immigrants headed to the U.S. are being "taken care of" in her country.

Texas had placed more than 29 miles of wire in the Eagle Pass area by last September when Attorney General **Ken Paxton**[sued the Biden administration](https://substack.com/redirect/796ad478-f2ec-44d8-aaa7-00259ee49426?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over Border Patrol agents' alleged illegal destruction of state property by cutting the wire.

On Wednesday, the 5th Circuit Court of Appeals in New Orleans issued a 2-1 opinion that reversed a lower court's ruling and granted Texas a limited preliminary injunction against the federal government.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/ccf0417e-8948-4ead-b178-b7c31f43a4fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"It was shocking to me that the federal government would go out of their way to cut razor wire to allow illegals to cross when we're just trying to protect our own land," Paxton said during a Wednesday evening appearance on Newsmax. "This wasn't their land. This was our land, our private property. It had nothing due to the federal government. So this is a good win for Texas, a good win for the country, that this court recognized our ability to protect our land."

The legal dispute had not stopped Texas from [installing such razor wire in Eagle Pass](https://substack.com/redirect/772c566d-bf2e-457f-8c63-5b8b3711a32b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), where the state earlier this year took over a municipal park, Shelby Park, [against the city's wishes](https://substack.com/redirect/df885e08-b6cd-439c-9d7a-113d1fdfde23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

"We continue adding more razor wire border barrier," Gov. **Greg Abbott** [wrote on X](https://substack.com/redirect/97b6d46a-7f45-4af9-99b9-ee3acc04dd6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about the appellate court's ruling Wednesday evening.

A spokesperson for the U.S. Department of Homeland Security did not immediately respond to a request for comment." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/1990d4f8-4068-4c92-89f8-d8f9d6afc3fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Feds can't destroy razor wire Texas installed near Eagle Pass, appeals court rules, " Texas Tribune's Alejandro Serrano andJoshua Fechter -- "A federal appeals court on Wednesday stopped the federal government from destroying a fence of razor wire that Texas installed along the U.S.-Mexico border near Eagle Pass to deter migrants from entering the country illegally. The ruling, criticized by activists, came hours before Mexico President Claudia Sheinbaum told President-elect Donald Trump that immigrants headed to the U.S. are being "taken care of" in her country. Texas had placed more than 29 miles of wire in the Eagle Pass area by last September when Attorney General Ken Paxton over Border Patrol agents' alleged illegal destruction of state property by cutting the wire. On Wednesday, the 5th Circuit Court of Appeals in New Orleans issued a 2-1 opinion that reversed a lower court's ruling and granted Texas a limited preliminary injunction against the federal government. "It was shocking to me that the federal government would go out of their way to cut razor wire to allow illegals to cross when we're just trying to protect our own land," Paxton said during a Wednesday evening appearance on Newsmax. "This wasn't their land. This was our land, our private property. It had nothing due to the federal government. So this is a good win for Texas, a good win for the country, that this court recognized our ability to protect our land." The legal dispute had not stopped Texas from , where the state earlier this year took over a municipal park, Shelby Park, . "We continue adding more razor wire border barrier," Gov. Greg Abbott about the appellate court's ruling Wednesday evening. A spokesperson for the U.S. Department of Homeland Security did not immediately respond to a request for comment." * **TOP NEWS**

"**Feds can't destroy razor wire Texas installed near Eagle Pass, appeals court rules,** " Texas Tribune's **Alejandro Serrano** and**Joshua Fechter** -- "A federal appeals court on Wednesday stopped the federal government from destroying a fence of razor wire that Texas installed along the U.S.-Mexico border near Eagle Pass to deter migrants from entering the country illegally.

The ruling, criticized by activists, came hours before Mexico President **Claudia Sheinbaum** told President-elect **Donald Trump** that immigrants headed to the U.S. are being "taken care of" in her country.

Texas had placed more than 29 miles of wire in the Eagle Pass area by last September when Attorney General **Ken Paxton**[sued the Biden administration](https://substack.com/redirect/c04c677c-bd11-4da6-90b6-6ae86f359476?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over Border Patrol agents' alleged illegal destruction of state property by cutting the wire.

On Wednesday, the 5th Circuit Court of Appeals in New Orleans issued a 2-1 opinion that reversed a lower court's ruling and granted Texas a limited preliminary injunction against the federal government.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/caa0074c-5426-4a63-a636-ac3cdc4550a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"It was shocking to me that the federal government would go out of their way to cut razor wire to allow illegals to cross when we're just trying to protect our own land," Paxton said during a Wednesday evening appearance on Newsmax. "This wasn't their land. This was our land, our private property. It had nothing due to the federal government. So this is a good win for Texas, a good win for the country, that this court recognized our ability to protect our land."

The legal dispute had not stopped Texas from [installing such razor wire in Eagle Pass](https://substack.com/redirect/1355c354-6ce7-45ee-b24c-d6a16c2da4d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), where the state earlier this year took over a municipal park, Shelby Park, [against the city's wishes](https://substack.com/redirect/527f28b4-8b46-4c86-9f0c-a9bb54f91283?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

"We continue adding more razor wire border barrier," Gov. **Greg Abbott** [wrote on X](https://substack.com/redirect/7f46facb-e13b-4a80-8d17-205596a3df1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about the appellate court's ruling Wednesday evening.

A spokesperson for the U.S. Department of Homeland Security did not immediately respond to a request for comment." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/f50d66ca-e3d9-4582-b950-0459a5d92db8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

So this is a good win for Texas, a good win for the country, that this court recognized our ability to protect our land." The legal dispute had not stopped Texas from , where the state earlier this year took over a municipal park, Shelby Park, . "We continue adding more razor wire border barrier," Gov. Greg Abbott about the appellate court's ruling Wednesday evening. A spokesperson for the U.S. Department of Homeland Security did not immediately respond to a request for comment." Peter,

You would not believe the inappropriate books Scholastic pushes on kids at innocent book fairs, from highly sexualized content to confusing stories about gender transitioning to books promoting self-harm.

**I 've documented some of the books for you below so you can find them yourself if you don't believe me.**

Each of these contains storylines aimed at making children question their identity, consider dealing with their feelings through self-harm, or accept gender confusion as a normal part of growing up.

Escape from St. Hell: My Trans Teen Life Levels Up (for Ages 14 & up) The story of a teen coming into her own as a "trans man." Here is the single most impactful thing you can do to help disrupt Scholastic 's market dominance on school book fairs: Support SkyTree Book Fairs. Our mission is to nurture childhood innocence through book fairs that allow children's imaginations to soar with stories that are rooted in truth. Our book fairs provide only wholesome, age-appropriate content to kids. You can help us impact over 150,000 families through SkyTree Book Fairs. Peter, it's been one year since we set out to create a wholesome alternative book fair experience for both private and public schools. And in just 12 months, SkyTree has... Hosted over 280 book fairs in 47 states Reviewed and added 300+ titles to our book fair collection Impacted over 86,000 students in 2024 When schools choose SkyTree Book Fairs** , every book we send to schools is carefully vetted by our team to ensure it does not include sexually explicit content, storylines about gender confusion, or other harmful political and psychological themes that kids are not equipped to handle. Here are some of our books: . Scholastic is neglecting your values to push their agenda forward while offering books and promotions at an affordable price. It makes it nearly impossible to compete with them. As a non-profit, we are committed to providing book fairs to schools free of charge so that every school has the opportunity to enrich their students with uplifting content that points them toward eternal truths. This means we rely on your support to continue making reading a wholesome adventure again. We look forward to counting you among the SkyTree Family! Thank you in advance for your support, SkyTree Book Fairs SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023. |

name: =?utf-8?b?UGF1bGEgQ29sbGlucyBmcm9tIFBhdWxh4oCZcyBTdWJzdGFjaw==?=
subject: We are No Longer the People You Can Just Fly Over
body:
The Democrats in urban centers need rural voters if they ever hope to win again.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..pvxicc-NkuuhCSIduqYaKrDYT25vozjtwju4bqGqfZQ?) for more
---
NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race
* * *
# [We are No Longer the People You Can Just Fly Over](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=152454367&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNDU0MzY3LCJpYXQiOjE3MzMxNTkyMzIsImV4cCI6MTczNTc1MTIzMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.BCsjEsc9kF4lpU6Kd0jwi4ORySmX34YzlZDCN4zuVxU)
### The Democrats in urban centers need rural voters if they ever hope to win again.
| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
| Dec 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=152454367&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNDU0MzY3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMzE1OTIzMiwiZXhwIjoxNzM1NzUxMjMyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjYxODI2MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.XY_brrmPickIqxVbioNucT8M77V7Lqznz0672V5in48&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=152454367&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNDU0MzY3LCJpYXQiOjE3MzMxNTkyMzIsImV4cCI6MTczNTc1MTIzMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.BCsjEsc9kF4lpU6Kd0jwi4ORySmX34YzlZDCN4zuVxU&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=152454367&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNDU0MzY3LCJpYXQiOjE3MzMxNTkyMzIsImV4cCI6MTczNTc1MTIzMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.BCsjEsc9kF4lpU6Kd0jwi4ORySmX34YzlZDCN4zuVxU)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcGF1bGFueTIxL3Avd2UtYXJlLW5vLWxvbmdlci10aGUtcGVvcGxlLXlvdS1jYW4_.bCtdzrtw0GJZxGNoZ_IojGYpwWq2tWI-ymw1rg9mvoY?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/paulany21/p/we-are-no-longer-the-people-you-can?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Over the weekend, someone on Facebook commented that rural voters are stuck in a Rockwell painting from 1953.
I asked the author of the comment when the last time was that they had visited a rural county. They replied that they hadn't.
Obviously. I was glad they at least admitted it.
I talked about how "rural voters" are not a monolith. Contrary to popular belief, most people in rural counties do not work on farms. The biggest employers in rural counties are municipalities and school districts, followed closely by mid-sized businesses that employ clerical and administrative staff.
But there are other, varied career paths that rural voters take. There are several crypto farming operations in my rural Congressional district. Well - I suppose that's farming, but of a different sort.
Most people in my district, in concept, are very interested in finding alternative sources of energy, though they are cautious about the environmental impact some things like wind turbines and solar panels have on the area immediately surrounding the project.
In my Congressional district there is a same-sex married couple that runs an amazing recycling processing center. They gave me quite an education on the lag in state reimbursement on cans, and the impact that has had on the recycling industry as a whole, which impacts their ability to hire, and impacts their ability to operate their business which, by its nature, is about sustainability. They also talked about how their industry dramatically changed when China abruptly refused to accept plastics from other countries. There is nothing about these voters that is stuck in 1953 in a Rockwell painting. In terms of demographics and political outlook, I'm sure they could out-Brooklyn the most Brooklyn-esque voter you could find in 2024 and beyond.
There are people who moved to a rural area in order to live a more intentional life. They wanted time with their kids, and the ability to touch grass on a daily basis. I think most parents, whether urban or rural, can relate. Instead of finding equilibrium in a yoga class, these voters found it in a less-populated county in upstate New York. But if you miss your yoga class, there are several in rural towns and villages where you can drop in.
There are social workers and educators. There are drug abuse counselors. There are health care providers. There are accountants and lawyers and financial planners and insurance professionals, restaurant owners, and professional athletes.
There are small business owners who sell craft beer and run AirBnB units for added income. There are remote workers employed by larger companies sprawled across several continents. There are artists and writers and musicians. There are documentary film makers.
Oh yeah. And there are farmers. But even in that group, there are sub-categories. The family farmer has very different needs from the person who is working on a large agriculture venture.
To be honest, I have met more people in Greenwich Village who seem to be stuck in 1953 than I have met in my upstate rural Congressional District. Honestly - weren't they talking about rent, rodents, and hourly pay rates in 1953? It's 2024. Same discussions.
And the Rockwell painting? Tell that to the guy I met in Potsdam who does murals. No, don't. It's frankly kind of insulting.
While the Democrats need to take some time to listen to the voters who voted for Trump, they also need to take the time to listen to the dis-enchanted Democrats who live in rural counties. This is not optional: we really need to invest time, talent, and treasure into our nation's rural counties if we ever plan to turn any of the red areas on this map blue.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/752ee8b5-d58e-438f-b196-0a0f9c8d4b43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Fact check this map at https://www.snopes.com/fact-check/map-trump-red-blue-counties-2024/
Jess Piper, a Missouri Democrat, nailed it this weekend on Substack [when she talked about how Dems could change election results](https://open.substack.com/pub/jesspiper/p/rural-america-is-untapped-political?r=3g6fcu&utm_campaign=post&utm_medium=web) with only a tiny financial investment. She quoted a University of New Hampshire research project that showed that 3 percent plus or minus in rural areas throughout the country would swing the vote.
We now know that Trump did not win by a landslide, and he does not have a so-called mandate. "In fact, he prevailed with one of the smallest margins of victory in the popular vote since the 19th century and generated little of the coattails of a true landslide." [(Peter Baker, NYTimes, November 22, 2024)](https://substack.com/redirect/c2ac7272-e8df-4034-b60d-00b1e92715d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Did ya catch that figure Jess Piper quoted? 3%.
I used to think that this hop-skip over the rural districts was just a New York problem. Not true. According to Michigan Democrat[ Mark Yonkman, writing on November 18, 2024 in Post Industrial](https://substack.com/redirect/a2f6b639-af80-400d-a040-91713c64e326?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> "The Democratic lieutenant from Team Urban in Detroit, bluntly told the party chairs and other operatives that the Democratic Party would not spend any money in a county that they could not win. Meaning all of us. Even for signs. Counties needed to pay for signs themselves. Our county had just $600 in their bank account. Oh, and even though you were using your own local funds, you had to have those signs made in Flint or Detroit. Another person said, "But you won't even answer our phone calls and emails." She replied, "We don't have the staff for that." There are so many things wrong with that statement. That is when the shouting began.
> The Democratic Party explicitly stated they did not want rural feedback.
> In later sessions, various people were immediately shut down when they tried to offer suggestions or a different perspective on Democratic initiatives. Party leaders clearly stated that they were not seeking input from the rural counties. Party leaders were there to tell the county chairs what the party platform was and how to sell it to voters."
What am I asking for when I'm asking for the Democrats to re-think their strategy for rural America? Am I asking for millions of dollars?
Well - no. I'm actually not.
We could start with the thousands and thousands of phone bank volunteers that the Democrats amassed to call places like Philadelphia. We could also benefit from Democratic committees working with PACs to help shoulder some of the mail and media costs.
Yonkman described:
> In the two weeks leading up to the election, I received phone calls, texts, emails, and flyers in the mail from the Republican Party and Trump every day. Not asking for money but asking me to vote for them. I asked a lot of people if they had the same experience, and this held true throughout rural Michigan. Even I began to smile every time Trump called me.
> They had to data mine this information. I have two phone numbers, and they had both of them. I received personal phone calls from the Trump campaign wondering why I had not returned my absentee ballot. I was called personally several times to say that Trump would soon be on the line and could I please hold. One time, I hung up on Trump when Elissa Slotkin's campaign manager called. The Trump campaign immediately called me back, thinking that they had lost the connection. Now, that is outreach.
So - no, I'm really not asking for millions. Just a dedicated phone banking staff to call and a few email messages sent by committees to help line up PAC support to defray the costs of postage and digital media.
We have a Special Election coming up in New York. I am running a hyper-local ground game, focused on kitchen table issues. I want to talk to voters about how the Democrats can put food on the table, gas in the car, and a roof over their heads.
Skeptical? Well, we did it before, during the pandemic. (Remember the Covid stimulus payments that helped people put food on the table, gas in the car, and keep a roof over their heads?) With sweeping, creative tax reform (that includes raising the corporate tax rate), we could have conversations about meeting basic living needs, at least on a temporary basis until we can get wages raised. And of course -- that next part about closing the gap between corporate profits and employee wages has got to be addressed.
We need to talk about healthcare. Notice I didn't say insurance. That's important too - Medicare for all. But we have an urgent need to talk about how to get more healthcare providers to many of the areas in the district. Many people drive 3 hours to get to a primary care appointment. I'm not exaggerating.
There are other urgent needs. What can we do to address the mental health and addiction crisis? We need to talk about schools and jobs and housing; how to pivot to alternative fuels; and the environment, both in our towns and villages, but really throughout our planet.
Could we fathom a sort of New Deal for Rural America? We can't get there unless we can at least imagine it.
A race in 2025 in the Bronx would have exactly the same list of things we need to talk about: healthcare, jobs, schools, housing, and the environment. It's also the same whether I'm talking to voters in sparsely-populated Hamilton County, or in suburban sections of Glens Falls, in Warren County.
Please push back when you hear people talking disparagingly about rural voters. And to turn the tables on you, failure to do so is politicking against your own best interests (as people often accuse rural voters of voting against their own best interests).
See map, above. We are no longer the people you can just fly over when going from JFK to Chicago. The Democrats in urban centers _need_ rural voters if they ever hope to win again.
Focus on the similarities, rather than the differences. Whether from midtown Manhattan or the outskirts of Malone, voters have substantially the same dreams for themselves and for their loved ones as city dwellers. Most people - urban or rural - are eager to work tirelessly for the benefit of their families, their communities, and their country. They are not, however, happy with the lack of engagement from the party that has now ignored them for more than a decade.
Come visit NY-21 and its 15 rural counties. Or go visit any rural area. You may be pleasantly surprised at how at home you feel.
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _

name: Urgent Reminder (VPP)
subject: Sign now: Release the Jack Smith Report! >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This may be our last chance
| **Friend, you’re the only Democrat in your area who hasn’t signed our petition to release the Jack Smith report!**

Donald Trump is hell-bent on burying and DESTROYING all of Jack Smith’s incredible evidence, and we’re running out of time to release it!

[**Your grassroots support makes all the difference: Add your name to release the Jack Smith report NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/release-smith-report/?source=VPP_20241202_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=18120%2E878179%2EwJqxCO) | [YOUR SIGNATURE MISSING: SIGN IN THE NEXT 5 MINUTES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/release-smith-report/?source=VPP_20241202_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=18120%2E878179%2EwJqxCO)
---
Don’t let time run out,

_The Voter Protection Project_

**-BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE-**
**__BREAKING:__**
**LEGAL ANALYST: “If the [Jack Smith] report is not issued now, I have to believe the Trump administration will _bury_ and probably _destroy_ all of that evidence.”**

Dear Friend,

I campaigned in dozens of districts to help elect Conservatives. I was constantly reminded that the best ideas come from the people, not from Washington insiders.

**_[That's why I just launched my FIRST SURVEY since the election and I'm turning to you for guidance.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e76cce6c41e548788a8a509f022058dc&_e=OPf5cnpwBmkm4U_1ektXzYWfRChdIWo1s6DOwjM1qMkQEqkJdTXiq3VtnjUbh2eeY34I1INKC9N3vg5Tm4WjilRnX08CBjgHJCcsQJrDamkXLwNOhpdjsjPkQb8usB37wOjsCQKJLZiW35890CWZ7CkEn66SOhBWzc46eB6z3lIh2krLDj-FhmA8FsDmRu-XEWdtFnp86MnUu0ZKNAKPh-qaPuPD0O-gBB25Qk9b49mnkYkye1OpfGWL0_IbT8Krqw-CDB-7490mNRSXdi8L1iCjIhYKEkjnBqY_LMc4AtHokQsu3E7WupODYqsNAgXBorYaCkL-A68C57uJUHeJZxxIXw0MmonKkxwck2YFJeA4Ggug_9YL8ltM6b6xwPjcJhnk6Eja5JMS2hFHLDPOj-N192krIoziR3EXDGciF0AtXK49R4c4sXAK2qPEFV0a "That's why I just launched my FIRST SURVEY since the election and I'm turning to you for guidance. ")_**

I want to know what's on your mind and what you think we should do first next year.

Your input will be invaluable.

Will you take a moment to fill out my new Majority Leader Survey?

_I 'll be on the lookout for your response using this secure link: _
| | [BEGIN MY SURVEY -> ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e76cce6c41e548788a8a509f022058dc&_e=OPf5cnpwBmkm4U_1ektXzYWfRChdIWo1s6DOwjM1qMkQEqkJdTXiq3VtnjUbh2eeY34I1INKC9N3vg5Tm4WjilRnX08CBjgHJCcsQJrDamkXLwNOhpdjsjPkQb8usB37wOjsCQKJLZiW35890CWZ7CkEn66SOhBWzc46eB6z3lIh2krLDj-FhmA8FsDmRu-XEWdtFnp86MnUu0ZKNAKPh-qaPuPD0O-gBB25Qk9b49mnkYkye1OpfGWL0_IbT8Krqw-CDB-7490mNRSXdi8L1iCjIhYKEkjnBqY_LMc4AtEWe3u5hUW55zWmQ1h0NPsP7pC0twwwfhB39gsX3WPX2dmQW8AuOLHa96iBajLNZq-HYzcuyh6NtGmVpw71S9iBigycnK5kRKIQ5KRmSFQWGpQeqwi9tHHGFgv2Qd5-v5IWerpwRjgFbZeeqD0ldGcO "BEGIN MY SURVEY → ")
---

Thanks for all you do,
_- Steve _

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

| |

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

clean_body: I want to know what's on your mind and what you think we should do first next year. | | | | | | "Majority Leader Steve Scalise" Dear Friend, I campaigned in dozens of districts to help elect Conservatives. I was constantly reminded that the best ideas come from the people, not from Washington insiders. "That's why I just launched my FIRST SURVEY since the election and I'm turning to you for guidance. " I want to know what's on your mind and what you think we should do first next year. Your input will be invaluable. Will you take a moment to fill out my new Majority Leader Survey? I 'll be on the lookout for your response using this secure link: | | "BEGIN MY SURVEY → " Thanks for all you do, - Steve STEVE SCALISE House Majority Leader | | | "Majority Leader Survey" A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise: I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link."** | | | "RESPOND NOW →" Thank you, Steve Scalise House Majority Leader | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. name: Trump Administration Alert [via NRSC]
subject: The next four years are going to be better than we could have ever imagined
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Here’s why >>

Friend,

If you had any doubts about President Trump's selection for the next Attorney General of the United States, think again.

**[Here's what nominee Pam Bondi had to say about the weaponization of government these last four years under the Biden-Harris Administration:](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1795ce3cbfc0491ebe8928b5beefa09a&_e=65LVeKGNHjfvM5ozGBFzKApIUPDnBryQRjukvCiqi_ktohG4TfEqezE761mYy5AJeYpMPA-zEvyuc4KDYRix7aW-hoqr3_dDyO9eJUGT6IhdRhSBU2dznftkYhY-jhUsh61ZNJicspI_1px5l-matTDKBa-WxH8bU71jARFYo_sfKI85k_3byUObpvyd7DN9o1oOgrDJNl1n288ILxLswzSGMVgqQOYUFxgKbeG05QGyMqLtXJ0-a_D0qpEQGzAvT_vzWM1NIt5WiN-z84Ue_wfEfGtVnasvJSMcXrm3cF_fqzT6DLGFBgRyRC3CxJJS3_jxM3oOcvR1_wS9TwsgN211YY7P_GliYGFL73mPr7orbvTJ9ZT0EJzVPGRZOrgPy50zh7_8CsPSjs3DJxB2TefBxFh8_d_2DtYL7nOPHFIChs7XAREDNs24ZnDXx2fRQlRgfTon7KFvGlfa6roMyv4fEA45POo-ezB_R2dYPJMz3Qr6fFNgzvFDgWbwQXrO)**

**["When Republicans take back the White House... you know what's going to happen? The Department of Justice, the prosecutors will be prosecuted -- the bad ones -- the investigators will be investigated..."](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1795ce3cbfc0491ebe8928b5beefa09a&_e=65LVeKGNHjfvM5ozGBFzKApIUPDnBryQRjukvCiqi_ktohG4TfEqezE761mYy5AJeYpMPA-zEvyuc4KDYRix7aW-hoqr3_dDyO9eJUGT6IhdRhSBU2dznftkYhY-jhUsh61ZNJicspI_1px5l-matTDKBa-WxH8bU71jARFYo_sfKI85k_3byUObpvyd7DN9o1oOgrDJNl1n288ILxLswzSGMVgqQOYUFxgKbeG05QGyMqLtXJ0-a_D0qpEQGzAvT_vzWM1NIt5WiN-z84Ue_wfEfGtVnasvJSMcXrm3cF_fqzT6DLGFBgRyRC3CxJJS3_jxM3oOcvR1_wS9TwsgN-T23ui_pzNxEuuJcm0xGkuXSseSpzo25OugDJjDOmW-qcFf5mobtWjE8mSKj6sraihHeduqSZhGQ-lWtfDhZVi8Vmbjs2bTNCvhS9qUO4nep1K4k0uKu7XHHO5QW7aF-cgF5UwbbwrnrJ8j_eGlK6Ga1f68umElA8YPGEXYbOSg)**

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1795ce3cbfc0491ebe8928b5beefa09a&_e=65LVeKGNHjfvM5ozGBFzKApIUPDnBryQRjukvCiqi_ktohG4TfEqezE761mYy5AJeYpMPA-zEvyuc4KDYRix7aW-hoqr3_dDyO9eJUGT6IhdRhSBU2dznftkYhY-jhUsh61ZNJicspI_1px5l-matTDKBa-WxH8bU71jARFYo_sfKI85k_3byUObpvyd7DN9o1oOgrDJNl1n288ILxLswzSGMVgqQOYUFxgKbeG05QGyMqLtXJ0-a_D0qpEQGzAvT_vzWM1NIt5WiN-z84Ue_wfEfGtVnasvJSMcXrm3cF_fqzT6DLGFBgRyRC3CxJJS3_jxM3oOcvR1_wS9TwsgNxMVv1-6HPJEfMDMsr32srCTpzorZn0jRBqqj40-77GEUgoMYwBDz5qI2iMAPhWQeG8B-vjGWEDb_iiu6v4ZdLlGwoLKFbXb5IT2dWTzn-HIK1DefXjPvaXcwSrf1L4XUcQZWaFfXomxYZqqxeedFFVB4FaDgROCPiHodENyEAHu)

We think Pam Bondi is going to be an EXCELLENT Attorney General, along with the rest of President Trump's cabinet members. **[Do you agree with us, Friend?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1795ce3cbfc0491ebe8928b5beefa09a&_e=65LVeKGNHjfvM5ozGBFzKApIUPDnBryQRjukvCiqi_ktohG4TfEqezE761mYy5AJeYpMPA-zEvyuc4KDYRix7aW-hoqr3_dDyO9eJUGT6IhdRhSBU2dznftkYhY-jhUsh61ZNJicspI_1px5l-matTDKBa-WxH8bU71jARFYo_sfKI85k_3byUObpvyd7DN9o1oOgrDJNl1n288ILxLswzSGMVgqQOYUFxgKbeG05QGyMqLtXJ0-a_D0qpEQGzAvT_vzWM1NIt5WiN-z84Ue_wfEfGtVnasvJSMcXrm3cF_fqzT6DLGFBgRyRC3CxJJS3_jxM3oOcvR1_wS9TwsgN2HoPZcs3c_pffO3uREf3Y0xbMYn_Tt_KQLbyoQi66cdwV9kj-4LYizn5V4oJ07r3kE0ASBCN335a2crqUsuuMv92pyhz7iEJIaBL57c5Tt7KwXCJ8u87y3pgC6SLSJuyxnJFaij3YXKEhK9BTgkd0q8u3syV4D1FDAwhXENgPgj)** Now is your chance to make your voice heard.

---
From Steel to Skyline. Featuring Allentown's First Latino Mayor, Matt Tuerk
The Latino Vote Podcast Episode 66
| Chuck explores the fascinating transformation of Allentown, Pennsylvania, with its dynamic mayor, Matt Tuerk. Once a steel town, Allentown has evolved into a vibrant, Latino-majority city at the crossroads of change. **Mayor Tuerk, the city's first Latino Mayor** , shares his journey from East Stroudsburg to Allentown's leadership, discussing his Cuban roots, the city's growing diversity, and the shifting industries that shape its economy.
---
|
---

name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: Pennsylvania Forward Party December Newsletter
body:
Wrapping up a huge 2024

|
#
## Local Time: 2025
Thank you for making 2024 our biggest year yet! Tens of thousands of Pennsylvanians voted for a Forwardist this year. It was also our hardest year yet due to the entire political world revolving around the Presidential election and Pennsylvania in particular. Many people didn't want to hear the message we were putting out, but that may be very different now. This election year should help convince you that we need something new in our politics and people getting involved is the only way we're going to get it. We'll get another chance at our goal of PA minor party recognition in 2026. In 2025, our focus returns to the races that the rest of the political world ignores. There are races for mayor, county commissioner, school board, judges of elections and more that will be uncontested or left completely unfilled. Please use this link to our friends at The Good Party to see just some of the races near you. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=bOIh4UEYYsyl_IjgdMbLEqKo2Oo-qZX72cvO7VWZULc&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_dec_newsletter&n=1 "The Good Party Office Finder") [The Good Party Office Finder](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=bOIh4UEYYsyl_IjgdMbLEqKo2Oo-qZX72cvO7VWZULc&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_dec_newsletter&n=1)
---
If you have any interest in you or someone you know running for one of these offices or your local judge of elections race, we can help get you started.
We're going to be recruiting, vetting, supporting, and promoting these candidates throughout 2025. You'll hear us asking you to get involved a lot and there's a good reason for that. The changes we need aren't going to come from a few powerful people making decisions in DC, or from billionaires with the promise of A.I. computing, they're going to come from all of us getting involved in our neighborhoods.
* * *
### Our November Call Recap
Every Newsletter comes with the link to the previous month's call, but I really hope you'll check this one out if you missed it. We had a lot of new people tuning in so we took the opportunity to give an overview of who we are and what we're doing. Very much worth a listen if you haven't been following us too closely.
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEouH4SjeZmYtvTWulgNFAfZWbwNLjI2OgEPmOvU5vPRV&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_dec_newsletter&n=2)
* * *
### Support our 2025 Efforts
Let's talk about money for a moment. Campaigns cost money, lawyers and advisors cost money, printed materials, and events cost money. Even the network systems we use to host our website, organize volunteers and send this email cost money. It's not the same sums that get spent on National political campaigns, we're not talking millions, but the PA Forward Party does spend thousands to do what we do, and we'd like to be able to do more.
Right now, we have a small number of people that are donating monthly or covering individual expenses we incur as a party, but we need to expand that base of financial support. The more recurring donations we can count on, the more we can plan to support our candidates in November. We can plan bigger and better events without the people planning them taking on personal financial risk. Any amount that you can contribute us is a huge help and we thank you for joining us to fund something new in PA.
**With PA Forward Party, every donor is a Mega-donor!**
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgEQ8LiKSs_WIlu6d10HpikhG&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_dec_newsletter&n=3 "Become a Mega-donor") [Become a Mega-donor](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgEQ8LiKSs_WIlu6d10HpikhG&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_dec_newsletter&n=3)
---
[
](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=OO1xB82Dwc0SwW5xslNAt5demYUjnvMsNObg_2SsnH4C04dQQgB9BZ02TA7y9H7t-4vbxkv79HHUmZ6qj3hodUR-7alEp57O08vr8cfcTeFUloFbffPqlZP8qsSt5ozRpo-ljG0b_nmp5HGri8eilg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_dec_newsletter&n=4)
Join us December 18th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. You'll have things you want to talk about, We will**too!**
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgERVNyuzV5ZB37lp0k_9LCD4c4dp9LvodX0R2gcnEudc7A&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_dec_newsletter&n=5)
* * *
### East and West December Meetups
We love to meet in person and we'll be doing it more this year. Join us to celebrate 2024 at these events and please let us know if you're interested in hosting an event in your area, **especially toward the middle of the state where we are focused on growing our presence this year.**
| [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u8ausHb8gHep-OVLSbBg7yplH_EqrHMh-XgOm4bdBlaoKYQ8CFGcFxOYymy4HP7_lA&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_dec_newsletter&n=6 "Pittsburgh Meetup 12/5") [Pittsburgh Meetup 12/5](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u8ausHb8gHep-OVLSbBg7yplH_EqrHMh-XgOm4bdBlaoKYQ8CFGcFxOYymy4HP7_lA&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_dec_newsletter&n=6)
---
| [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u9pL5MpT6VqtFQJKvKaK-PvfK6d0ZZlI3tYdA7YWXJ2SeLfwb0LGLcUeYOrP0oMhEg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_dec_newsletter&n=7 "Philadelphia Meetup 12/10") [Philadelphia Meetup 12/10](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u9pL5MpT6VqtFQJKvKaK-PvfK6d0ZZlI3tYdA7YWXJ2SeLfwb0LGLcUeYOrP0oMhEg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_dec_newsletter&n=7)

clean_body: Wrapping up a huge 2024 | Local Time: 2025 Thank you for making 2024 our biggest year yet! Tens of thousands of Pennsylvanians voted for a Forwardist this year. It was also our hardest year yet due to the entire political world revolving around the Presidential election and Pennsylvania in particular. Many people didn't want to hear the message we were putting out, but that may be very different now. This election year should help convince you that we need something new in our politics and people getting involved is the only way we're going to get it. We'll get another chance at our goal of PA minor party recognition in 2026. In 2025, our focus returns to the races that the rest of the political world ignores. There are races for mayor, county commissioner, school board, judges of elections and more that will be uncontested or left completely unfilled. Please use this link to our friends at The Good Party to see just some of the races near you. | "The Good Party Office Finder" If you have any interest in you or someone you know running for one of these offices or your local judge of elections race, we can help get you started. We're going to be recruiting, vetting, supporting, and promoting these candidates throughout 2025. You'll hear us asking you to get involved a lot and there's a good reason for that. The changes we need aren't going to come from a few powerful people making decisions in DC, or from billionaires with the promise of A.I. computing, they're going to come from all of us getting involved in our neighborhoods. Our November Call Recap Every Newsletter comes with the link to the previous month's call, but I really hope you'll check this one out if you missed it. We had a lot of new people tuning in so we took the opportunity to give an overview of who we are and what we're doing. Very much worth a listen if you haven't been following us too closely. Support our 2025 Efforts Let's talk about money for a moment. Campaigns cost money, lawyers and advisors cost money, printed materials, and events cost money. Even the network systems we use to host our website, organize volunteers and send this email cost money. It's not the same sums that get spent on National political campaigns, we're not talking millions, but the PA Forward Party does spend thousands to do what we do, and we'd like to be able to do more. Right now, we have a small number of people that are donating monthly or covering individual expenses we incur as a party, but we need to expand that base of financial support. The more recurring donations we can count on, the more we can plan to support our candidates in November. We can plan bigger and better events without the people planning them taking on personal financial risk. Any amount that you can contribute us is a huge help and we thank you for joining us to fund something new in PA. With PA Forward Party, every donor is a Mega-donor! "Become a Mega-donor" Join us December 18th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. You'll have things you want to talk about, We willtoo! East and West December Meetups We love to meet in person and we'll be doing it more this year. Join us to celebrate 2024 at these events and please let us know if you're interested in hosting an event in your area, especially toward the middle of the state where we are focused on growing our presence this year. | "Pittsburgh Meetup 12/5" | "Philadelphia Meetup 12/10" Click below to read the articles****** Help support these events from our partner organizations. Pennsylvania Forward Party -=-=- Forward Party · 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States
