name: Jessica Hamilton, Evergreen
subject: Fwd: BIG climate news: A chance to Trump-proof our wins
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Bumping up this big climate announcement
| | |
---
| Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw Beth's note and the big news.

A generous donor has stepped forward to [**triple all gifts**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3091231/87SdQ4wZ) to enact our blueprint for how Biden and climate allies in the states can use every available moment before inauguration to Trump-proof our hard-earned climate wins.

For a small team like ours, **this chance to triple our funds during the last 50 days of our all-out sprint for the climate is HUGE.** Check out Beth's note below to learn more, and if you can—[**have your gift tripled today!**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3091232/87SdQ4wZ)

– Jessica, Evergreen Action

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Beth Poole, Evergreen Action
Date: Mon, Dec 2, 2024
Subject: BIG climate news: A chance to Trump-proof our wins |
| [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3091233/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Friend,

As you may know, right now Evergreen Action is leading an **all-out sprint to Trump-proof climate wins** we've worked so hard to achieve over the last four years.

We have to work fast and make the most of every dollar and hour. But I'm thrilled to share that, **in order to help us put everything we've got into the last 50 days of this sprint,**[**a generous donor is now offering to triple all donations to Evergreen Action from now through #GivingTuesday.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3091234/87SdQ4wZ)

What can we possibly do to stop Trump now, after such a bruising election? It might surprise you, but **there is actually a LOT we can save. Yes, even and _especially_ now.** From getting President Biden to deny fossil fuel project permits to quickly finalizing pending state climate regulations, we have drawn up a blueprint of bold, achievable actions that will, by design, be incredibly hard for Trump and his clown-car of climate change deniers to undo.

The truth is, we'll never have the unlimited budgets of the fossil-fuel giants salivating over Trump's win. But here at Evergreen Action, we don't need them to make a huge difference. Our team of policy experts and seasoned campaigners can make every cent of our budget count in a big way for the climate through strategic policy victories. [**So if you want to make it as hard as possible for Trump to tank our climate wins in 2025 and beyond, this is the time. Please have your gift tripled right now.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3091235/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[GIVE TODAY](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3091236/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| [**Your tripled gift**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3091237/87SdQ4wZ) will help us enact our three-pronged strategy to Trump-proof the wins we urgently need to preserve to head off the most damaging of climate scenarios. Here's our plan:

1. **Step 1: Halt pending fossil fuel projects before inauguration day.** Our first target is six super-polluting liquefied natural gas projects that Biden has the power to stop right now.
2. **Step 2: Speed through approvals for groundbreaking state climate project** s and make sure that governors, communities, and allies are prepared for states to lead the charge on climate in the coming presidency.
3. **Step 3: Build cross-movement power and solidarity.** Whether it is supporting litigation in state and federal court, holding corporations accountable, or working with champions in Congress to defend the Inflation Reduction Act, we are working to prepare our allies with smart strategy and strong coalitions now.

|
---
| Here at Evergreen, we know smart climate policy is policy that _sticks._ The blueprint is there. Now we need to get loud to make it happen while we have the chance.

Let's get it done together. [**Have your gift to protect the climate tripled today.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3091238/87SdQ4wZ)

In solidarity, |
---
| | |
---
### Beth Poole
Senior Fundraising Director
Evergreen Action
---
---
---
---

---

Our team of policy experts and seasoned campaigners can make every cent of our budget count in a big way for the climate through strategic policy victories. | | will help us enact our three-pronged strategy to Trump-proof the wins we urgently need to preserve to head off the most damaging of climate scenarios. Here's our plan: 1. Step 1: Halt pending fossil fuel projects before inauguration day. Our first target is six super-polluting liquefied natural gas projects that Biden has the power to stop right now. 2. Step 2: Speed through approvals for groundbreaking state climate project s and make sure that governors, communities, and allies are prepared for states to lead the charge on climate in the coming presidency. 3. Step 3: Build cross-movement power and solidarity. Whether it is supporting litigation in state and federal court, holding corporations accountable, or working with champions in Congress to defend the Inflation Reduction Act, we are working to prepare our allies with smart strategy and strong coalitions now. | | Here at Evergreen, we know smart climate policy is policy that sticks. The blueprint is there. Now we need to get loud to make it happen while we have the chance. Let's get it done together. In solidarity, | | | | Beth Poole Senior Fundraising Director Evergreen Action | | | | | ---|---|---|--- 1250 Connecticut Ave NW, Suite 700, Washington DC 20036 | | content © 2024 Evergreen Action and paid for by Evergreen Action. All rights reserved.Contributions or gifts to Evergreen Action are not tax deductible.

body:

The House Majority is still hanging in the balance!

🚨 Democrats are currently leading in 11 of them – but every single vote needs to be counted to ensure we win!!!

body:
Please take our national census

We're still in shock with what you did, friend.

Thanks to your incredible support, President Trump ushered in the biggest Republican victory in history.

The old GOP is gone. In its place is a new America First party with a diverse coalition of patriots from every state in America.

That's why we at NRSC HQ are now issuing a BRAND NEW National Party Census that better reflects the historic shift in our Party's membership.

Since 2015, I have spent December sorting the hundreds of articles I save during the year into categories of developments that might impact the world in the medium term. It's my way of congealing the wide variety of topics I touch upon in my research into a manageable list of "global developments to watch over the next five years." Since 2012, I've prepared the list for my top clients and in 2015, began publicly posting my thinking onto LinkedIn and later onto Substack. (Link to all prior predictions here: _**[https://mansharamani.substack.com/t/predictions](https://substack.com/redirect/703c16b8-97dc-47fe-8922-fb9ff666b4fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_)
The goal of my efforts is explicitly _not to predict_ the future, but rather to help my audience _think through scenarios and possibilities of how the future might unfold_. Accuracy is not, and has never been, my objective. Usefulness is my goal. I want to help all of us think differently about possible future**s** so we can better appreciate (and embrace) uncertainty that is embedded in thinking about the future.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..fEbDp3f2JZIZCJby3yD3uG8dzoKTjPltYNWevxy62w4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152425783)
As I begin preparing for my 2025 predictions, **I 'm seeking input from you** regarding the topics you think might have a major impact on the world in the next five years. The following ten polls (expected to take less than 10 minutes) will reveal what you find interesting, intriguing, and worthy of further investigation... while sharing an early glimpse into topics that may appear in my piece next month. (After you've submitted your vote for a poll, you'll see its current results... I'd encourage you to revisit this post every few days to see how the numbers change!)
Thanks in advance for your help!
Best,
#### _Vikram_
* * *
##### _POLL #1: Geopolitics_

## About Vikram
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bd12be63-a76e-41d5-bc10-1f3cd56c0bcf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/42e97434-8c13-4c91-bffa-7ba976faa8c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/16932cd2-2590-4110-a13d-53e4f7ea65c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/312e909b-b32e-4de6-b408-99ce7df9bdeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

I'd love your input as I begin preparing my annual predictions | | | Dec 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Since 2015, I have spent December sorting the hundreds of articles I save during the year into categories of developments that might impact the world in the medium term. It's my way of congealing the wide variety of topics I touch upon in my research into a manageable list of "global developments to watch over the next five years." Since 2012, I've prepared the list for my top clients and in 2015, began publicly posting my thinking onto LinkedIn and later onto Substack. (Link to all prior predictions here: ) The goal of my efforts is explicitly not to predict the future, but rather to help my audience think through scenarios and possibilities of how the future might unfold. Accuracy is not, and has never been, my objective. Usefulness is my goal. I want to help all of us think differently about possible futures so we can better appreciate (and embrace) uncertainty that is embedded in thinking about the future. As I begin preparing for my 2025 predictions, I 'm seeking input from you regarding the topics you think might have a major impact on the world in the next five years. The following ten polls (expected to take less than 10 minutes) will reveal what you find interesting, intriguing, and worthy of further investigation... while sharing an early glimpse into topics that may appear in my piece next month. (After you've submitted your vote for a poll, you'll see its current results... I'd encourage you to revisit this post every few days to see how the numbers change!) Thanks in advance for your help! name: =?UTF-8?Q?Sarah=C2=A0DeValkenaere?=
subject: My husband is innocent
body:
One of Eric’s fellow detectives witnessed two vehicles speeding through the city streets – one was clearly chasing the other – and the police helicopter quickly got involved. A spotter in the helicopter was able to locate the suspect in a red pickup truck... still speeding down city streets.Dear Friend,

I wish I could sit down with you face to face instead of writing this e-mail.
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8ba2dcf2f4c74b449e03a9fd823ee19e&_e=A2o8dvXt61e81AvsElWGRkB_NNNzWZqi9e6oVuCViIeSmScklCNTnZw7B-5IrKuqi9wi0poDP90gVENKzU8aoo6TA1UBpaUcVCxY-NzJ5SH7rv6KZOBK7cVNKV6paCO56OdtO3R5axNr18SiRgoFqbpiBeHS3CgQp9og1PPrmSmm671g_VqiDuPR53-o_w49JUcf_vjYQzhNSnsRnNV_hbIkSkjtayh2ULwxhAXZ8O4806F6pVH7Ke5i-4q2tb3keayvd2N01dQrChYm3ST0OZ4WUeRLKacf2T_F7A3z6gSgtwbjnqGWCOmwpkRi5HTy-KcHJdDBsUsMgJN3VUBjUyo_rJ7KuHiA00zpnW2SSgqehXoqKFAKQraHaB2GtRMaObXa-OkdtO1-RN_6Ft6xew%3D%3D)
That's a picture of me and my husband, Eric, so you at least know what we look like.

Eric is a Detective with the Kansas City Police Department.

I wanted to send a picture of us with our three beautiful children - but in this current political climate, I don't feel safe sharing photos of our kids on the Internet.

When I tell you what happened, I think you'll understand. **[And I pray that you'll find it in your heart to help me save my husband.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8ba2dcf2f4c74b449e03a9fd823ee19e&_e=A2o8dvXt61e81AvsElWGRkB_NNNzWZqi9e6oVuCViIeSmScklCNTnZw7B-5IrKuqi9wi0poDP90gVENKzU8aoo6TA1UBpaUcVCxY-NzJ5SH7rv6KZOBK7cVNKV6paCO56OdtO3R5axNr18SiRgoFqbpiBeHS3CgQp9og1PPrmSmm671g_VqiDuPR53-o_w49JUcf_vjYQzhNSnsRnNV_hbIkSkjtayh2ULwxhAXZ8O7kPyVQLqqtvIuYTUMhkX9PzdTr3R6tK03fd0E0ZCbJDJKOqqF0TP0I2ayRaGwZvKASfLMkI1ZlWTvNUh1Yvid20gwWfkWl0riBMPaCeKLz7_yQkCc_4I73EJaZhDQtS8GBgtXG_PHznumVDRgTLmKnPRjxKtHUzPpQd1QiwHeOtw%3D%3D)**

You see, it all started in early December - a few weeks before Christmas.

One of Eric's fellow detectives witnessed two vehicles speeding through the city streets - one was clearly chasing the other - and the police helicopter quickly got involved. A spotter in the helicopter was able to locate the suspect in a red pickup truck... still speeding down city streets.

The driver, 26-year-old Cameron Lamb, was chasing his ex-girlfriend in a stolen truck - weaving across lanes and running through stoplights.

My husband and his partner responded to the call and caught up with the suspect as he attempted to back the stolen truck into a garage.

Both detectives got out of their police vehicles and approached the stolen truck while repeatedly ordering the suspect to STOP and SHOW HIS HANDS.

That's when it happened.

**As Eric 's partner approached the driver's side, the suspect reached into his waistband and pulled out a handgun - pointing it directly at the detective.**

**My husband 's police training kicked in.**

He fired four rounds in the direction of the suspect through the truck's front windshield. The truck continued traveling into the garage where it finally came to a stop.

When officers entered, they found the suspect deceased - his arm hanging out the open window with a .45 semi-automatic pistol on the ground below.

That night, when Eric returned home, I hugged him and burst into tears. I was so thankful he was safe - and hopeful we could move forward and put this episode behind us.

But it didn't end there.

Several months later, the local prosecutor _charged Eric with MANSLAUGHTER and Armed Criminal Action._

I was in shock.

Then late last year, my husband finally went to trial. The judge ruled against him - and Eric was sentenced to 6 years in prison.

Now you understand why I'm asking for your help.

My husband is an honest man of integrity who followed in his father's law enforcement footsteps. Eric himself is a decorated, 21-year veteran of the Kansas City Police Department.

He's a role model in our community - a Little League baseball coach, a tireless volunteer, and a loving husband and father.

My husband is a hero.

But it didn't matter to the prosecutor that the suspect recklessly swerved a stolen truck through city streets... that he was violent toward his ex-girlfriend and endangered the lives of her two children... that he pointed a stolen gun directly at a police officer.

For serving our community for over 20 years - and risking his life - my has been shipped to an out-of-state prison.

And since the Missouri Supreme Court recently declined to take up Eric's case, that's where he'll stay for the next six years unless he receives a pardon from the Governor of Missouri. He'll miss our wedding anniversaries, our children's birthdays, their graduations(?), and our home will be left without the father and husband we love.

Even if Eric's good name is eventually cleared, just thinking about the cost of his defense and now our efforts to get him pardoned is overwhelming...

... but thank God we got a call from Jason Johnson, President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF).

If you've ever heard of LELDF you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly accused police officers like Eric.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops - and their families - at their lowest moments.

And with the thought of trying to suddenly raise our three children alone - I was certainly at one of the lowest moments of my life.

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help provide Eric with the best possible legal defense, but now they're helping us launch a nationwide petition campaign urging Missouri Governor Mike Parson to pardon Eric.

But as a non-profit organization, they depend solely on generous gifts from folks like you to defend officers like Eric.

I truly believe God is using Jason and the LELDF to answer our prayers.

That's because my husband and I are not wealthy people. I'm a kindergarten teacher and Eric is a career cop.

So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone.

**Will you donate[$35 or any amount to LELDF today to help save my husband?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8ba2dcf2f4c74b449e03a9fd823ee19e&_e=A2o8dvXt61e81AvsElWGRkB_NNNzWZqi9e6oVuCViIeSmScklCNTnZw7B-5IrKuqi9wi0poDP90gVENKzU8aoo6TA1UBpaUcVCxY-NzJ5SH7rv6KZOBK7cVNKV6paCO56OdtO3R5axNr18SiRgoFqbpiBeHS3CgQp9og1PPrmSmm671g_VqiDuPR53-o_w49JUcf_vjYQzhNSnsRnNV_hbIkSkjtayh2ULwxhAXZ8O6YclfaBed2O3tyXWJDQpiTd0ADtjSQ4QwLcfsBZYBYZ-hEpaDg3amMCjriT2Q9CYB4Ok080iLXH0cw4SZlFnn61kkE4Zy5yT2SKYvhupgDNcyQRIw8bNsgc2IDdEWa4LAx4VwwABqf0z1TbysEh0pcb8LdFvXS6rRoC25o7sDfkg%3D%3D)**

If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I am so scared for Eric and I will do whatever I can for him - and for our children.

**[So I pray you'll find it in your heart today to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8ba2dcf2f4c74b449e03a9fd823ee19e&_e=A2o8dvXt61e81AvsElWGRkB_NNNzWZqi9e6oVuCViIeSmScklCNTnZw7B-5IrKuqi9wi0poDP90gVENKzU8aoo6TA1UBpaUcVCxY-NzJ5SH7rv6KZOBK7cVNKV6paCO56OdtO3R5axNr18SiRgoFqbpiBeHS3CgQp9og1PPrmSmm671g_VqiDuPR53-o_w49JUcf_vjYQzhNSnsRnNV_hbIkSkjtayh2ULwxhAXZ8O5vMm109AOJwbHLaPXaL9UvlJPmLBH7qU6R-1TiDpAX2WqDeuwJzd9fDsLTpeLnwQ2_fr4g_J8pJzZRx6mKFdzNQHyyXNvQnSh6Xtts7KIj8s5-30iX_KrH1KEx72SjZwrjD7eY-q9ks50C-IzaljkMZtI1LnzLKCjwIFIHIWQt2g%3D%3D)**

Eric and I - and our three kids - are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help bring Eric home where he belongs.

No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support.

Sincerely,

Sarah DeValkenaere

P.S. The Missouri Supreme Court has declined to take Eric's case. Now a pardon is one of the last remaining options to bring Eric home. We're feverishly trying to raise the money to pay for a massive petition drive urging the Missouri Governor Mike Parson to pardon Eric. I know my husband is innocent. But it's so hard to be a cop these days. The 'defund the police' movement has wiped out the support officers like Eric need to do their jobs.

And dozens of prosecutors across the country have made it a priority to try and lock up as many cops as they can. Even if they followed their training or defended themselves in the line of duty. The brave men and women in blue need to know that someone... anyone still has their back.

**[That's why I sincerely hope you'll help me get justice for Eric - and our entire family - by making a tax-deductible gift of any amount to the LELDF today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8ba2dcf2f4c74b449e03a9fd823ee19e&_e=A2o8dvXt61e81AvsElWGRkB_NNNzWZqi9e6oVuCViIeSmScklCNTnZw7B-5IrKuqi9wi0poDP90gVENKzU8aoo6TA1UBpaUcVCxY-NzJ5SH7rv6KZOBK7cVNKV6paCO56OdtO3R5axNr18SiRgoFqbpiBeHS3CgQp9og1PPrmSmm671g_VqiDuPR53-o_w49JUcf_vjYQzhNSnsRnNV_hbIkSkjtayh2ULwxhAXZ8O63js_cWyhHfjxfE87h469NZxQi-DIQzbzkG3V7u6_oYXTgWToo9z9WF0UydZng0_O6kbv9YwXCjra67PkUFre82W5hMbhTYMJl5D87jQLsHkPpc4e8ZGsEo1oF0LBUgz5Cjgccpiia_R0_F2CC_xMR3zjvpurxnapuN7tliWJ-hg%3D%3D)**

Thank you, and God bless!
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8ba2dcf2f4c74b449e03a9fd823ee19e&_e=A2o8dvXt61e81AvsElWGRhANADBcIrW-TGr5FwEF1KBQOqlvEA2B_QHtS-titez2fWkizowEa9XgxNYki7ZEXEQvpFmIhQKLRd43pYJWITqv98Dsy2bbxcHwIPNz01xES4dl_Is0y0001x73R1dLY-j1CIkUOxT5lmHuhz_TQK6MXME-jd8pRwziapPb6p6nA_8WYttUnzP3IWvTdM5RsA%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

[Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=8ba2dcf2f4c74b449e03a9fd823ee19e&_t=S2O_3R75H1Rc-RHsO4sBQ5zWeSSud6jpw6evzQ6S0kID1_JC63j-qAqzxiAUvfcDoiN7iWNYk4mmGxQL_9FkYUPa38P-193BD9E5ZaMCI7G-zZOOZDCYrQpU5HwNQTRf)

name: Tobias Read
subject: I am fighting to protect voting rights in Oregon.
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98018640/515294547/-569431239?refcode=241202em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTY4NGQzMC1kOWIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aUggBJMXfxmlvWfTkGGlhCIRd8HsDxpqHeO5HZb5YXg=)

| | Hi folks, it’s Oregon Secretary of State-elect Tobias Read. It hasn’t even been a month since Election Day, and MAGA Republicans are already attacking voting rights in Oregon. MAGA Republicans in our state recently announced their goal to repeal vote by mail by starting a new initiative petition, citing unproven claims of voter fraud. Mail-in voting is safe, secure, accessible, and democratic. Anyone who tries to dismantle it is suppressing democracy. **_This was one of the central issues of the campaign I ran — and won. So let me say as clearly as I can: Not on my watch._** I’m not waiting to be sworn in as the next Secretary of State to defend voting rights. I’m using my platform right now to speak out against this cynical effort to roll back voting rights in Oregon—and I hope you’ll join me. **[**Please add your name to my petition to show that you oppose this cynical effort to end Vote By Mail in Oregon.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98018642/515294549/382095864?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTY4NGQzMC1kOWIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aUggBJMXfxmlvWfTkGGlhCIRd8HsDxpqHeO5HZb5YXg=&emci=17046e2b-ceac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=5a684d30-d9b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=30662126)**

[**ADD MY NAME >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98018645/515294551/382095864?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTY4NGQzMC1kOWIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aUggBJMXfxmlvWfTkGGlhCIRd8HsDxpqHeO5HZb5YXg=&emci=17046e2b-ceac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=5a684d30-d9b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=30662126)

clean_body: | | | = | | Hi folks, it’s Oregon Secretary of State-elect Tobias Read. It hasn’t even been a month since Election Day, and MAGA Republicans are already attacking voting rights in Oregon. MAGA Republicans in our state recently announced their goal to repeal vote by mail by starting a new initiative petition, citing unproven claims of voter fraud. Mail-in voting is safe, secure, accessible, and democratic. Anyone who tries to dismantle it is suppressing democracy. This was one of the central issues of the campaign I ran — and won. So let me say as clearly as I can: Not on my watch. I’m not waiting to be sworn in as the next Secretary of State to defend voting rights. I’m using my platform right now to speak out against this cynical effort to roll back voting rights in Oregon—and I hope you’ll join me. Thank you for joining me and using your voice. Tobias Read Oregon Secretary of State-elect = | | = | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers. | | |

| |
---|---
| 🛑**There’s no sugarcoating it: Our party faced major setbacks on Election Day. But if you want to keep fighting for our democracy, our rights, our freedoms, and our future, please keep reading.** 👇
---
When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers.

Without Congress, these majorities will provide a much-needed check to oppose the worst of the incoming administration.

**Expanding Democratic power in statehouses across the country is the best way to counteract the damage of a second Trump presidency.**
---
We’re committed to building our largest membership team in DLCC history to fight back against the dangerous extremism of Trump and his allies by building Democratic majorities from the ground up.

As one of our most dedicated supporters, we need you on this team standing alongside us.

Donations from our members each year directly fuel our work to:

✅ Compete in majority-making special elections
✅ Chip away at Republican supermajorities
✅ Identify and flip vulnerable GOP-held seats
_And so much more..._
---

subject: Your family is going to love this, Peter

name: SIGN NOW - via House GOP
subject: Christmas time is here, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Be 1 of 1,000 patriots to sign President Trump’s Christmas Card!

|
---
| | | **MERRY CHRISTMAS**

President Trump has been fighting hard for the American people every day, and we want to show him just how grateful House Republicans are for everything he's done for our country.

So we're putting together a very special Christmas card just for President Trump and his family!

_**We set an ambitious goal of collecting 1,000 signatures**_ from TOP conservative patriots around the country for President Trump's Christmas Card.

_**[Will you add your name to the long list of Patriots who have already signed?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-lKmbGAucDZYJC9SMB1Fdg~~/AARclAA~_tNZw6xAMlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Will you add your name to the long list of Patriots who have already signed? ")**_

_**[Add your name now and help House Republicans show President Trump just how grateful the American people are for everything he's done for our country.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-lKmbGAucDZYJC9SMB1Fdg~~/AARclAA~_tNZw6xAMlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Add your name now and help House Republicans show President Trump just how grateful the American people are for everything he’s done for our country.")**_

name: United Sovereign Americans
subject: Peter: Will You Support USA This Tuesday?
body:
Will you please support United Sovereign Americans this Giving Tuesday?
| [ ](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VWChDw86bx09N6_Vn8Y8pTFhW5q0Twr5p5D_0N44_D9R3m2ndW69sMD-6lZ3p_W6s3vv952_17ZW4GL-B-5J0dT5VVBQwl2RGvDkN8qM_YmY2wh2W10SWcW8rx_sYN4-JBpXnQY8KW1BPwmy6c8vhRW342Pdz8KwYwYW56Q0mw7gMk8cW4XFnpc354w9-VV1z5s5FBpgrW6L7Bkv2KC1qKW4Sw4-Z7XFqXWW2XgqBG5pjP3XW8R5lwQ6crrPMV4jYT93228hRW2D2zxx2R2GjWW6Yyltp5PTSS_W5rTzY_7GX2BTW4_YKSC4GXQsZf1jpkDg04)
---
|
---
Dear Peter, Will you please support United Sovereign Americans this Giving Tuesday? We hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving surrounded by family, friends, and delicious food! It's a blessing to have this time for fellowship, laughter and recharging after a busy election season. As ever, USA is tremendously grateful for your generosity. You helped save our country in 2024 and finally put election officials in the position of being concerned about accountability for unlawful actions! Together we're going to do it again for 2026! This year, Giving Tuesday is tomorrow December 3rd, and we are humbly asking that you contribute to our ongoing mission to secure valid elections for American citizens and accountability for election misconduct.
---
| [ **Please Contribute Generously - Thank You For Your Trust** ](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VWChDw86bx09N6_Vn8Y8pTFhW5q0Twr5p5D_0N44_Db63m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3kzW7RhnFp3WHFwmVnPZXZ1TJdBjW3cxmTZ15zMx2W5JXzlb2SH2WZW95t7by3br0kMW4LTc1n8QTrtBW4rMLZ51bB3FjW8LNbHL945cK-W3pMh5Q6CBx33W38nqkg243xqkW76D6fG42yjZYW8N4fZ84r1m3ZW2TLpmc7_Jj-lW8n7qtl27sjcjW2N48Bm6C5MRmW2-Xq7z8CFqLkW6TRQnj2z--HBW484D5m5yphMmW3ghbVK8c0dgLW9dVj0_76QKJXW3qcYTc8Yqhq1W3w7vjY5FnC37f97ypQY04)
---
USA volunteers are totally committed! Our litigation strategy continues to work its way through the courts. We are examining the 2024 election and will share the results when complete. We are meeting, planning and strategizing for an even better 2026 election. If we are to continue our work, we will need your voice and your generosity. I humbly ask that you consider a generous donation to United Sovereign Americans tomorrow on Giving Tuesday. Please also share this email with friends and family who may be willing to contribute. With your help we will continue restoring our republic and democratic institutions using our proven strategy. With Gratitude, Marly Hornik CEO, United Sovereign Americans
---

clean_body: Will you please support United Sovereign Americans this Giving Tuesday? | | Dear Peter, Will you please support United Sovereign Americans this Giving Tuesday? We hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving surrounded by family, friends, and delicious food! It's a blessing to have this time for fellowship, laughter and recharging after a busy election season. As ever, USA is tremendously grateful for your generosity. You helped save our country in 2024 and finally put election officials in the position of being concerned about accountability for unlawful actions! Together we're going to do it again for 2026! This year, Giving Tuesday is tomorrow December 3rd, and we are humbly asking that you contribute to our ongoing mission to secure valid elections for American citizens and accountability for election misconduct. | USA volunteers are totally committed! Our litigation strategy continues to work its way through the courts. We are examining the 2024 election and will share the results when complete. We are meeting, planning and strategizing for an even better 2026 election. If we are to continue our work, we will need your voice and your generosity. I humbly ask that you consider a generous donation to United Sovereign Americans tomorrow on Giving Tuesday. Please also share this email with friends and family who may be willing to contribute. With your help we will continue restoring our republic and democratic institutions using our proven strategy. With Gratitude, Marly Hornik CEO, United Sovereign Americans | United Sovereign Americans, Inc., a 501(c)(4) nonprofit organization, Suite 194, 167 LAMP & LANTERN VILLAGE, CHESTERFIELD, MO 63017

[**Will you make your donation now to help us get a match?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98019098/515296435/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2YzZhOTcxLWRiYjAtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jOv9CixnJmscSNEY_Oke4C-IH8BoSmpmWpAjICDcu2k=&emci=978b54f0-53a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=66c6a971-dbb0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98019100/515296466/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2YzZhOTcxLWRiYjAtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jOv9CixnJmscSNEY_Oke4C-IH8BoSmpmWpAjICDcu2k=&emci=978b54f0-53a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=66c6a971-dbb0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230)There’s a lot of work ahead of us this upcoming year, which is why it’s crucial we ensure we have the funds to support our fight for equitable and environmental transportation, affordable clean energy, climate resiliency within communities, and for our sustaining essentials like clean air and water. Our work has always been important, but this next year it is perhaps made _more_ imperative as we enter a Donald Trump presidency. Not only will we have to fight hard for our priorities during the 2025 legislative session, we will also have to backstall and defend our precious state from federal climate attacks. It may seem overwhelming, but we believe we can do it, and do it better, with _your_ help. We’ve done it before the last time Trump was in office, and this time we want to make sure we show everyone what Oregonians _really_ value. No matter what happens at the federal level, we are committed to making sure Oregon remains the green state that it is, and continues to be a leader across the country for climate action. We’re stronger together, which is something we all already know. A gift of $50 will provide us the resources to recruit 1 new volunteer to our organization. Another gift of $50 provides us with the capability to help that volunteer reach 3 new volunteers. Imagine how your donation for Giving Tuesday will compound over time and grow our reach, especially once we reach our goal of $10k and receive a match from a generous donor! And don’t forget, not only will your gift have an immeasurable impact, you’ll be entered to win a fun Owyhee swag package. **We’re exactly ONE DAY AWAY from the Runoff Election Day, and Georgia is once again the center of it all.**
1. Despite what you may think, the 2024 Election is FAR from over.
2. 18 seats are up for grabs across the state tomorrow during the runoff elections.
3. And these are key local level seats from state House and Senate to city council that will help shape the agenda for communities across the Peach State.
4. So what happens tomorrow could have major impacts on the day-to-day lives of everyday Georgians.

**Luckily:** We saw historic momentum in the leadup to the 2024 Election. And if we can keep the momentum going through tomorrow, we’ll elect a wave of local leaders. But to do it, we need to double down on our efforts to turnout voters in these final hours. That’s why we set a final $10,000 fundraising goal to fuel our fight. [So will you chip in $15 right now to the Democratic Party of Georgia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98019085/515296393/-871140472?amount=15&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_120224_1_2_Runoff-Election-Lead-Up&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGM2YTk3MS1kYmIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GlHxuMDWNJ4voEKx-yU7r9-bjnj8BS2it451_cZNAFE=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Team Crouch
subject: From the Desk of Suzanne Crouch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
November Update

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/crouchforindiana/ppp2gaxknr-12716750?e=8f9fef7158)
November Update
Friends and Fellow Hoosiers,

This month, we observed Veterans Day, honoring those who have fought for our country and our freedom.

Providing more mental health resources to our veterans is critical - an estimated 17 veterans die by suicide every day. If you or someone you know needs help, please call 988.

Thank you to all those who have served our country!
Suzanne Crouch
Happy Thanksgiving!
I hope you and your family had a safe and happy Thanksgiving this season!
Mental Health Roundtables
This past month I continued traveling the state hosting mental health roundtables in my hometown of Evansville and at my alma mater, Purdue University, to discuss mental health resources.

Indiana Builders Association
I had the opportunity to join the Indiana Builders Association at their Legislative Conference and participate on their mental health panel. I was honored to receive the IBA's highest honor, the John C. Hart Award!

In The News
Lt. Gov. Suzanne Crouch, Youth Life host mental health roundtable (https://www.14news.com/2024/11/19/lt-gov-suzanne-crouch-youth-life-host-mental-health-roundtable/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=fc8ec219a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-42261667)

Indiana Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch returned to her hometown on Monday, November 18 to speak with local mental health professionals about some of the needs and concerns surrounding mental health in the community.

Those in attendance spoke in detail about the critical issues people struggle with each and every day when it comes to their mental health.

However, the goal of today’s discussion was not to just talk about mental health, rather address what needs to be done to improve it amongst those in the community.

“We want to have that discussion on where we are, what we are doing and what we can do to continue to help them,” said Crouch.
READ MORE (https://www.14news.com/2024/11/19/lt-gov-suzanne-crouch-youth-life-host-mental-health-roundtable/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=fc8ec219a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-42261667)
Lt. governor leads roundtable at Purdue on student mental health challenges (https://www.purdue.edu/newsroom/2024/Q4/lieutenant-governor-leads-roundtable-at-purdue-on-student-mental-health-challenges/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=fc8ec219a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-42261667)

“It’s a staggering figure — 1 in 5 Hoosiers struggles with a mental health challenge,” said Crouch, Indiana’s secretary of agriculture and rural development. “The Indiana Mental Health Roundtable and the Gov. Eric Holcomb administration recognize the crisis and are committed to raising awareness about mental health issues, removing the stigma and providing affordable resources.”

The event featured experts, campus leaders and student representatives with the goal of fostering a dialogue around mental health awareness and shifting the paradigm of what mental health care on campus looks like.
READ MORE (https://www.purdue.edu/newsroom/2024/Q4/lieutenant-governor-leads-roundtable-at-purdue-on-student-mental-health-challenges/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=fc8ec219a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-42261667)

name: Eric Burlison
subject: Mark my words... these people will destroy this country
body:
I often wondered why politicians were powerless to secure our borders

|
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c9ad566d16484441a2e7fe445864df1a&_e=MIGXm8LQIfmIjZv1RHfRcWD6ysi0y2SKJZLH2usNC9pLJ_pimErZK8AcBbph1jqc5LsAz5mJrfqo2IflVRKaAUlA4-7hIxbyZQzc7jyHk860fk68GD8Zxwg_hMMADQTpNjbOkaYA66Lhn_jkPD5cZeHwx3lusXFY2hgD7ObTDr0y1sUPxiIjyBoyePzTmSZIHVmsN3xU-j-NjONszDU2YRvuO-tNvFGEaU6NzeOFiu8_v9Z9EVgUuEjn41YsrK_KCeTf61hwKnvYIgMXs3g5yUI-Cfa-7eNICuNM4sqKQP3mMiZ0o3OJoLTpJCWjeC3Ivv-7mKuFXo9Vcw9KsUBwUg%3D%3D)
Friend,

When it's time to get reelected, politicians make all the promises in the world to fix everything they just haven't gotten around to...

But _follow through_ on those promises? Not so much.

Have you ever thought, "If these people won't represent my interest, then I'll just have to do it myself?" **... You're NOT alone.**

I often wondered why politicians were powerless to secure our borders, solve the national debt, or stop funding global wars while our country suffers. Then, I decided to take action.

Thankfully, Young Americans for Liberty Foundation was there to help. YAL Foundation is one of the few organizations that offers training that can take you from activist to representative and how to be a champion for liberty once elected to office.

**In fact, I consider myself one of their success stories.**

I'm Congressman Eric Burlison from Southwest Missouri. YAL Foundation's efforts have been essential to my career in public service.

[I told Jeff Frazee, the Founder of YAL Foundation, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to train the next generation of liberty leaders. Will you please chip in toward that goal with a donation of $10 or more?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c9ad566d16484441a2e7fe445864df1a&_e=MIGXm8LQIfmIjZv1RHfRcWD6ysi0y2SKJZLH2usNC9pLJ_pimErZK8AcBbph1jqc5LsAz5mJrfqo2IflVRKaAUlA4-7hIxbyZQzc7jyHk860fk68GD8Zxwg_hMMADQTpNjbOkaYA66Lhn_jkPD5cZeHwx3lusXFY2hgD7ObTDr0y1sUPxiIjyBoyePzTmSZIDNIiJNcXg45M02XMBKSP0EQPx4lnYOlqu5mfZ6ZTTpF025UkSfEmQahKxrzgOoQZZVAO2vW8uKn_fD3V4KLeIWELiyJSN5cwapiyHEAgIEFnoy1pGIdjligskCVKO19haxAhEBpyQ2z7WsPfxVwZbg%3D%3D)
[Donate](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c9ad566d16484441a2e7fe445864df1a&_e=MIGXm8LQIfmIjZv1RHfRcWD6ysi0y2SKJZLH2usNC9pLJ_pimErZK8AcBbph1jqc5LsAz5mJrfqo2IflVRKaAUlA4-7hIxbyZQzc7jyHk860fk68GD8Zxwg_hMMADQTpNjbOkaYA66Lhn_jkPD5cZeHwx3lusXFY2hgD7ObTDr0y1sUPxiIjyBoyePzTmSZIv3dB7Y2piqrxyasnFzLe1KVIAuGZRUxXVnAU6V0XTXZIub6o5P0lXw0kagULvlUFgcMx0YOURSq9hjlpjxuNxcVVxEv0gFy_9lxzxzDNo1mTlBYgeK2hNQ7kExD4pDNeiQZW2yCKWj4E8wqBpLxI1w%3D%3D)
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c9ad566d16484441a2e7fe445864df1a&_e=MIGXm8LQIfmIjZv1RHfRcWD6ysi0y2SKJZLH2usNC9pLJ_pimErZK8AcBbph1jqc5LsAz5mJrfqo2IflVRKaAUlA4-7hIxbyZQzc7jyHk860fk68GD8Zxwg_hMMADQTpNjbOkaYA66Lhn_jkPD5cZeHwx3lusXFY2hgD7ObTDr0y1sUPxiIjyBoyePzTmSZIRg4tfxZZjlnsl44xVOEzaMiaoSeijA7_bj6Auc_ecedkc_Eb5FOLQ5DLAX2TPPIUO060zRwdze8K1RfZC9vspRLVFFSbSVCg98w-bBWTamVj2SPXyT_QZKsWco4uodtU07PFqQMxW6kPZyzDND3QIw%3D%3D)
_YAL 's chief operating officer, Sean Themea, and I speaking at FreedomFest 2024 in Las Vegas._
My life would not have been the same without the support of Young Americans for Liberty Foundation. Their mission is to advance liberty across the country by-

1) **Identifying** Youth Leaders through a National Campus Program
2) **Educating** through On-Campus Activism Events
3) **Training** Students, Activists, and Legislators on How to Make Liberty Win!

This elite training gives both YAL students the advantage when fighting for liberty on campus and legislators the advantage when standing up to the Uniparty in office. Other organizations just can't match!

_YAL 's training took me from freedom activist to the Freedom Caucus_, and with your support, I want to help train even more students to fight for liberty.

[Young Americans for Liberty Foundation is one of the only organizations training future leaders in this country who can fight for our freedom. That's why I am personally committed to helping them raise $20,000 before the end of the month. Will you please donate $10 or more toward that goal?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c9ad566d16484441a2e7fe445864df1a&_e=MIGXm8LQIfmIjZv1RHfRcWD6ysi0y2SKJZLH2usNC9pLJ_pimErZK8AcBbph1jqc5LsAz5mJrfqo2IflVRKaAUlA4-7hIxbyZQzc7jyHk860fk68GD8Zxwg_hMMADQTpNjbOkaYA66Lhn_jkPD5cZeHwx3lusXFY2hgD7ObTDr0y1sUPxiIjyBoyePzTmSZIBfTnj87W3NvTTvHxpo2Zm70bhJBzCdiL8TPw3NrbLbViqgHINOI9RmqY0Fk9UjpF8g8OeTeG9Zh1GljyqPphD1x16K6b-Nfb9KjQLsrQZD4bz2h6w93AEO5iuYPCIxQII-ZfLrQQH8AS2Z8Zzy8ySA%3D%3D)

Throughout my career, I have worked to keep the government from infringing upon our rights.

When I first got elected to the House in Missouri, there was a senior member who pulled me aside on a Committee hearing and said, _**" Son, let me tell you how things _really_ work up here and what you're going to do."**_

Long story short, I didn't play ball. Instead, I found a way to pass Constitutional Carry in Missouri. I'm also happy to say that the same guy is the guy that I beat in the congressional primary.

And it all started because YAL Foundation helped train me.

[Donating today is one of the best ways to help liberty win across the country. Can you donate $20.24, $35, $100, or any amount to support Young Americans for Liberty Foundation?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c9ad566d16484441a2e7fe445864df1a&_e=MIGXm8LQIfmIjZv1RHfRcWD6ysi0y2SKJZLH2usNC9pLJ_pimErZK8AcBbph1jqc5LsAz5mJrfqo2IflVRKaAUlA4-7hIxbyZQzc7jyHk860fk68GD8Zxwg_hMMADQTpNjbOkaYA66Lhn_jkPD5cZeHwx3lusXFY2hgD7ObTDr0y1sUPxiIjyBoyePzTmSZIqCsB4ruCK6ZDM2YIec5xU9xZUhtgqLCjo7X_mXPm8qJTgRSmrtjJaN2JLkZdbv8crDjJpjvNNtxDRFd23FMSw1BvMh3VvCzunbxsRVsGGYTT3WJ5zxSpb6Tv-c5TaMuwR8f4iEqZl1PjkPWSSAAqPA%3D%3D)

In liberty,

Congressman Eric Burlison

#
It’s finally December, Peter!
Last month reminded us all that no matter what, we need to stick together and prepare for anything. And this is our last chance in 2024 to prove that we have the resolve and the will to fight back against threats to our democracy, like a second Trump administration.
We’re truly grateful for everyone’s support during this chaotic time. name: Byron Donalds
subject: Cool as a cucumber
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9xFj/?__vbtrk=MjYyOTI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyOTI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9xFj/?__vbtrk=MjYyOTI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyOTI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
|
---
I’m as cool as a cucumber.
You have to be when the Fake News is calling our MAGA Movement “evil” on national television.
This is Black MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds.
I got real tired of seeing them lying about us with no repercussions whatsoever.
So I thought to myself, why not just go on their shows, dismantle their lies, and set the record straight _**one-on-one**_?
That’s exactly what I did. This whole election, I’ve been one of the few MAGA Congressman to destroy their narratives LIVE - all thanks to folks like yourself.
But I just went on MSNBC & what I heard made me realize we still have _**[so much work to do.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9xFj/?__vbtrk=MjYyOTI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyOTI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_
They interrogated me, demanding to know if I thought that President-Elect Trump was too dangerous to be in the White House, then even hinted that he wasn’t qualified to be President.
**I kept my cool and picked their phony narratives apart piece by piece like clockwork.**
Problem is, they’ll keep trying to push this nonsense every single day until he’s inaugurated, and if no one challenges them, their lies could seriously get out of hand.
I know the election is over, but we have to remain on the offensive all the way through the inauguration, and it’s your generous support that keeps me in the fight.
_**[So please, can you chip into Fake News Offensive Fund today?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9xFj/?__vbtrk=MjYyOTI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyOTI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_ _**[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9xFk/?__vbtrk=MjYyOTI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyOTI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__**[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9xFk/?__vbtrk=MjYyOTI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyOTI3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_

name: Jason C. Johnson
subject: 8 years for his day in court
body:
| |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,I’m reaching out to you with a plea for help—Former Atlanta Police Officer James Burn faces life in prison for doing his job, _and he desperately needs your help today._ James’ entire prosecution has been a witch hunt. This good American cop did nothing wrong. But, the radical left prosecutor in charge of James’ case is on a mission to ruin James’ life in exchange for political capital.I’m sure you’ve heard of liberal prosecutors attacking conservatives and hard working Americans they disagree with by abusing the legal system as a tool for their Anti-American schemes. . . Well, that’s exactly what’s going on here._**Let me quickly give you the facts:**_
---
* On June 23, 2016, James responded to a call about a suspect breaking into a parked vehicle.
* James arrived on scene and watched a person matching the suspect’s description enter a vehicle. So, James did what any police officer would do – he put on his emergency lights.
* Well, the suspect immediately spooked and drove the vehicle he was breaking into directly at James’s police car. _This was a life-threatening attack on James, a police officer, which is a crime in and of itself!_
* Fearing for his life and hoping not to be struck by the suspect’s car, James tried to stop it by discharging his weapon one time.

---
James struck the violent suspect and killed him. Now I’ve got to say, it’s a tragedy that a life was lost, but James was just doing his job – he was protecting his community from a thief and protecting his own life from being taken by a vehicle charging towards him.But soon after the incident, the Fulton County, Georgia District Attorney charged James with _murder_. . . and is trying to put him away for life. . . when all James was trying to do was protect his life and his community.Now, after 8 long years of a messy legal battle and James losing everything he has, James is finally scheduled to go to trial this fall. Friend, the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund is doing everything we can to scrape together enough money to help James with his legal fees. **[**Will you help us defend this honest man with a $35 donation today?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5c46231a27fe4d5288d5473c9cb7ecca&_e=auR22SzpINzDJTdpV15kwszYPP7sgbOodVg5Rz8rYEWs2xsTVWEcDr8F43SSyfhHBf4V-zSHqU4Z6tGvXu1g6fWKnyxUQMBxLWO8pDUH_ElzEY4TW5FnirrR7mKnxLZjKp00_AZIEE0uF6MvSLFgi0qkUBIeJmtvckBeZoW6XFxPh6XrT73HjlSyXC0ZqyQGbFA-fzgmh5ZJzXv60Dx2ga4FXap9TNVO5c9Rbz0Y2GyqrAQ9ckqAvcM27Ggq8CNZI8TRFB-2Z5HoFWOXzjTxosvDyzSg216u7uYHAmreRLBiGbKgiBBY04mdy90RVdzex01C-J-RLkCWl5sUmIuH3eHXwPl_WWoLmDJy60JPtiDDSO147bk3zSjOmoxLuM1msl5GLDZxESUeJuwSXfmzRA%3D%3D)****_James’s case is as political as it gets._** **The District Attorney who charged James in 2016 ran his campaign for re-election promising to prosecute cops.** James is just a pawn to this District Attorney._**But he was a hero to his community!**_ And now the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund is doing everything it can to make sure that James knows his work is appreciated . . . and that his life isn’t ruined by a sham legal case that puts him in jail. **[Will you tell James _“thank you”_ for his service on the police force with a $35 or more donation today?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5c46231a27fe4d5288d5473c9cb7ecca&_e=auR22SzpINzDJTdpV15kwszYPP7sgbOodVg5Rz8rYEWs2xsTVWEcDr8F43SSyfhHBf4V-zSHqU4Z6tGvXu1g6fWKnyxUQMBxLWO8pDUH_ElzEY4TW5FnirrR7mKnxLZjKp00_AZIEE0uF6MvSLFgi0qkUBIeJmtvckBeZoW6XFxPh6XrT73HjlSyXC0ZqyQGbFA-fzgmh5ZJzXv60Dx2ga4FXap9TNVO5c9Rbz0Y2GyqrAQ9ckqAvcM27Ggq8CNZzkL9dc_HNnfv6unrhTKnu9mciRL8-V-nG_K1oEqAXML064VizOvOVGbdMdeyd9DYpaPVFtodvIFleOlGpQYwhINeiuAufzPf9DOM-kd_stRZuenkaWrYhhMqyl2G4sOuGsTkmOrCG6USgINc1O2cMw%3D%3D)**Friend, James should not even be being prosecuted. But, sadly the current District Attorney who is trying to put James behind bars is none other than . . . Fani Willis . . . Yes, **_that_** _Fani Willis_ – the same prosecutor who brought election interference charges against President Donald Trump.It won’t shock you to learn that Fani Willis is as anti-cop and progressive as prosecutors come. After so much time, _and taxpayer money,_ spent on this case, Fani Willis’ office refuses to dismiss the charges against James!So the only way for James to get justice is to win his case! **_That’s where you come in_** – **[**Friend, will you stand with James and with all wrongly prosecuted American police officers with a $35 donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5c46231a27fe4d5288d5473c9cb7ecca&_e=auR22SzpINzDJTdpV15kwszYPP7sgbOodVg5Rz8rYEWs2xsTVWEcDr8F43SSyfhHBf4V-zSHqU4Z6tGvXu1g6fWKnyxUQMBxLWO8pDUH_ElzEY4TW5FnirrR7mKnxLZjKp00_AZIEE0uF6MvSLFgi0qkUBIeJmtvckBeZoW6XFxPh6XrT73HjlSyXC0ZqyQGbFA-fzgmh5ZJzXv60Dx2ga4FXap9TNVO5c9Rbz0Y2GyqrAQ9ckqAvcM27Ggq8CNZkBk7ialBDEWgs0ffsLLOUBy8NXyjwq5IUSyw95e3Ye4blMUCCtL7ZQVoDcSuwBprOEW_dZxy1EdExKuEG5LIggGVTEbw2To736HG7n0GGzRqEZ34iBbrLijB74zUHW_4j3Pt127TYqNWBMj0_XrfJg%3D%3D)** Now that you know what James is up against, you see why your donation is so critical.**[If you’re able and want to help James, will you consider making a larger gift of $50, $100, $500, or even $1,000 today to help keep James out of jail and with his family?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5c46231a27fe4d5288d5473c9cb7ecca&_e=auR22SzpINzDJTdpV15kwszYPP7sgbOodVg5Rz8rYEWs2xsTVWEcDr8F43SSyfhHBf4V-zSHqU4Z6tGvXu1g6fWKnyxUQMBxLWO8pDUH_ElzEY4TW5FnirrR7mKnxLZjKp00_AZIEE0uF6MvSLFgi0qkUBIeJmtvckBeZoW6XFxPh6XrT73HjlSyXC0ZqyQGbFA-fzgmh5ZJzXv60Dx2ga4FXap9TNVO5c9Rbz0Y2GyqrAQ9ckqAvcM27Ggq8CNZslKy1xF76x5LdC-cp3WOhEE9yuNWKzStlMAbti8IKNJVfMdmBJQ-sjfUp75IFkp66miIKiJDGcIQj1UowGA9zNp_JQOn4q1mTZyrwJjieSeIGNygKMMIQuV1Iablf8CyFzd1Q59gY0QAEjqfoPsJaA%3D%3D)** James and his extended family have already invested well over a _million dollars_ of their own personal money into his legal defense over the last eight years._Their resources are depleted. . . they have nothing left._ LELDF is James’ only chance to receive the legal defense he deserves. And we can’t fund this case without your **[**generous donation**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5c46231a27fe4d5288d5473c9cb7ecca&_e=auR22SzpINzDJTdpV15kwszYPP7sgbOodVg5Rz8rYEWs2xsTVWEcDr8F43SSyfhHBf4V-zSHqU4Z6tGvXu1g6fWKnyxUQMBxLWO8pDUH_ElzEY4TW5FnirrR7mKnxLZjKp00_AZIEE0uF6MvSLFgi0qkUBIeJmtvckBeZoW6XFxPh6XrT73HjlSyXC0ZqyQGbFA-fzgmh5ZJzXv60Dx2ga4FXap9TNVO5c9Rbz0Y2GyqrAQ9ckqAvcM27Ggq8CNZpw6CqA4TPpZ2ow8VWssDYpVnNI8JblnxnuSjzEUSMsMM39Afx5d4hUgx3iNEVxEjelMSzQN6Ah5jrRRJJ8hRoSE3-dyetaq3Rx-6RbkNrNo9nznYiBnExGp0bd00XVlIToVR0rP0EkYvBE1SUyCxQw%3D%3D)**.**Friend, James’ life has been ruined by this political prosecution. . . but the radical prosecutor does not care about fairness, justice, or truth. . . **. . . They only care about their political agenda.It breaks my heart to see James being used as a political pawn— at the expense of his freedom. That’s why we have to do whatever it takes to make sure that he doesn’t go to jail – and that the selfish prosecutors involved in his case know not to bark up this tree again. When officers like James have nowhere else to turn, LELDF partners with generous supporters like you to defend them in court. **[**Will you join us today?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5c46231a27fe4d5288d5473c9cb7ecca&_e=auR22SzpINzDJTdpV15kwszYPP7sgbOodVg5Rz8rYEWs2xsTVWEcDr8F43SSyfhHBf4V-zSHqU4Z6tGvXu1g6fWKnyxUQMBxLWO8pDUH_ElzEY4TW5FnirrR7mKnxLZjKp00_AZIEE0uF6MvSLFgi0qkUBIeJmtvckBeZoW6XFxPh6XrT73HjlSyXC0ZqyQGbFA-fzgmh5ZJzXv60Dx2ga4FXap9TNVO5c9Rbz0Y2GyqrAQ9ckqAvcM27Ggq8CNZWzvoshMLKqeoQgp8BRpZrZON8E_4lL0IkVJdMQMjRsWXebKJrFE8-CWiO4KYOUJkm8vOkd9kqGAvQbUmX1y1TI8XY6VpJjJa79Ob9y0MLbrbiornROSg1mSPbUYYWtrYUF3XOyO0iM6pOT6OkPf0sw%3D%3D)** LELDF supports and defends the law enforcement profession and those law enforcement officers who have devoted their lives to upholding the Constitution and serving the United States and its citizens while enforcing its laws.We also educate the public about the many risks and threats to law enforcement officers – _like sham prosecutions by left wing prosecutors like Fani Willis._ Friend, I hope you’ll [**stand with LELDF and with James today**.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5c46231a27fe4d5288d5473c9cb7ecca&_e=auR22SzpINzDJTdpV15kwszYPP7sgbOodVg5Rz8rYEWs2xsTVWEcDr8F43SSyfhHBf4V-zSHqU4Z6tGvXu1g6fWKnyxUQMBxLWO8pDUH_ElzEY4TW5FnirrR7mKnxLZjKp00_AZIEE0uF6MvSLFgi0qkUBIeJmtvckBeZoW6XFxPh6XrT73HjlSyXC0ZqyQGbFA-fzgmh5ZJzXv60Dx2ga4FXap9TNVO5c9Rbz0Y2GyqrAQ9ckqAvcM27Ggq8CNZf9kAv5pcQa5x6cRR6opswNBN5UIQZu17rGhCRkHEKnuH0xpXymzpJPrIQsWIXrh60-DU-6wYhxM93SCd18YD3ySTulGTsNE9DEHahyIkPTJe76LfDBkcrG5YjJnFWmnncwUKkOr2oDcr-ns1gLCp9Q%3D%3D)Thank you for supporting our men and women in blue.Gratefully,

clean_body: | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot,I’m reaching out to you with a plea for help—Former Atlanta Police Officer James Burn faces life in prison for doing his job, and he desperately needs your help today. James’ entire prosecution has been a witch hunt. This good American cop did nothing wrong. But, the radical left prosecutor in charge of James’ case is on a mission to ruin James’ life in exchange for political capital.I’m sure you’ve heard of liberal prosecutors attacking conservatives and hard working Americans they disagree with by abusing the legal system as a tool for their Anti-American schemes. . . Well, that’s exactly what’s going on here.Let me quickly give you the facts: On June 23, 2016, James responded to a call about a suspect breaking into a parked vehicle. James arrived on scene and watched a person matching the suspect’s description enter a vehicle. So, James did what any police officer would do – he put on his emergency lights. Well, the suspect immediately spooked and drove the vehicle he was breaking into directly at James’s police car. This was a life-threatening attack on James, a police officer, which is a crime in and of itself! Fearing for his life and hoping not to be struck by the suspect’s car, James tried to stop it by discharging his weapon one time. James struck the violent suspect and killed him. Now I’ve got to say, it’s a tragedy that a life was lost, but James was just doing his job – he was protecting his community from a thief and protecting his own life from being taken by a vehicle charging towards him.But soon after the incident, the Fulton County, Georgia District Attorney charged James with murder. . . and is trying to put him away for life. . . when all James was trying to do was protect his life and his community.Now, after 8 long years of a messy legal battle and James losing everything he has, James is finally scheduled to go to trial this fall. Friend, the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund is doing everything we can to scrape together enough money to help James with his legal fees. ’s case is as political as it gets. The District Attorney who charged James in 2016 ran his campaign for re-election promising to prosecute cops. James is just a pawn to this District Attorney.But he was a hero to his community! And now the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund is doing everything it can to make sure that James knows his work is appreciated . . . and that his life isn’t ruined by a sham legal case that puts him in jail. , James should not even be being prosecuted. But, sadly the current District Attorney who is trying to put James behind bars is none other than . . . Fani Willis . . . Yes, that Fani Willis – the same prosecutor who brought election interference charges against President Donald Trump.It won’t shock you to learn that Fani Willis is as anti-cop and progressive as prosecutors come. After so much time, and taxpayer money, spent on this case, Fani Willis’ office refuses to dismiss the charges against James!So the only way for James to get justice is to win his case! That’s where you come in – Now that you know what James is up against, you see why your donation is so critical. James and his extended family have already invested well over a million dollars of their own personal money into his legal defense over the last eight years.Their resources are depleted. . . they have nothing left. LELDF is James’ only chance to receive the legal defense he deserves. And we can’t fund this case without your , James’ life has been ruined by this political prosecution. . . but the radical prosecutor does not care about fairness, justice, or truth. . . . . . They only care about their political agenda.It breaks my heart to see James being used as a political pawn— at the expense of his freedom. That’s why we have to do whatever it takes to make sure that he doesn’t go to jail – and that the selfish prosecutors involved in his case know not to bark up this tree again. When officers like James have nowhere else to turn, LELDF partners with generous supporters like you to defend them in court. LELDF supports and defends the law enforcement profession and those law enforcement officers who have devoted their lives to upholding the Constitution and serving the United States and its citizens while enforcing its laws.We also educate the public about the many risks and threats to law enforcement officers – like sham prosecutions by left wing prosecutors like Fani Willis. Friend, I hope you’ll you for supporting our men and women in blue.Gratefully, Jason C. JohnsonPresident, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | | | | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! **** | | | ---|---|--- © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 |

subject: We Saved America, Now It is Time to Save California – Join the Fight!

body:
Our state faces immense challenges and needs strong, common-sense leadership. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/115e33313486/thank-you-central-valley-your-support-means-the-world-17987793?e=affd398937)
---
| | | Dear Friends,

We’ve reached a pivotal moment. With a historic national victory secured, it’s time to focus on **saving California**. Our state faces immense challenges and needs strong, common-sense leadership.

---
| [Any Donation Amount Helps– Donate Here](https://vincefong.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aff51e55a83c63a31f34a5f3e&id=bf638d388a&e=affd398937 "Any Donation Amount Helps– Donate Here")
---
| **Under Gavin Newsom, Californians are struggling with:**
* **Affordability Crisis:** Skyrocketing costs of gas, food, and electricity are pushing families to the brink.
* **Rising Crime:** Our communities are less safe, and Newsom has failed to deliver real solutions.
* **Supply Chain Harm:** His regulations stifle trucking, rail, and logistics operations, worsening economic hardships.
* **Refusal to Secure the Border:** As the border crisis deepens, Newsom ignores critical issues impacting our safety and economy.

---
| [Help Congressman Vince Fong Fight ](https://vincefong.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aff51e55a83c63a31f34a5f3e&id=41b46179c8&e=affd398937 "Help Congressman Vince Fong Fight ")
---
| **We deserve better.** California needs leaders who prioritize affordability, public safety, and economic stability—not political grandstanding. Instead of working with the incoming Trump Administration to address these pressing issues, Newsom is focused on political theatrics. By calling a special session of the Legislature to pursue political lawsuits, he diverts taxpayer dollars away from real issues, using public resources to advance his own presidential ambitions.
---
| **Your support is crucial.** Every dollar fuels our fight for a more prosperous, secure California:
* **$25 amplifies our message across communities.**
* **$50 strengthens grassroots efforts.**
* **$100 helps combat harmful policies.**
* **$250 or more ensures we protect small businesses, families, and basic rights.**

---
| [Donate Now To Protect Our Future!](https://vincefong.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aff51e55a83c63a31f34a5f3e&id=0a7ecb834a&e=affd398937 "Donate Now To Protect Our Future!")
---
| **Let’s restore California, fight for affordability, and bring practical, people-first policies back to our great state.

With gratitude,**
---
| | |
---
| Vince Fong
---
| Paid for by Vince Fong for Congress.

If you want to put an end to the corruption and restore accountability in Washington, we need your help. The only way to stop this abuse of power is by electing more Republicans who will stand up to the Democrats' corrupt agenda. Will you make a bold stand today and contribute $20.24 to show the Democrats that we won’t tolerate this kind of favoritism any longer? Together, we can send a clear message that under a Trump Presidency, fairness and justice will prevail. | | Will you join us in taking back this nation? #
Friend of Life,

After the overturning of Roe v. Wade, the abortion pill became the #1 threat to preborn babies in America. Knowing roughly 1,700 innocent preborn babies lose their lives to this pill each day:

Now is the time to declare war on the abortion pill. [ ](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=0516c133defd4d41b7c3ae17f9d8b0e0&_e=deqjt0P_20xnXq2L5GinOee5LS40wc9dF6OIK7DZ926HCCJmx3k3tIsDG9xFWJ8zNqqRaj7n-ktXzgQUNFYQgFKIPcviKfPcFD5MU85KSiL6Oq9B7KmGFnJRWf-Pt5kLI2Iu9Rn5GDHO1DmtORgV7TtJEiXIPLmFTM1lpgQ5g4GDJuxS2f9qdXIvA338GM1dJNDejqjsHDXIApro-2mbscNC5uS337E0thL2npEYMSZw3HphfU-4Ju12GY9UvC-DFQJY09ylBiGrU62jf6Bw2LFPDl_240GiMbPfrA2c1cGwhu4n-jeB56gEbPGCszXzRJN_vgJtv5jFB4VHrzRdT2a3VEJh7_EkiEw1qJYji80%3D)
When you give today to help expose the harms of the dangerous abortion pill, your donation will enable:
* Advertising of important abortion pill-related content that has already proven to change minds and save lives, including Live Action's "I Saw My Baby" project and a re-launch of our "Abortion Pill Kills" educational campaign
* Spreading of an urgent petition to President-elect Donald Trump, RFK, Jr., Elon Musk, and Vivek Ramaswamy to defund Planned Parenthood
* Ongoing education about the life-saving Abortion Pill Reversal treatment so mothers can potentially save their children even after taking the first abortion pill

Your generous Giving Tuesday donation will fuel these projects and more.

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Department of Government Efficiency: Recipe for Chaos
body:
MAGA's "DOGE" is an invasive plan for chaos.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vm36d-lduocz-kyd76rh4/)
---
# **MAGA's Department of Government Efficiency: A Recipe for Chaos**
---
| | | | | [ ](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vm36d-lduod0-kyd76rh1/)
---
| | | | folks, Donald Trump’s second-term vision includes a plan to dismantle the government from within, led by none other than Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy. Their new project, the so-called _Department of Government Efficiency_ (DOGE), promises sweeping cuts to federal agencies and the elimination of countless public service roles—yet provides no clear roadmap for how this will benefit Americans. Here’s what Trump wants Musk and Ramaswamy to do: ** 1.) Gut federal departments and fire public servants** they decide are part of a “massive waste.” **2.)** Operate “outside of government” with minimal transparency or accountability to voters. **3.)** Slash at least $2 trillion from the federal budget—roughly one-third of total spending—regardless of the human cost. Elon Musk, a billionaire whose companies have raked in billions in taxpayer-funded government contracts, is now being handed the reins to decide which services Americans “don’t need.” Musk has already signaled that his cuts could cause “temporary hardship” for working families. Meanwhile, his partner in this scheme, Ramaswamy, has previously proposed shutting down entire federal agencies like the FBI, Department of Education, and Food and Nutrition Service. Trump and Musk frame these cuts as a plan to “get the government off your back,” but let’s be clear: this isn’t about efficiency—it’s about **erasing critical services** Americans rely on every day. From public schools to food assistance programs, no aspect of our social safety net is safe from the chopping block. The creation of DOGE isn’t just reckless—it’s a slap in the face to hardworking Americans. While Musk boasts about saving taxpayer dollars, we’ve yet to hear how much this new “advisory board” will cost to run or how it plans to navigate the inevitable fallout of slashing government budgets by a third. What happened to holding leaders accountable? It wasn’t so long ago that public outrage over something as small as "Nannygate" derailed presidential appointees. Now, we’re expected to accept billionaires and venture capitalists gutting public services without question? Let’s call this what it is: a dangerous power grab by an administration intent on weakening the very fabric of our democracy. DOGE won’t save Americans money—it’ll cost us our future. We can’t sit idly by while Trump, Musk, and Ramaswamy attempt to remake the government in their image. It’s time to stand up, push back, and demand leaders who fight _for_ the people—not against them. Together, we can stop this reckless experiment before it’s too late. [**_Our most powerful weapon right now is our microphone, so we need to use platforms around the country to hold MAGA accountable! Join us in our fight today._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vm36d-lduod1-kyd76rh2/)
---
| [Chip in $25](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vm36d-lduod2-kyd76rh3/)
---

Thank you for your help on this pressing matter, -No Dem Left Behind Team

| | Fellow Patriot, _
It has been a huge week for us at America First Legal. _ **
I want to share news of _an enormous legal victory_ we won in court: **Our team at America First Legal, working with Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton and a coalition of other courageous state Attorneys General **won a lawsuit to stop the Biden-Harris Administration 's DHS from granting administrative amnesty and a fast track pathway to citizenship for hundreds of thousands of illegal aliens** in the United States.
---
[DONATE HERE](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=f09474d4b5474924a32d04caef45facb&_e=aUbSZ07_b4Dg7xaBIjcovUVkuxVkr74FHgugncmlhjIMYLocU6nrE501EZAiDEZ72JWFvARpu-w8viiom-9j36ZP67WM85XAmldACXKsJiBTBZ2oUpOoKq0mPaBCTjLb1wCwj878jnjXfKDo6Okvt-jy0BD5pbnlCk9m43wO9JBjhhn71Vm9ex1uA6qnzdb-4gTqvxyge-Sf6_bhbYfVgCD2idce7z21-q_mgFnQjkO3mjouWtIYf7yidPpngPDcBqSjwN-E7xERmfibObZrLlJDOEMRsg03odSthNEkDC-uIvyfnPC3ZFM3yqP6rRJNpV1GA2tna_KIx4SEOwyI2Vj_LX71vcuQt5GcHAAXCoBPQTFJf_GHFMdmOWrpbTaAvxCR-9ZZ4W19g0NiY8Ne7SESgciPmyWjus2akFku67RDBTBrvaqAi66DKxOaO9AaGP3_LjsgUqKLXkDGlsxxaRi8QMk6Is4jLiDINFT1xs9hQXWFsgGg85rZujwMiVu0)
As you know, the Biden-Harris Administration has dedicated itself to the decimation of our immigration system and the erasure of our borders.
America First Legal was built to fight the Deep State and win. That's why your support of America First Legal is so important- we do the heavy lifting in the courtroom that stops the far-left's malicious attempts to transform and destroy America cold. _**[
Please support our work so we can continue to Save America >>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=f09474d4b5474924a32d04caef45facb&_e=aUbSZ07_b4Dg7xaBIjcovUVkuxVkr74FHgugncmlhjIMYLocU6nrE501EZAiDEZ72JWFvARpu-w8viiom-9j36ZP67WM85XAmldACXKsJiBTBZ2oUpOoKq0mPaBCTjLb1wCwj878jnjXfKDo6Okvt-jy0BD5pbnlCk9m43wO9JBjhhn71Vm9ex1uA6qnzdb-4gTqvxyge-Sf6_bhbYfVgCD2idce7z21-q_mgFnQjkO3mjouWtIYf7yidPpngPDcBqSjwN-E7xERmfibObZrLlJDOEMRsg03odSthNEkDC-uIvyfnPC3ZFM3yqP6rRJNpV1GA2tna_KIx4SEOwyI2Vj_LX71vcuQt5GcHAAXCoDW-Jd2RsboHi0-4X9P5vnIgP22LRnd58GqdPOWiQlcuEnj-fMAmKT36HgjepXdnLNsJTx9-WipIflbmn6rBjGoV2BLocFX67SZyIGJv_mq_3SS1rstOglf02Ej3vGxbIyoIERLz64uoc4Su3bCsrKZ) Thank you! **_ _

clean_body: | | | | | | Fellow Patriot, It has been a huge week for us at America First Legal. I want to share news of an enormous legal victory we won in court: Our team at America First Legal, working with Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton and a coalition of other courageous state Attorneys General won a lawsuit to stop the Biden-Harris Administration 's DHS from granting administrative amnesty and a fast track pathway to citizenship for hundreds of thousands of illegal aliens in the United States. As you know, the Biden-Harris Administration has dedicated itself to the decimation of our immigration system and the erasure of our borders. America First Legal was built to fight the Deep State and win. That's why your support of America First Legal is so important- we do the heavy lifting in the courtroom that stops the far-left's malicious attempts to transform and destroy America cold. Thank you! Gene Hamilton Executive Director, America First Legal | | America First Legal Foundation is an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. name: Eric Burlison
subject: Mark my words... these people will destroy this country
body:
I often wondered why politicians were powerless to secure our borders

|
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3JLfY6WibLk2vqCQdNfgDQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpMKgsP0R9aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS95YWxpYmVydHkvcGEtYWN0aW9uP2FwcGVhbF9jb2RlPW9jX3Byb3NfZW1haWxfMTEyNF9vY2VtYWlsX2ViJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTIwMiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1yb25XA3NwY0IKZ0ZZD05nGiZoo1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Friend,

When it’s time to get reelected, politicians make all the promises in the world to fix everything they just haven’t gotten around to...

But _follow through_ on those promises? Not so much.

Have you ever thought, “If these people won’t represent my interest, then I’ll just have to do it myself?” **...You’re NOT alone.**

I often wondered why politicians were powerless to secure our borders, solve the national debt, or stop funding global wars while our country suffers. Then, I decided to take action.

Thankfully, Young Americans for Liberty Foundation was there to help. YAL Foundation is one of the few organizations that offers training that can take you from activist to representative and how to be a champion for liberty once elected to office.

**In fact, I consider myself one of their success stories.**

I’m Congressman Eric Burlison from Southwest Missouri. YAL Foundation’s efforts have been essential to my career in public service.

[I told Jeff Frazee, the Founder of YAL Foundation, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to train the next generation of liberty leaders. Will you please chip in toward that goal with a donation of $10 or more?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3JLfY6WibLk2vqCQdNfgDQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpMKgsP0R9aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS95YWxpYmVydHkvcGEtYWN0aW9uP2FwcGVhbF9jb2RlPW9jX3Byb3NfZW1haWxfMTEyNF9vY2VtYWlsX2ViJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTIwMiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1yb25XA3NwY0IKZ0ZZD05nGiZoo1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

_YAL’s chief operating officer, Sean Themea, and I speaking at FreedomFest 2024 in Las Vegas._
My life would not have been the same without the support of Young Americans for Liberty Foundation. Their mission is to advance liberty across the country by–

1) **Identifying** Youth Leaders through a National Campus Program
2) **Educating** through On-Campus Activism Events
3) **Training** Students, Activists, and Legislators on How to Make Liberty Win!

This elite training gives both YAL students the advantage when fighting for liberty on campus and legislators the advantage when standing up to the Uniparty in office. Other organizations just can’t match!

_YAL’s training took me from freedom activist to the Freedom Caucus_ , and with your support, I want to help train even more students to fight for liberty.

[Young Americans for Liberty Foundation is one of the only organizations training future leaders in this country who can fight for our freedom. That’s why I am personally committed to helping them raise $20,000 before the end of the month. Will you please donate $10 or more toward that goal?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3JLfY6WibLk2vqCQdNfgDQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpMKgsP0R9aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS95YWxpYmVydHkvcGEtYWN0aW9uP2FwcGVhbF9jb2RlPW9jX3Byb3NfZW1haWxfMTEyNF9vY2VtYWlsX2ViJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTIwMiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1yb25XA3NwY0IKZ0ZZD05nGiZoo1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

Throughout my career, I have worked to keep the government from infringing upon our rights.

When I first got elected to the House in Missouri, there was a senior member who pulled me aside on a Committee hearing and said, _**“Son, let me tell you how things _really_ work up here and what you’re going to do.”**_

Long story short, I didn’t play ball. Instead, I found a way to pass Constitutional Carry in Missouri. I’m also happy to say that the same guy is the guy that I beat in the congressional primary.

And it all started because YAL Foundation helped train me.

[Donating today is one of the best ways to help liberty win across the country. Can you donate $20.24, $35, $100, or any amount to support Young Americans for Liberty Foundation?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3JLfY6WibLk2vqCQdNfgDQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpMKgsP0R9aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS95YWxpYmVydHkvcGEtYWN0aW9uP2FwcGVhbF9jb2RlPW9jX3Byb3NfZW1haWxfMTEyNF9vY2VtYWlsX2ViJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTIwMiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1yb25XA3NwY0IKZ0ZZD05nGiZoo1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

In liberty,

Congressman Eric Burlison

When I checked our inventory at 8:10 AM, we were running DANGEROUSLY LOW. Because of all your hard work this election cycle, you deserve to snag the perfect gift for that special someone or even as a gift to yourself. "As a courtesy, I’m letting you have the FIRST chance to snag this limited-edition wine glass. " | | | "Generic Button" I'm about to place my order.
