name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the indoctrination of our children
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=33fe61aa76b74deea3f259bcff2048d4&_e=BMhSTsiblgIB2Oc-rWySfGCWoXECPY5VKzwgnJ29jmJvcdH6caC2ucCmeTynCS24Jt9GJZFKcgqY6nJoo90Y_9qeFpG6mQPJ7wEtkxGCtWU1NNqsrfKn7_sQO9QwmgOTeBNVYAgI7ceosnOSGHqL-CMs16lNgiU283B3_MZuPtCzJMkSbnQ23Mp0kz-oDa3wgSYgnU7fjT1bGZeZQiHT43s7NLdTPZLJmlUpVKxWXijFCDcFfcn3B6hiWxyVOYi3BPIg3_8aUL2wzIaQdqmOMtk9GuhB5lbziFYlwK3UJiVLqsqRicWhq-3m-yClsbU-VB-y4_Z7z7G2mbFDCEQVBVJlfCTCCphe-9mKgf-ofCMI0BLCen55jf3--crp2GvSiNVlBIwnpkg710LAJFZuNg%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=33fe61aa76b74deea3f259bcff2048d4&_e=BMhSTsiblgIB2Oc-rWySfGCWoXECPY5VKzwgnJ29jmJvcdH6caC2ucCmeTynCS24Jt9GJZFKcgqY6nJoo90Y_9qeFpG6mQPJ7wEtkxGCtWU1NNqsrfKn7_sQO9QwmgOTeBNVYAgI7ceosnOSGHqL-CMs16lNgiU283B3_MZuPtCzJMkSbnQ23Mp0kz-oDa3wgSYgnU7fjT1bGZeZQiHT43s7NLdTPZLJmlUpVKxWXijFCDcFfcn3B6hiWxyVOYi3-iRI9zmKoRfNrQYtX61B96zrzNxYZmIhioczcfEC43zWaFnoII4x-9-rsTnOo3Kx-EhPH241j4Ui1G4G87XdOr66rEiTQ9XmqnDeptGafsMu3dkeKfOh9IThZwOOnNPq7Pu4SUBNAT8Gdp8VTLzHyQ%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=33fe61aa76b74deea3f259bcff2048d4&_e=BMhSTsiblgIB2Oc-rWySfGCWoXECPY5VKzwgnJ29jmJvcdH6caC2ucCmeTynCS24Jt9GJZFKcgqY6nJoo90Y_9qeFpG6mQPJ7wEtkxGCtWU1NNqsrfKn7_sQO9QwmgOTeBNVYAgI7ceosnOSGHqL-CMs16lNgiU283B3_MZuPtCzJMkSbnQ23Mp0kz-oDa3wgSYgnU7fjT1bGZeZQiHT43s7NLdTPZLJmlUpVKxWXijFCDcFfcn3B6hiWxyVOYi3I25x_V0cg5p0Yfu-WhdtaCxCjyUNKl6HuNxZIDMv8Y1FghtV5LvbophdqBIj7jfQ_1QagJeA4WfwXZBx1NJVscF2krDysDY6tCSB9Bi3Hv0G19Ww7CiceDUOxV37f2V8OHLJv8wxh4kTVc9orkCeRQ%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=33fe61aa76b74deea3f259bcff2048d4&_e=BMhSTsiblgIB2Oc-rWySfGCWoXECPY5VKzwgnJ29jmJvcdH6caC2ucCmeTynCS24Jt9GJZFKcgqY6nJoo90Y_9qeFpG6mQPJ7wEtkxGCtWU1NNqsrfKn7_sQO9QwmgOTeBNVYAgI7ceosnOSGHqL-CMs16lNgiU283B3_MZuPtCzJMkSbnQ23Mp0kz-oDa3wgSYgnU7fjT1bGZeZQiHT43s7NLdTPZLJmlUpVKxWXijFCDcFfcn3B6hiWxyVOYi3GDTmuOnmQmornzoSnJMhfe7Re_4I0R_iQvpBtnFVi1OhM5GkF9H6FuhUAeUflnUIa8kfb1_z4-jcaygTUc1xsRQi2lFpYs9Nru83dpeT_Jo3Khq2dkCReABwFhAnxAEm955peHfzqb6cTLa2k8_5gg%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=33fe61aa76b74deea3f259bcff2048d4&_e=BMhSTsiblgIB2Oc-rWySfGCWoXECPY5VKzwgnJ29jmJvcdH6caC2ucCmeTynCS24Jt9GJZFKcgqY6nJoo90Y_9qeFpG6mQPJ7wEtkxGCtWU1NNqsrfKn7_sQO9QwmgOTeBNVYAgI7ceosnOSGHqL-CMs16lNgiU283B3_MZuPtCzJMkSbnQ23Mp0kz-oDa3wgSYgnU7fjT1bGZeZQiHT43s7NLdTPZLJmlUpVKxWXijFCDcFfcn3B6hiWxyVOYi3uEZjcLJjDBMVO2jhkHXDT5qKuvLRu6HBfLoo5-ZJ1pj3gOYpawg1snP5SZrP90hmxgJnnaLC8QoJFG-T892Fos7TbQ4BB-9NP2yGam_Qy1wnSOoCn8OSRsqXb_HViJysH9582o0eki48ZSnTsu7YDA%3D%3D)

**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**

clean_body: Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Season One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you** all ten episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a Founding Supporter. | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron**Actor, Author, and Father | | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I’m sure we’re one of many reaching out today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I’m about to join them and ask if you’ll make a sustaining donation to my campaign. But before I do, let me explain why this is so important.
#

Peter — If your inbox is anything like mine, I’m sure a ton of worthy causes and activists are reaching out today to ask for your support.
I’m about to join them and ask if you’ll make a sustaining donation to my campaign. But before I do, let me explain why this is so important.
It does no good to sugarcoat it. Tough times are ahead. The Trump administration is going to come for everything we’ve accomplished together.
But don’t forget: what we believe in is worth fighting for. This country is worth fighting for. Our friends, family, and the future is worth fighting for.
And you have my word: In the fights ahead, I will not go quietly. I’ll be working at home and like hell in Washington to defend our communities from the worst Trump sends our way.
That work won’t be easy, and believe it or not, it won’t come free.
We’ve built a strong community that can win tough races and deliver meaningful change, and the surest way that we can plan for the fights ahead is if you commit to making a recurring monthly donation to my campaign.
It would mean a lot to have you on my side, Peter.
[**Can you add a monthly donation alongside the thousands of others who sustain our efforts year-round?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec24%3Frecurring%3Dtrue.WZViHP&refcode=em241202-1-160&t=1&akid=3589%2E734936%2EtESu5s)
[BECOME A MONTHLY DONOR](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec24%3Frecurring%3Dtrue.WZViHP&refcode=em241202-1-160&t=2&akid=3589%2E734936%2EtESu5s)
Can’t tell you how much this means to me, Peter.
Thanks so much, and Semper Fi.
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=3&akid=3589%2E734936%2EtESu5s). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=3589%2E734936%2EtESu5s). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=3589_734936_tESu5s&akid=3589%2E734936%2EtESu5s)

name: Signature Request [via Team Marsha]
subject: Dear President Trump,
body:
We want your name at the VERY TOP of this letter!

| |
---
| | | Hey there -

Now that the election is behind us, we are putting together a letter of support for President Trump and want YOUR name to be at the very TOP.

You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. _**[So, Friend, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7da981df4cd04a64a92bdee0ebf5d194&_e=4Zu4GifTqkTBAvtHpXrvJj6IMjU6_Zn_F1PkDtvoGsovlBh8BAZLnDPWHy2f7oXm3_Qt2vodooD_JeTNQtosHAPkw13QZ1B2_lBWEfhqIcJyLUE-Dz7znm1a9h-1rogBXBJa6QubXt5sJXleito4lbO4CB_1KkuTPGL1EAbQd2EARkNODDAVpizKbVRzQJ3I6n1X1k_iKvekdGxDnVCBC6Y6sXojnQumdAT_d9oBG3MLvfxJeyN2NIN26IPNKOBAmxfhL-_jq4WBHdGYFo8N4wPK77hCUk1qw04g6DwGbvplZOD858bxhBsiEa4IO3KxvuRujugOTV8VHU7eWl-AAoT3hsDhUB0pIMUTbs3S-qCMZgRaeFa4lOYEQDiCaXe97b48-AzxNOmqaSUJmCnhXpANTZXXn3lAdmJgndOFXZS5VV3Iy80QExPaylcPY9bH "So, Friend, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:")**_

---
| Dear President Trump,

I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States.

Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. _I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time._

From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts:

**1)** Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that **YOU** are the right person to lead America.

**2)** Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that **YOUR** leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans.

_Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration._

Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great.

Together, we will **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

Sincerely,

**[X_________________](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7da981df4cd04a64a92bdee0ebf5d194&_e=4Zu4GifTqkTBAvtHpXrvJj6IMjU6_Zn_F1PkDtvoGsovlBh8BAZLnDPWHy2f7oXm3_Qt2vodooD_JeTNQtosHAPkw13QZ1B2_lBWEfhqIcJyLUE-Dz7znm1a9h-1rogBXBJa6QubXt5sJXleito4lbO4CB_1KkuTPGL1EAbQd2EARkNODDAVpizKbVRzQJ3I6n1X1k_iKvekdGxDnVCBC6Y6sXojnQumdAT_d9oBG3MLvfxJeyN2NIN26IPNKOBAmxfhL-_jq4WBHdGYFo8N4wPK77hCUk1qw04g6DwGbvr7pKpGCl5sOsrdmVTfXpKmGjmglkliIs6N1HIulDASpq0vMHpHcj7JwwpFXbNKDwc0Udirs93h-HvmndYkXJO9Nw1G6Pu_sZkATx6twY_d7ETLng4bVTXisA5gBTrv3UfLy5_WUQYH69Vc1IVdElr1 "X_________________")**
---
| | | [SIGN THE LETTER ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7da981df4cd04a64a92bdee0ebf5d194&_e=4Zu4GifTqkTBAvtHpXrvJj6IMjU6_Zn_F1PkDtvoGsovlBh8BAZLnDPWHy2f7oXm3_Qt2vodooD_JeTNQtosHAPkw13QZ1B2_lBWEfhqIcJyLUE-Dz7znm1a9h-1rogBXBJa6QubXt5sJXleito4lbO4CB_1KkuTPGL1EAbQd2EARkNODDAVpizKbVRzQJ3I6n1X1k_iKvekdGxDnVCBC6Y6sXojnQumdAT_d9oBG3MLvfxJeyN2NIN26IPNKOBAmxfhL-_jq4WBHdGYFo8N4wPK77hCUk1qw04g6DwGbvq4XBTROcWjHDqsXILAdD5kTy3RQAA7-dBk1MAfXwg4w0XE9DsAPwqf-JCSxuHwZeHjpopEx92eLgQu1SP8A2QYpScxlfLVvxcUIPTaHCwOcr6zjgjlNvKAlaEA84ElYu67sajSNQLn8V5ITw1qs-fK "SIGN THE LETTER ")

Team Marsha

body:
We are sending this letter to President Trump at midnight. We want him to know we are standing with him! | Fellow American,

We've written a letter to President Trump to thank him for all his hard work in winning the campaign, congratulate him on winning the election, and express our excitement for him to get to work Making America Great Again.

[**The letter is only available for you to sign until midnight, so please sign now to help show President Trump that America is with him in restoring our country.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8642076a0ae2494aa3fb769ffa93095e&_e=qGcZR2lCJf26kb8I6xqn9dBYI440QHo3g_E0eAfuDS8KhTQRTlBax25LikoFZwIUsf0ACXl5ENgTIntXPslx-W5q5r0A9mTpPxzTtlG-brQS1kHGC7vhHfsBXKXWkI52feiatL3ncuIXaAAiLd5psoE1OebXk3yMmFJW0F-_aoE3P8trS14AfCoJbdz3vbc1XNiwzbNL2DzNgo4jF8p8wGTucZwp_tBZ1HjDGrzS4gxqujCyizAoMXdvLvkFrJHVOzpr-cJj39ELsD8gi1MMXx6oyNOcPUwtzC6fKvMOTsU39cqLJZzJytgJJkjqVmqHKKzTpr4NYD6ZZZRs9OoIFZ9ex-mjTywPrN6Uy60U1a5HVeaFhUUZijXNN6fSOtOrwEHS1HYYyaZUFFfj0w4DLTnuwiO4Jyg46eooMHAgYZtYfRg1DnYqY7Rqg3kfsoqYyy20wikpKL8TNQRlZyWCHQ%3D%3D)

_**Honorable President Donald J. Trump,**

We thank you for your tireless efforts and dedication, which led to your campaign's decisive victory. We look forward to your success in rebuilding our country after Joe Biden's failed presidency weakened it.

Congratulations, President Trump, on winning a second term! We are excited to see the incredible progress our country will make thanks to your steadfast leadership.

Thank you once again for taking action to Make America Great Again.

Mr. President, you can count on us to stand with you to save our country. _
[ **SIGN NOW ⇒**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8642076a0ae2494aa3fb769ffa93095e&_e=qGcZR2lCJf26kb8I6xqn9dBYI440QHo3g_E0eAfuDS8KhTQRTlBax25LikoFZwIUsf0ACXl5ENgTIntXPslx-W5q5r0A9mTpPxzTtlG-brQS1kHGC7vhHfsBXKXWkI52feiatL3ncuIXaAAiLd5psoE1OebXk3yMmFJW0F-_aoE3P8trS14AfCoJbdz3vbc1XNiwzbNL2DzNgo4jF8p8wGTucZwp_tBZ1HjDGrzS4gxqujCyizAoMXdvLvkFrJHVOzpr-cJj39ELsD8gi1MMXx6oyNOcPUwtzC6fKvMOTsU39cqLJZzJytgJJkjqVmqHe7Q08AzJJZrA6dFe_80hMlQVLLL92kdSzppu2RFXfIWJWiqJiBa2cZKXkhMVBSs4ovfLv9bTd0fP-_Efa0vtT29v6DDbMrDiLpgqagT5fYnyDv6Qs_GiaBusxBPCYvGv7hvpzv42Bxxqfi0IgIbvfQ%3D%3D)
We're hoping for thousands of Republicans to sign this letter before midnight to encourage President Trump as he leads our country to great prosperity!

[**Fellow American, your signature will help get us off to a great start. Please sign our letter to President Donald J. Trump today. >>>**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8642076a0ae2494aa3fb769ffa93095e&_e=qGcZR2lCJf26kb8I6xqn9dBYI440QHo3g_E0eAfuDS8KhTQRTlBax25LikoFZwIUsf0ACXl5ENgTIntXPslx-W5q5r0A9mTpPxzTtlG-brQS1kHGC7vhHfsBXKXWkI52feiatL3ncuIXaAAiLd5psoE1OebXk3yMmFJW0F-_aoE3P8trS14AfCoJbdz3vbc1XNiwzbNL2DzNgo4jF8p8wGTucZwp_tBZ1HjDGrzS4gxqujCyizAoMXdvLvkFrJHVOzpr-cJj39ELsD8gi1MMXx6oyNOcPUwtzC6fKvMOTsU39cqLJZzJytgJJkjqVmqHlOgKJqVFzeMCWyqX7GlSRhGJpy2IJbJdldhLtrOrmEU9kzNuKHf8HYKbgA1FnLi4UP4Axxg5y7qxt4OtzfMzabzkMBJd86cYOqbBXnTmLRD-y7kbSabvyrEKzVxTVQzXtb1LqBG85PbwkWnE8sJKQA%3D%3D)

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Wall Street is buying up family homes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Nearly half of renters [https://www.cnn.com/2024/09/12/economy/us-housing-costs-survey/index.html] are now spending more than 30 percent of their income on housing. That’s unsustainable, and corporate greed is making it worse.

Right now, private equity firms are buying up single-family residential homes nationwide. Wall Street landlords are charging excessive rents and making it harder for working- and middle-class families to buy homes.

Sign if you agree: We need to protect the American Dream and stop Wall St Landlords. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/privatization-of-housing-petition?contactdata=YwOoGcCG+1GAY1WJ76xVNg2UfRFKkFGIOJEZ4hoeG0T+VeKkaVjQY+IYjeZ6ag/nr4cj0UVCAZ57vaopZtdrznogiAuDzLhJ0bifUpZXh8T+hz8i3mGhefTV5etllcTMZSQgwONtXFtzOK77xhHOaw==]

It’s time for Congress to put an end to Wall Street’s real estate grab. That’s why I’ve introduced the Stop Wall Street Landlords Act, which would ban private equity firms from obtaining loans backed by the Federal Housing Finance Agency and related government entities for the purchase of single-family residential homes.

Putting a roof over one’s head is a basic human right. Whether they seek to rent or to own, every American deserves access to affordable housing. Let’s tell Congress to pass the Stop Wall Street Landlords Act and stamp out housing inequality . [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/privatization-of-housing-petition]

Thank you for your activism and all that you do.

In solidarity,
Ro

name: David Hogg
subject: Time to get back to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
|
---
Friend, **It’s taken me a few days for me to figure out what to say about the election without feeling cliche or resorting to platitudes. Now, we’re left to figure out what’s next.** After Parkland, if we had given up and listened to the same talking heads who got us into this situation — the same talking heads who said nothing could be done about guns in Florida — **nothing would have changed.** Instead, we had the audacity to believe that change was possible, which resulted in Florida raising the age to buy a gun to 21 and passing a Red Flag law that has been used over 19,000 times. This moment calls on us to do the same. The most important thing we can do is remain hopeful because without that nothing will change. I refuse to give up, I hope that you don’t either. Young people have risen up and become leaders during times of great challenge: We helped elect the first openly transgender member of Congress ever, Sarah McBride, even as millions were spent by the GOP on hate-filled, transphobic ads. Dante Pittman flipped a seat in the NC legislature breaking the GOP’s supermajority in North Carolina, allowing a Democratic Governor, Josh Stein, more policy freedom. We flipped a seat in Georgia, electing Bryce Berry as the youngest person and first ever active public school teacher to ever serve in the Georgia state legislature. We re-elected Molly Cook to be the youngest person in the Texas Senate, Oscar De Los Santos to be the youngest member of leadership in the Arizona House, and we elected Christine Cockley to be the youngest member of the Ohio House. Of course, these victories are bittersweet against the backdrop of the presidential election, but we are going to need these young progressive champions fighting for us now more than ever. I’m so proud of the work we all did electing them. Your support has made it possible for these young people to win – and together with Serve America, we're ready to help even more young leaders succeed. [**Will you split a $20 donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America to help us recruit, train, and elect the next generation of progressive champions?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98024554/515314034/-150563143?refcode=241202&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjYwYWIxMC1lZWIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-ndp1B34-5RYElQCHwUMYp7CBoU697svhxPBxKbxU4k=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98024555/515314035/-442632316?refcode=241202&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjYwYWIxMC1lZWIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-ndp1B34-5RYElQCHwUMYp7CBoU697svhxPBxKbxU4k=) Hope is the most powerful force any movement can have. Thankfully, it is the one thing Donald Trump can’t take from us – the only way he truly wins is if we give up hope. I’m not. I know you won’t either. Thank you to everyone who has shown their support of our work. By joining forces with Serve America, we're building an even stronger movement to elect young progressive leaders. [**Will you chip in $20 now, split between our organizations, to help us continue this vital work?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98024556/515314036/-150563143?refcode=241202&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjYwYWIxMC1lZWIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-ndp1B34-5RYElQCHwUMYp7CBoU697svhxPBxKbxU4k=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98024557/515314037/-442632316?refcode=241202&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjYwYWIxMC1lZWIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-ndp1B34-5RYElQCHwUMYp7CBoU697svhxPBxKbxU4k=) In service, David Hogg

| Peter,

With Republicans in control of Congress, Donald Trump has a clear path to force through his extreme MAGA agenda.

After Republicans elected Mike Johnson to serve another term as Speaker of the House and John Thune as Senate Majority Leader, they’re wasting no time. From escalating Trump’s inhumane immigration policies to renewing Trump’s 2017 tax cuts for the wealthy to cutting funding for critical programs that millions of Americans rely on.

**With razor-thin majorities in the House and Senate, they’re moving fast to ram through their extreme and dangerous agenda by any means necessary – _and we must act now!_**

We’ve seen the devastating impact of Trump’s policies before. This time, the MAGA machine is better organized, better funded, and dead set on reshaping America to benefit the ultra-wealthy and powerful.

name: Autism Health
subject: Join Us This Giving Tuesday: Empower the Autism Community
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| **Together, We Can Make a Difference**
---
| Dear Supporters, This Giving Tuesday, Autism Health Inc. invites you to join our mission to empower individuals and families impacted by autism. As a nonprofit organization, we are dedicated to providing resources, education, and holistic health solutions that improve lives and inspire hope. Every dollar donated helps us expand our programs, reach more families, and create events like the [Autism Health Summit](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=c738b2ec96&e=3a42edfdc4), which brings advocates, experts, and families together for a brighter future. Your support is more than just a contribution, it’s a lifeline for those who need it most. The autism community faces unique challenges, and access to meaningful support can make all the difference. Your generosity helps us provide critical tools, connect families with life-changing resources, and foster a sense of belonging and understanding. Together, we can break down barriers and build a more inclusive and empowered community. This Giving Tuesday will make an impact that lasts a lifetime. Donate today to Autism Health Inc. and be a part of the change we strive to create every day. Visit www.AutismHealth.com to contribute and help us continue our vital work. Thank you for your kindness, compassion, and commitment to making a difference.
With Gratitude,
**The Autism Health Inc. Team**

---
|
---
| **YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE!** Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance!
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=0b8acef5a7&e=3a42edfdc4 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: You are invited to our Annual Holiday Party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
You are invited!

|
---
Dear Hoosier Democrats, The results last month weren't what we'd hoped for, but we do want to spend time giving thanks for our great candidates who ran for office up and down the ballot at the Skyline Club in downtown Indianapolis for our annual **IDP Holiday Party on Friday, December 13 at 7 PM ET.** **[You can RSVP by clicking her](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98024750/515314834/-2008278698?refcode=2412holiday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjhhZTMwYy1lZmIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f7j6uo0WKzotHIHq2jYRTUPcA4QvTOiLTmuq5h1FfcA=)**[**e.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98024756/515314841/-2008278698?refcode=2412holiday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjhhZTMwYy1lZmIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f7j6uo0WKzotHIHq2jYRTUPcA4QvTOiLTmuq5h1FfcA=) We are proud of Jennifer McCormick, Terry Goodin, Valerie McCray, and Destiny Wells. We congratulate U.S. Reps. André Carson and Frank Mrvan on their wins and also congratulate the State House Caucus and the State Senate Caucus on protecting every single one of their incumbent seats. We held the line in our state when lots of other states can't say the same. Our annual holiday party is one of the best events of the year as we come together as Democrats for fellowship and to plan for the future. Please join our candidates, our supporters, and the IDP team for a fun night in downtown Indianapolis and **[RSVP now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98024760/515314846/-2008278698?refcode=2412holiday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjhhZTMwYy1lZmIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f7j6uo0WKzotHIHq2jYRTUPcA4QvTOiLTmuq5h1FfcA=)** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98024761/515314849/82561469?refcode=2412holiday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjhhZTMwYy1lZmIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f7j6uo0WKzotHIHq2jYRTUPcA4QvTOiLTmuq5h1FfcA=) Thanks so much, Indiana Democratic Party

Peter—

There are less than 24 hours until Giving Tuesday, one of the most important days of the year for the Center to raise crucial funds for our fight.

[**You don't have to wait until tomorrow to fuel the fight for reproductive rights. Give early and give generously—because every single dollar of your gift to the Center for Reproductive Rights will be TRIPLED.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98025375/515317479/59579377?sourceid=1150064&utm_campaign=25emkge-1115aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=3xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmNiNTE4YS1mMGIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9kbyTnNTVL2gFSfnTTsxnoNMG4xQdr3n-oVEhoioI9Y=&emci=e62871f2-92ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=22cb518a-f0b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=954237)

This is an incredible opportunity, and it could not have come at a better time. It will take all of us doing everything in our power to fight back against what promises to be a regressive and extremist incoming administration.

**But the lives and safety of women and pregnant people across the country are not up for grabs. Here at the Center, we will do what we always do—fight for our rights.**

Your support matters now more than ever. [**Make your Giving Tuesday gift while it will have 3X the impact!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98025377/515317483/59579377?sourceid=1150064&utm_campaign=25emkge-1115aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=3xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmNiNTE4YS1mMGIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9kbyTnNTVL2gFSfnTTsxnoNMG4xQdr3n-oVEhoioI9Y=&emci=e62871f2-92ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=22cb518a-f0b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=954237)

| | Team,

As Governor, I promise I will always work to bring you service with a smile and a tax cut! I’ll be New Jersey’s “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs” Governor. As Governor, I promise I will always work to bring you service with a smile and a tax cut! I’ll be New Jersey’s “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs” Governor. From the top of the menu with the “Gottheimer’s Gott-Your-Back Bagel” to the “Child Care Casserole,” all the way to our specials, I’m ready to get to work serving the people of Jersey and delivering solutions to the real problems that they are facing. | | | | | | | Thank you, Josh | Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ddfa82179cb448d7813ab40202d64a7e&_e=CoJQRPjlXW6dQb-UllA9mE-gyieuvXcyyM_lOp2jv8ANENZXj2Ah7T6bSrb_b-U1Uyft3oC0dXeQFhmuu3PmF8PbVgOmpe3fhGMJ46YodIL9afpuvlZUdcLL1P74is_aQ39zYv1ZDhDeDWJ49Tx0cJMIfmWcRBl9bnDDDUlIVMVARtUyjEmbDGkdbye2IOJ31gCZxZyLZXdIhRxW7bk84KF537z8Pu4PmC7IoZC3SQcYfpYq2yTEbxLx6Asp38s8uhGTAQj7LjtA8s6EcLMms6s9v41uUC9DQ79aPd_-Zbl-Pm_yKCSDZ89sJ-Xojum_kw9lC2Imh8rHc2ey1lrLs9p_Ak_IExU18GlKr6NYK1UNq8bQUjofJsqGWBEOoMqTL58tZyjhBvJegiM3eXSZlYsOpO-l5klSlPi0-v3UCdM%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ddfa82179cb448d7813ab40202d64a7e&_e=CoJQRPjlXW6dQb-UllA9mE-gyieuvXcyyM_lOp2jv8ANENZXj2Ah7T6bSrb_b-U1Uyft3oC0dXeQFhmuu3PmF8PbVgOmpe3fhGMJ46YodIL9afpuvlZUdcLL1P74is_aQ39zYv1ZDhDeDWJ49Tx0cJMIfmWcRBl9bnDDDUlIVMVARtUyjEmbDGkdbye2IOJ31gCZxZyLZXdIhRxW7bk84KF537z8Pu4PmC7IoZC3SQcYfpYq2yTEbxLx6Asp38s8oKqKRNBOIZRIc8FB0kYOBxjvDAeemBGRILpkbjY6NrAAHqredHHDJR1usC8FcHMXKIOPpiMywzMInhOx1tH5EDEZi0zuBN4qWi9WhJkSNg1OtM9X8ivvLOl2tmWdHdWbdp487iq8n-e20fmq9s1ZgsUha_WpQDGJaZo9TIqJXe8%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ddfa82179cb448d7813ab40202d64a7e&_e=CoJQRPjlXW6dQb-UllA9mE-gyieuvXcyyM_lOp2jv8ANENZXj2Ah7T6bSrb_b-U1Uyft3oC0dXeQFhmuu3PmF8PbVgOmpe3fhGMJ46YodIL9afpuvlZUdcLL1P74is_aQ39zYv1ZDhDeDWJ49Tx0cJMIfmWcRBl9bnDDDUlIVMVARtUyjEmbDGkdbye2IOJ31gCZxZyLZXdIhRxW7bk84KF537z8Pu4PmC7IoZC3SQcYfpYq2yTEbxLx6Asp38s8pYo2YkWP6CLiOwHrE4I_0yWCl-riSuLy62ypoJRafwo_2DfYOF5iNQiNB6Jgxz2bXv0PqnT9eslBh_p1SH26S3ZaMr7LM2Lpoccvb03kNvWhQ4uG7hgCoFdU0HzMIoYAodzr4EdEWBjXKzAQDGDkXsFU4dNQgfmjFLU4ak3FmvE%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ddfa82179cb448d7813ab40202d64a7e&_e=CoJQRPjlXW6dQb-UllA9mE-gyieuvXcyyM_lOp2jv8ANENZXj2Ah7T6bSrb_b-U1Uyft3oC0dXeQFhmuu3PmF8PbVgOmpe3fhGMJ46YodIL9afpuvlZUdcLL1P74is_aQ39zYv1ZDhDeDWJ49Tx0cJMIfmWcRBl9bnDDDUlIVMVARtUyjEmbDGkdbye2IOJ31gCZxZyLZXdIhRxW7bk84KF537z8Pu4PmC7IoZC3SQcYfpYq2yTEbxLx6Asp38s85RHGVlD_ByE2jyWhy_roCWn_DwzHFndzCRwe4VF2aXduvEWJ0YWkMejc0pWzp45t5mOo9LoK-XqTu1SGs2L50jONvoHgWfJX3Cucxmrhpe3Pl1_4OoXKTzmK0KLbxefH98CknDaN4rF5JmOsZLvZtgk6np8efltGAi8laHPMvlQ%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father

| Peter,

Every few months, my team and I make it a point to reach out to our supporters to hear what issues you care most about. Now, after we reassess some of our 2024 losses across the country and here in Virginia, we’re reaching out to hear from YOU on what issues are most important to you this election.

As I’ve traveled around the Commonwealth this year, I’ve heard directly from voters on the issues that matter most going into 2025, but I also know I can’t meet everyone, so these surveys are a great way for me to hear from you directly.

**I take your feedback seriously and appreciate your input. We’re trying to get at least 10 responses from your town, so if you’re able, please take a few minutes to complete the survey!**

name: David Hogg
subject: Time to get back to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We are not going back.
| Hey team,

**It’s taken me a few weeks for me to figure out what to say about Election Day without feeling cliche or resorting to platitudes. Now, we’re left to figure out what’s next.**

After Parkland, if we had given up and listened to the same talking heads who got us into this situation — the same talking heads who said nothing could be done about guns in Florida — **nothing would have changed.**

Instead, we had the audacity to believe that change was possible, which resulted in Florida raising the age to buy a gun to 21 _and_ passing a Red Flag law that has been used over 19,000 times.

This moment calls on us to do the same. The most important thing we can do is remain hopeful because without that nothing will change. I refuse to give up, I hope that you don’t either.

Young people have risen up and become leaders during times of great challenge:

On Election Day, we helped elect the first openly transgender member of Congress ever, Sarah McBride, even as millions were spent by the GOP on hate-filled, transphobic ads.

Dante Pittman flipped a seat in the NC legislature breaking the GOP’s supermajority in North Carolina, allowing a Democratic Governor, Josh Stein, more policy freedom.

We flipped a seat in Georgia, electing Bryce Berry as the youngest person and first ever active public school teacher to ever serve in the Georgia state legislature.

We re-elected Molly Cook to be the youngest person in the Texas Senate, Oscar De Los Santos to be the youngest member of leadership in the Arizona House, and we elected Christine Cockley to be the youngest member of the Ohio House.

Of course, these victories are bittersweet against the backdrop of the presidential election, but we are going to need these young progressive champions fighting for us now more than ever. I’m so proud of the work we all did electing them.

Your support has made it possible for these young people to win – and together with Voter Protection Project, we're ready to help even more young leaders succeed. [Will you split a $10 donation between Leaders We Deserve and Voter Protection Project to help us recruit, train, and elect the next generation of progressive champions?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85223?t=6&akid=18121%2E878179%2EKEWWj8) | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85223?t=7&akid=18121%2E878179%2EKEWWj8)
---
Hope is the most powerful force any movement can have. Thankfully, it is the one thing Donald Trump can’t take from us – the only way he truly wins is if we give up hope. I’m not. I know you won’t either.

Thank you to everyone who has shown their support of our work. By joining forces with Voter Protection Project, we're building an even stronger movement to elect young progressive leaders. [Will you chip in $10 now, split between our organizations, to help us continue this vital work?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85223?t=8&akid=18121%2E878179%2EKEWWj8)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Leaders We Deserve and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85224?t=9&akid=18121%2E878179%2EKEWWj8)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85225?t=10&akid=18121%2E878179%2EKEWWj8)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85226?t=11&akid=18121%2E878179%2EKEWWj8)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85227?t=12&akid=18121%2E878179%2EKEWWj8)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85223?t=13&akid=18121%2E878179%2EKEWWj8)
In service,

David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18121%2E878179%2EKEWWj8). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18121%2E878179%2EKEWWj8).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18121%2E878179%2EKEWWj8) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=18121%2E878179%2EKEWWj8). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18121%2E878179%2EKEWWj8)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=18121%2E878179%2EKEWWj8)

Peter,
Olive the Owl here! 🦉 I’m nocturnal and usually asleep during the day, but I couldn’t contain my excitement and had to reach out. I may not know much about this “Cyber Monday” thing, but I’ve got an incredible opportunity for you:
**[Right now, your gift to the Save the Redwoods League will go three times as far, thanks to a special match.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98026501/515321115/471999250?contactdata=fgh34P48yl4xUEcKUvAB/rLtYnAkmDkpdFChjdvVe757gS9SAol3/X0tCBEhdYRyR1BgO//VpOHUg4SmcvhbTmldbrvIvz2oyzf5n5NFc6jfhrS8giDn7ZjTjbACiCHcA++owHIVuili/t7ZwiwcytX6P2pnYqlQ329hTbl6t70=&ms=GT24_EM4_Link1&sourceid=1166159&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0OWMzZWMwLWYzYjAtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HWyx4hPw0KZZ6q3XcxceZv5lHRX2_Toi_bCJr77DJUg=&emci=14e005cd-98a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=449c3ec0-f3b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=1504551) Every dollar up to $100,000 will have three times the impact towards saving Sonoma Coast Redwoods—forever. _Owl_ have to admit, that’s fantastic news!**
**[Triple Your Gift: Protect Sonoma Coast Redwoods »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98026502/515321116/471999250?contactdata=fgh34P48yl4xUEcKUvAB/rLtYnAkmDkpdFChjdvVe757gS9SAol3/X0tCBEhdYRyR1BgO//VpOHUg4SmcvhbTmldbrvIvz2oyzf5n5NFc6jfhrS8giDn7ZjTjbACiCHcA++owHIVuili/t7ZwiwcytX6P2pnYqlQ329hTbl6t70=&ms=GT24_EM4_Link2&sourceid=1166159&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0OWMzZWMwLWYzYjAtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HWyx4hPw0KZZ6q3XcxceZv5lHRX2_Toi_bCJr77DJUg=&emci=14e005cd-98a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=449c3ec0-f3b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=1504551)**
**You can do something incredible today** —protect the breathtaking, resilient redwood forests of Sonoma Coast Redwoods from development and preserve it’s natural beauty for future generations.
**_Whooo_ would benefit from saving Sonoma Coast Redwoods? Well... everyone!**
Owls like me depend on redwoods to make our homes. Other native species like the rare Sonoma spineflower and Sonoma tree vole flourish here too. The entire forest is teeming with biodiversity. **It’s a special and truly iconic redwood landscape along California's rugged coast.**
I know humans like you love redwood forests like Sonoma Coast Redwoods as well. Protecting this property will help increase public access and recreation opportunities, safeguard centuries of cultural history, and preserve the incredible carbon storage capacity of these redwood forests.
[**Match my Giving TREESday Gift »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98026503/515321117/471999250?contactdata=fgh34P48yl4xUEcKUvAB/rLtYnAkmDkpdFChjdvVe757gS9SAol3/X0tCBEhdYRyR1BgO//VpOHUg4SmcvhbTmldbrvIvz2oyzf5n5NFc6jfhrS8giDn7ZjTjbACiCHcA++owHIVuili/t7ZwiwcytX6P2pnYqlQ329hTbl6t70=&ms=GT24_EM4_Link3&sourceid=1166159&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0OWMzZWMwLWYzYjAtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HWyx4hPw0KZZ6q3XcxceZv5lHRX2_Toi_bCJr77DJUg=&emci=14e005cd-98a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=449c3ec0-f3b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=1504551)
Today may be Cyber Monday, but I like thinking about it as **Giving TREESday Eve** instead!
**Tomorrow is an important day for the redwoods.[If we can meet our $100,000 goal, we’ll be one step closer to protecting Sonoma Coast Redwoods, forever.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98026504/515321118/471999250?contactdata=fgh34P48yl4xUEcKUvAB/rLtYnAkmDkpdFChjdvVe757gS9SAol3/X0tCBEhdYRyR1BgO//VpOHUg4SmcvhbTmldbrvIvz2oyzf5n5NFc6jfhrS8giDn7ZjTjbACiCHcA++owHIVuili/t7ZwiwcytX6P2pnYqlQ329hTbl6t70=&ms=GT24_EM4_Link4&sourceid=1166159&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0OWMzZWMwLWYzYjAtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HWyx4hPw0KZZ6q3XcxceZv5lHRX2_Toi_bCJr77DJUg=&emci=14e005cd-98a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=449c3ec0-f3b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=1504551)**
Owls like me can’t exactly make a Giving TREESday gift (they won’t let me open a bank account, I’ve tried. I just wing it with my investments), but YOU can make a difference for me and all the wildlife that make our home here. Peter, will you [**make your gift now while it will go 3X as far?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98026505/515321119/471999250?contactdata=fgh34P48yl4xUEcKUvAB/rLtYnAkmDkpdFChjdvVe757gS9SAol3/X0tCBEhdYRyR1BgO//VpOHUg4SmcvhbTmldbrvIvz2oyzf5n5NFc6jfhrS8giDn7ZjTjbACiCHcA++owHIVuili/t7ZwiwcytX6P2pnYqlQ329hTbl6t70=&ms=GT24_EM4_Link5&sourceid=1166159&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0OWMzZWMwLWYzYjAtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HWyx4hPw0KZZ6q3XcxceZv5lHRX2_Toi_bCJr77DJUg=&emci=14e005cd-98a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=449c3ec0-f3b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=1504551)

| Olive the Northern Spotted Owl 🦉

clean_body: It's giving trees Peter, Olive the Owl here! 🦉 I’m nocturnal and usually asleep during the day, but I couldn’t contain my excitement and had to reach out. I may not know much about this “Cyber Monday” thing, but I’ve got an incredible opportunity for you: Every dollar up to $100,000 will have three times the impact towards saving Sonoma Coast Redwoods—forever. Owl have to admit, that’s fantastic news! You can do something incredible today —protect the breathtaking, resilient redwood forests of Sonoma Coast Redwoods from development and preserve it’s natural beauty for future generations. Whooo would benefit from saving Sonoma Coast Redwoods? Well... everyone! Owls like me depend on redwoods to make our homes. Other native species like the rare Sonoma spineflower and Sonoma tree vole flourish here too. The entire forest is teeming with biodiversity. It’s a special and truly iconic redwood landscape along California's rugged coast. I know humans like you love redwood forests like Sonoma Coast Redwoods as well. Protecting this property will help increase public access and recreation opportunities, safeguard centuries of cultural history, and preserve the incredible carbon storage capacity of these redwood forests. Today may be Cyber Monday, but I like thinking about it as Giving TREESday Eve instead! Tomorrow is an important day for the redwoods. Owls like me can’t exactly make a Giving TREESday gift (they won’t let me open a bank account, I’ve tried. I just wing it with my investments), but YOU can make a difference for me and all the wildlife that make our home here. Peter, will you Yours Truly, | Olive the Northern Spotted Owl 🦉 ---|--- P.S. I forgot to say: thank you! Friends like you whooo love our forests and help protect them are the best. We’re owl in this together and | Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States tel:415-362-2352 | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- |

name: Larry Kudlow
subject: The New York Sun’s Urgent Mission
body:
As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.
It's a voice America needs

| | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=96d837f861814b0097edb6a2c45f653f&_e=bcUpcsEH2bVqTaKZ9KfH6pLyq_AMdh508xh3OfsZk0W5wqhjQMcRLf7E47Bgmsvg5aQp-6vCl32zBR3UCJTIn--pEa3MF2R0g0a7i875kKHtR_muO2PBcI4gkQHdCFX_PdWyECQbfqFueFQ4KgDyCshVAhA3tMKtnxjoYcbKxRtMHadqWlSLKFZABiPVBq15NFKOwT9-7LLpFzFyg09fLDmKC7dSR343nLLB9RTnIMTAi6o8j4vyccdLp8BmC1gfvfML1dm-eEhnvBx_R36oK6JudtILuan4LyMwIfeB-DOVSltpXdHepQzH__njPOieBkWuIlVWfumHgYbHyOZWXXcLZz2VX05Dzdexsmz1biKGhmLJ8kJOMKDeY9kdyfv0)

---
# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---
| | [Join the Sun Now →](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=96d837f861814b0097edb6a2c45f653f&_e=bcUpcsEH2bVqTaKZ9KfH6pLyq_AMdh508xh3OfsZk0W5wqhjQMcRLf7E47Bgmsvg5aQp-6vCl32zBR3UCJTIn--pEa3MF2R0g0a7i875kKHtR_muO2PBcI4gkQHdCFX_PdWyECQbfqFueFQ4KgDyCshVAhA3tMKtnxjoYcbKxRtMHadqWlSLKFZABiPVBq15NFKOwT9-7LLpFzFyg09fLDmKC7dSR343nLLB9RTnIMR0xMDhUGPu_ST7p4OJHktjn65HpIBhA3A5VoJKvGm_6jQ0ePx5cMZHpuADP1j9F-rFojxzAFAN2G978I1SxXloQv7PxeIVD7KyUy-EUhwrCh0CF71GBgyoLWgZRIOY_mdWxNglkB8aPPamL6Ey7N9N)
---
| | Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs.
---
| | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=96d837f861814b0097edb6a2c45f653f&_e=bcUpcsEH2bVqTaKZ9KfH6pLyq_AMdh508xh3OfsZk0W5wqhjQMcRLf7E47Bgmsvg5aQp-6vCl32zBR3UCJTIn--pEa3MF2R0g0a7i875kKHtR_muO2PBcI4gkQHdCFX_PdWyECQbfqFueFQ4KgDyCshVAhA3tMKtnxjoYcbKxRtMHadqWlSLKFZABiPVBq15NFKOwT9-7LLpFzFyg09fLDmKC7dSR343nLLB9RTnIMRvUlK6gQ-lG5IihMVZSHjKWp_i4L_AwbeHfq8rShHikdLRw6IgJWX8_djjSKZ1sOXEn7OqVfRCn-9v9q0ZP3aAIMT47NofSJEoPADx2Av0AYruTpn61e3KUq91yRBNk8Mbs25CalQ32XlvTHyevhEG)

our records indicate that you didn’t complete questions 3 and 6 in our urgent poll.
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22591%2E4449941%2EI001dS)
---
Hello,

Last week, we sent you our urgent poll asking if you agreed that we need to protect Social Security from Republican cuts.

But our records indicate that you didn’t complete questions 3 and 6. These questions are vital to shaping our strategy to save Social Security.

So we’re re-opening our poll and giving you a second chance to complete them. **[_Click HERE or use the button below to sign »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll?source=FFR_20241202_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=22591%2E4449941%2EI001dS)** | [COMPLETE POLL NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll?source=FFR_20241202_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=22591%2E4449941%2EI001dS)
---
We’ve attached the original poll below for your records. Thanks,

Fight for Reform

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Review by 11:59PM [FFR]
Subject: For Social Security, this is the worst case scenario
To: Top Democrat
**ACTION REQUIRED: YOU MUST SUBMIT RESPONSE BY 12/02/2024**
**We are seriously trying not to panic, team** – If the GOP successfully cuts Social Security benefits, the most vulnerable among us face an uncertain future!

That’s why we’ve sent out an **urgent Social Security poll for your area****:** _we need your input for our strategy to save Social Security!_
**[_Do you agree we need to protect Social Security from Republican cuts and save our seniors?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll?source=FFR_20241202_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=22591%2E4449941%2EI001dS)** | **[Yes, I agree! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll?source=FFR_20241202_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=22591%2E4449941%2EI001dS)**

**[I’m not sure »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll?source=FFR_20241202_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=22591%2E4449941%2EI001dS)**
**_WE NEED 150 LOCAL RESPONSES BY 12/02/2024, 11:59 PM ET_ **
We can’t let MAGA Republicans demolish our earned benefits.

We really need you to speak up, team.

Fight For Reform

name: Harry's Phone
subject: I wanted to personally thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dunn's Democracy Defenders PAC

**The Supreme Court is completely broken.**

_They have:_

⮕ **Overturned five decades of reproductive rights
⮕ **Curtailed the EPA’s power to regulate greenhouse gas emissions
⮕ **Radically expanded the Second Amendment
⮕ **Effectively turned Presidents and Vice Presidents into Kings and Queens!

They won’t stop until they use the power entrusted in them to essentially become a rubber stamp of the most extreme parts of the Republican platform.

[Please Peter, we must collect 7 signatures from 18326 to make an impact, so we really need your name. Will you sign our petition right now? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98027509/515324758/1046108744?refcode=RTFC_20241202_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGZjZDhjNy1mOGIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7O3uV_u1bOXXjGp7T4gkKLbbpRBSvAe1wQeRSUs3tA0=&emci=82974b80-f3ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=50fcd8c7-f8b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=34594689)********

_Torres HQ_

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Don't despair -- act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
This team has always stepped up to defend our right to vote. And you're starting to again. We're not telling you this is going to be easy. But with all of us, standing together, firmly entrenched to protect voting rights? Anything is possible.
Team, RUSH $25 or more ahead of Giving Tuesday to jump-start our efforts to expand ballot access and so much more >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120224_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120224_2&amount=25]
Team,
Giving Tuesday is right around the corner, and we cannot think of a better gift for everyone than protecting our right to vote.
We're not going to lie -- we know things look bleak. Opponents of voting rights had a good Election Day. We're staring down the barrel of more suppressive policies. That's no reason to give up, however, and we can't afford to throw our hands up and obey in advance. Not with the court cases, state bills, new laws, special elections, and so much more on the horizon.
We've set our goal to raise $50,000 from grassroots donors to help mobilize and defend voting rights before state legislative sessions start next year.
Will you chip in $25 or more to help reach our must-hit $50,000 fundraising goal before December 31? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120224_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Voter Action Project was founded to expand mail-in ballot access during the pandemic.
When voting rights were threatened in the wake of the 2020 election, we mobilized to fight back against the wave of voter suppression that swept across the country with more than 400 bills in 49 of 50 states.
Since then we've been on the front lines of every battle for our right to vote, from Congressional legislation to court cases to voter registration to voter turnout in the last two elections. We've helped countless voters register, find their polling place, get informed about the issues, and make their ballot count.
Simply put: There's no way we're giving up now. Not for a second. Not ever.
Team -- to accomplish these goals we need everyone with us. Fuel our efforts for Giving Tuesday and more with $25 or whatever you can give today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120224_2&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120224_2&amount=25]

#
Friend of Life,

After the overturning of Roe v. Wade, the abortion pill became the #1 threat to preborn babies in America. Knowing roughly 1,700 innocent preborn babies lose their lives to this pill each day:

Now is the time to declare war on the abortion pill. [ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1f7bd7fcb2f54c97ac8a23906548edd2&_e=R0uxM9K0H2q8i76rHSGuOQLqhhGnrc1SrN2objyQ7H_jZTMV21aeV0VB0rdoubjftKmi-9x6c_R5WN3uaAdlLflDUHUPBBjrV--_Tb942ln204rq13lSL3UHdNZ6Y_RgJO39E7RBPBviuR1Hr4lt-zQmeMtpbRqeaorLpBC5OwdAKOFCCGzf5LdyvtcYsAY2sxVEqdado2OeO-GFxPSih1L5hh-rUPaNwjtajVSnCSAscTLFVeXes3Crd4BoSG6oe_2NMB1Yp-3LmHwcEtFSjVG2QyBJ3Ns6iHZ8mJDVuwy_V9J7R2R_0xRm0hRgC6S79iiTlrPLw0tVq_oK3WhDuCh_M7erGlcCtSQlON1cK8Y%3D)
When you give today to help expose the harms of the dangerous abortion pill, your donation will enable:
* Advertising of important abortion pill-related content that has already proven to change minds and save lives, including Live Action's "I Saw My Baby" project and a re-launch of our "Abortion Pill Kills" educational campaign
* Spreading of an urgent petition to President-elect Donald Trump, RFK, Jr., Elon Musk, and Vivek Ramaswamy to defund Planned Parenthood
* Ongoing education about the life-saving Abortion Pill Reversal treatment so mothers can potentially save their children even after taking the first abortion pill

Your generous Giving Tuesday donation will fuel these projects and more.

Will you partner with us to take on the abortion pill in order to end this fatal threat to preborn babies?

**We must reach people in all 50 states, but that can only happen if generous, pro-life people like you step up. Thanks to a generous matching grant, your gift will be DOUBLED when you donate today.**

Click on the link below to reach twice as many people with the truth about the abortion pill that has proven to change minds and save lives.**[https://give.liveaction.org/defeat-the-abortion-pill-2x/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1f7bd7fcb2f54c97ac8a23906548edd2&_e=R0uxM9K0H2q8i76rHSGuOQLqhhGnrc1SrN2objyQ7H_jZTMV21aeV0VB0rdoubjftKmi-9x6c_R5WN3uaAdlLflDUHUPBBjrV--_Tb942ln204rq13lSL3UHdNZ6Y_RgJO39E7RBPBviuR1Hr4lt-zQmeMtpbRqeaorLpBC5OwdAKOFCCGzf5LdyvtcYsAY2sxVEqdado2OeO-GFxPSih4mWE1Fxc51N_183Pj0wZecK1EgGuy_O78F_A2IVOBOmlNp4fmeE4YGKScSuXnGhffzXHrc9puBX_SK82SQPdJc_1jO9bOGeFvY9IhQX_NB8ZToKdLDBhvXE1oNe6VSf8OAxD8R8C-V_zcx2Erp-rhQ%3D)****
**
For Life,

Josef Lipp
**Chief Operating Officer**

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1f7bd7fcb2f54c97ac8a23906548edd2&_e=R0uxM9K0H2q8i76rHSGuOQLqhhGnrc1SrN2objyQ7H_jZTMV21aeV0VB0rdoubjftKmi-9x6c_R5WN3uaAdlLflDUHUPBBjrV--_Tb942ln204rq13lSL3UHdNZ6Y_RgJO39E7RBPBviuR1Hr4lt-zQmeMtpbRqeaorLpBC5OwdAKOFCCGzf5LdyvtcYsAY2sxVEqdado2OeO-GFxPSih114WTKpFQQxwBKKg-7vwA67jGDrGbHDg9gaf8oKkI9YpgrXbbEPLqi9fiM-e6T2fugPMaW0jPA5WeN0vRK0sokv7k2-5fPQk8WByz7xgYYVw0A0AWAXwqvKSQv9w91Z9byqY1GMFfdt8BJx_1_HV40%3D)

I promise to make this quick. The first weeks after an election are CRITICAL to learning the lessons we need to WIN the next one. This is when we look at the data, compile the results, and make bold adjustments to our strategy going forward. [_**Which is why I just launched my FIRST Democratic Priorities Survey of the next election. I need feedback from 50,000 strong Democrats before midnight tonight to get an accurate sample size, and compile the results we need to strengthen our strategy and WIN going forward. It would mean so much if you could take 30 seconds to share your feedback with me before midnight tonight >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98027852/515325947/1530912523?source=20241202_em_pet_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGZkZGY3YS1mOWIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XnV6raVIDx7oH7Se-WhWY5ZGGfdfJsBXS-1pM3-NMN4=&emci=f0cf6104-dab0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=a8fddf7a-f9b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=16320219) I’m looking forward to reading your responses!
Nancy

Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans. # **[Kari Lake](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7bfd552aa42c439d9d05a8b18218da58&_e=JCA7aIaf0fuTWJRH96NQC-lSGb3H8EKleFV4h0GfQi_RBeDagSTZo5EEWxUaEBQZvTjOAkZMuL84BHzDkF-cwwWYPZd3lHW3HW_6fqqOSAOx9JLOgug-P0MELhG4OwFKr95I6ds0ilA01b7RRfQn5WlsNNmETLOD4R-GYzGC5EDoYsMeubQvcccxxSBa5mAG0KRqYyGd85fVBLvWXTzd1Ao1lW7IYbtohZ6Ahz363Lc9rGuY49Y9pvxLlSkSanE_xxHcP8MK2ID5Z5s9kiKGzZ2XufwaJixiL8_d4t18UHIzQI5EQdzqSYE5PAWSwfcvwbLgBG3mmmylpJt-rqi8ksYtk91APRlN6n03i1kIuRH0y1ZZOdmmexUEIQ1F79JWJGJ6z-aWbEnaHhIff4NDMNP-pCIqEXJJvKZJmYHcBIM%3D)**

| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7bfd552aa42c439d9d05a8b18218da58&_e=JCA7aIaf0fuTWJRH96NQC-lSGb3H8EKleFV4h0GfQi_RBeDagSTZo5EEWxUaEBQZvTjOAkZMuL84BHzDkF-cwwWYPZd3lHW3HW_6fqqOSAOx9JLOgug-P0MELhG4OwFKr95I6ds0ilA01b7RRfQn5WlsNNmETLOD4R-GYzGC5EDoYsMeubQvcccxxSBa5mAG0KRqYyGd85fVBLvWXTzd1Ao1lW7IYbtohZ6Ahz363Lc9rGuY49Y9pvxLlSkSanE_7knpXqokBGK7SHerCrlZxY9aWndoF2uyAWa37TIiVG344CxJTePMobTEyU1nQygp7qMPlHlapghBxtfShWo-PxLWDYA2RDKVGRJ3CVXOuWdbiIpc9D2YptrCt4Iiq1naAchBoQtXmhd4RhRPszqYqU-GzVzubIPQsf-wSk5N9Y4%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7bfd552aa42c439d9d05a8b18218da58&_e=JCA7aIaf0fuTWJRH96NQC-lSGb3H8EKleFV4h0GfQi_RBeDagSTZo5EEWxUaEBQZvTjOAkZMuL84BHzDkF-cwwWYPZd3lHW3HW_6fqqOSAOx9JLOgug-P0MELhG4OwFKr95I6ds0ilA01b7RRfQn5WlsNNmETLOD4R-GYzGC5EDoYsMeubQvcccxxSBa5mAG0KRqYyGd85fVBLvWXTzd1Ao1lW7IYbtohZ6Ahz363Lc9rGuY49Y9pvxLlSkSanE_UyU15Z_O3RnWPIb9f1A6Vffcjv8fD7jazVbqZeelL_p6Ut3owtM3FnVKMg-HQcqjIky3mW4bALtOs2Dc5jEZk4EnrtOccXB4AoXn_wy5MH9hU8PvnTC4lEM90DT9lsB9aLtsgJrc3XG3Y9bIk2K-0Gp7Uh1FqDelw7f5arPn-a8%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7bfd552aa42c439d9d05a8b18218da58&_e=JCA7aIaf0fuTWJRH96NQC-lSGb3H8EKleFV4h0GfQi_RBeDagSTZo5EEWxUaEBQZvTjOAkZMuL84BHzDkF-cwwWYPZd3lHW3HW_6fqqOSAOx9JLOgug-P0MELhG4OwFKr95I6ds0ilA01b7RRfQn5WlsNNmETLOD4R-GYzGC5EDoYsMeubQvcccxxSBa5mAG0KRqYyGd85fVBLvWXTzd1Ao1lW7IYbtohZ6Ahz363Lc9rGuY49Y9pvxLlSkSanE_yOqiff6lo4B5nbkWTDPVNK0Tle0nF4ThLNlyyXTSsYNOmJR3eC1rj3Pcvc-OqlK1Lp4O2Ibvu-TivXqMSgrGzk-tG1cMGiTpJwmaKrJRjUG9JToYBqKTYAOjrD9Ln53hifKM6XaeacXqryvlwPvwAgrFtj1qpM0PJqL7zMK9bUc%3D)

Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,

name: Tina Kotek
subject: I’ve released my budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Today, I released my recommended state budget for the next two years. It’s a direct reflection of my continued and steadfast commitment to making progress on Oregonians’ priorities. I will always take our greatest challenges head on and be committed to producing results for the entire state. These challenges, by their very nature, cannot be solved overnight. They require focus, discipline, and persistence. That’s what I intend to do in the second half of my term, and it’s the guiding principle of my recommended budget. My vision for our state is simple. Over the next two years, I want to build on the progress we’ve made, and create an Oregon where... **...NO ONE HAS TO SLEEP OUTSIDE.** We need to address the housing and homelessness crisis with every tool at our disposal. **...HELP IS THERE WHEN YOU NEED IT NO MATTER WHERE YOU LIVE.** We must increase our mental health and substance use treatment capacity and the trained workforce needed to address the behavioral health crisis. **...THE PROMISE OF EVERY CHILD IS REALIZED.** We have to build upon our improvements to education, and ensure every Oregon child has what they need to thrive. **...WE TAKE ACTION TO PROTECT OUR VALUES.** It’s imperative that we take the necessary steps to protect reproductive rights, our climate, immigrants, and civil rights. This is the blueprint of our next two years, and I’m proud to have you on the team to see it through. [_**Will you add your name today to show your support for my new budget?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98028374/515327775/12476288?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTUwMWU5My1mYmIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BV9Os4Nj8oeUlOoG94yzJ6woE52GQIB7o_JThW9G_B0=&emci=52324696-27ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=19501e93-fbb0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=15353729) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98028375/515327776/12476288?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTUwMWU5My1mYmIwLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BV9Os4Nj8oeUlOoG94yzJ6woE52GQIB7o_JThW9G_B0=&emci=52324696-27ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=19501e93-fbb0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=15353729)

Tina
