name: Steve Friend
subject: Thanks to Kash, I stood up to the Deep State
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=052d9e208b5e4dbeb89d3546fbce2404&_e=e9RYxoG_co49q3z_3-Vm7MUKsq6BAsVAiKDskRxHwnyMCuec7t_v-0L84sNG9soOkdonKR_PuDrEYmEXf8GBxUdI-UoA4Hc509x_BS2r5pLsvBYoCrqM67ST1Xy1GNI32G97UXxE0ou1vZKUNH4FouDFIRtHr4WrtCD0R4A6HDX5q7A7sTF4vyARxFxXmeczKDae_xP5C4NOFon9VT42uhbmCH1bCWFnfQPOiOI7GVHMQaDagLAPWC8p6GtLsbJki6CjZBX6kFq7Rc8toSPVnKKK5AMcowb8mDDq2xeEh4pzVAd-OWfnf2j_c4eK0-YFvkmOeE8oJPWG2MRI6iLJJ6Gx5YUDAqN_lrsrDYaiTSBe-mvBYuPNgcQI6e-S5DwrUg-LM35Zy57PR-2VzaKZnA%3D%3D)

Peter,

Working as an FBI special agent was my dream job. But when I became an agent, I swore an oath to protect and defend the United States Constitution against all enemies -- both foreign and domestic.

When I discovered the FBI's National Security Branch had refocused counterterrorism from legitimate foreign actors to political opponents within our borders, I knew I had to say something.

In August 2022, I made protected whistleblower disclosures about my concerns regarding the January 6th investigations assigned to my office.

**My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath._However, it nearly cost me everything._**

Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to stand up to the Deep State and expose their efforts to villainize patriots. The Kash Foundation offers legal and financial help to whistleblowers, veterans, and American patriots who come forward with evidence against the Deep State's actions.

To thank him for his efforts, I told Kash Patel that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the week to help the Kash Foundation take on the Deep State.

[You can help the Kash Foundation support whistleblowers and expose Deep State corruption by donating today.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=052d9e208b5e4dbeb89d3546fbce2404&_e=e9RYxoG_co49q3z_3-Vm7MUKsq6BAsVAiKDskRxHwnyMCuec7t_v-0L84sNG9soOkdonKR_PuDrEYmEXf8GBxUdI-UoA4Hc509x_BS2r5pLsvBYoCrqM67ST1Xy1GNI32G97UXxE0ou1vZKUNH4FouDFIRtHr4WrtCD0R4A6HDX5q7A7sTF4vyARxFxXmeczKDae_xP5C4NOFon9VT42uhbmCH1bCWFnfQPOiOI7GVEpqDHkkK3rGYF44Du3gkKX1O6_T4xW2XxZtbd8wdaVBvERj7NN3comFrGQpwK2YcsgSYX9091SSrq1OF6AuoCN5B8lz6R2bHUND_5gGBnf-IRNxZWYfxjyGObRDgxT1BtHnuD9uf2HGFVrYm9uNG2xeTeLJ0tkMCx2_oXR_uM1CtdUQkdyD5Y3UHB0qAl81bw%3D)

[Donate](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=052d9e208b5e4dbeb89d3546fbce2404&_e=e9RYxoG_co49q3z_3-Vm7MUKsq6BAsVAiKDskRxHwnyMCuec7t_v-0L84sNG9soOkdonKR_PuDrEYmEXf8GBxUdI-UoA4Hc509x_BS2r5pLsvBYoCrqM67ST1Xy1GNI32G97UXxE0ou1vZKUNH4FouDFIRtHr4WrtCD0R4A6HDX5q7A7sTF4vyARxFxXmeczKDae_xP5C4NOFon9VT42uhbmCH1bCWFnfQPOiOI7GVHZgB2tSYNNDl0_elRrR8Ncu-2NLXdMDGM8aPIl1OqNWu3LAWoEjqvlTOkcgT2WQw9uXL6rPPONA1OK3KhYOQMnkQIpNUcmDzQZJfTVl1G2sEm7ABzMzM-V6xSUP694z27vgk1LGIAQyHtCXlc-paE-D2vnccZx-5ngMVRa2aBGJRXuBrm1gJnEAMJByHHFPq4%3D)

I was a special agent for the Federal Bureau of Investigation for eight and a half years. During that time, I investigated approximately 200 violent crimes, such as aggravated assaults, murder, child abuse, rape, robbery, child molestation, child pornography, and human trafficking.

**Eventually, I was reassigned to the FBI 's unprecedented investigation of the political unrest at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021.**

It didn't take me long to uncover efforts by the FBI and Department of Justice to manipulate statistics and exaggerate the nationwide threat of domestic terrorism. I witnessed overzealous practices to harass American patriots and realized the FBI was turning its investigative processes into a punishment.

_I had no choice but to blow the whistle on the politicized FBI_.

At each level of my chain of command, leadership cautioned that despite my exemplary work performance, whistleblowing placed my otherwise bright future with the FBI at risk.

I knew my decision would ultimately cost me my dream career. As a married father of two, I knew it would affect my family, but I also knew this was important, so I stuck by my convictions.

The FBI cynically elected to close ranks and attack the messenger.

Within one month of my disclosures, the FBI weaponized the security clearance processes to remove me from active duty.

I was an unpaid, indefinitely suspended man trying to feed his family when Kash Patel reached out to me and said he wanted to help support my efforts to fight back.

[Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to speak about against the weaponizing of our justice system. You can help other whistleblowers come forward against the Deep State by donating $10, $50, or even $100 today. >>>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=052d9e208b5e4dbeb89d3546fbce2404&_e=e9RYxoG_co49q3z_3-Vm7MUKsq6BAsVAiKDskRxHwnyMCuec7t_v-0L84sNG9soOkdonKR_PuDrEYmEXf8GBxUdI-UoA4Hc509x_BS2r5pLsvBYoCrqM67ST1Xy1GNI32G97UXxE0ou1vZKUNH4FouDFIRtHr4WrtCD0R4A6HDX5q7A7sTF4vyARxFxXmeczKDae_xP5C4NOFon9VT42uhbmCH1bCWFnfQPOiOI7GVFt-SjAyY766MrscXutMDJOWMTJcX0XHDsDii8u9_lv4v9u8nfs7k_y7rCHYECEXvxJAr704Hpe6GQwcd8wpB22Jll9nkh4E9tbSzgLpBkM7rIsefz_OnhLQv_lN_F9DeKc6YT4kmQRH1s54IdHmdFz7Z0x8udwK40wCs-3p8MWlFgNMz1US5L-bkBexvNgUV8%3D)

The FBI was hell-bent on suppressing me from exposing the truth.

**In addition to an indefinite, unpaid suspension, the FBI initiated a campaign of humiliation and intimidation to punish and pressure me to resign.**
* Individuals at the FBI leaked my private medical information to a reporter at _The New York Times_.
* The FBI denied my request to seek outside employment in an obvious attempt to deprive me of the ability to support my family.
* Finally, the FBI Inspection Division imposed an illegal gag order in an attempt to prevent me from communicating with my family and attorneys.

But thanks to the support provided by The Kash Foundation, I was able to withstand these attacks and stand up to the Government Gangsters who are weaponizing our government.

**The Kash Foundation has also helped Kyle Seraphin, Garrett O 'Boyle, and Marcus Allen expose the weaponization of the FBI for political purposes.**

Your generous donation will help the Kash Foundation support and encourage the next whistleblowers who come forward with evidence against the Deep State.

[Donate $10](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=052d9e208b5e4dbeb89d3546fbce2404&_e=e9RYxoG_co49q3z_3-Vm7MUKsq6BAsVAiKDskRxHwnyMCuec7t_v-0L84sNG9soOkdonKR_PuDrEYmEXf8GBxUdI-UoA4Hc509x_BS2r5pLsvBYoCrqM67ST1Xy1GNI32G97UXxE0ou1vZKUNH4FouDFIRtHr4WrtCD0R4A6HDX5q7A7sTF4vyARxFxXmeczKDae_xP5C4NOFon9VT42uhbmCH1bCWFnfQPOiOI7GVF8pkuBZiFEMvDK1iRRA9keCamkoL1V6KfIFWsTV2ydoN9YMLsT-LXG_1Z5IEz5pywOTJtPOgZ0B-RuRBvgDYRGHR4uWSXUuR99UXNxS_hxYV2exVln51MUat_aJSDjIj-OQuVQkKoclg-SyKrU3GbP_QhIw4w1VZ04jyG6bK4Nk189NY-Mhgtlk1zEGuWWq1Q%3D)

clean_body: Peter, Working as an FBI special agent was my dream job. But when I became an agent, I swore an oath to protect and defend the United States Constitution against all enemies -- both foreign and domestic. When I discovered the FBI's National Security Branch had refocused counterterrorism from legitimate foreign actors to political opponents within our borders, I knew I had to say something. In August 2022, I made protected whistleblower disclosures about my concerns regarding the January 6th investigations assigned to my office. My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath.However, it nearly cost me everything. Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to stand up to the Deep State and expose their efforts to villainize patriots. The Kash Foundation offers legal and financial help to whistleblowers, veterans, and American patriots who come forward with evidence against the Deep State's actions. To thank him for his efforts, I told Kash Patel that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the week to help the Kash Foundation take on the Deep State. I was a special agent for the Federal Bureau of Investigation for eight and a half years. During that time, I investigated approximately 200 violent crimes, such as aggravated assaults, murder, child abuse, rape, robbery, child molestation, child pornography, and human trafficking. Eventually, I was reassigned to the FBI 's unprecedented investigation of the political unrest at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021. It didn't take me long to uncover efforts by the FBI and Department of Justice to manipulate statistics and exaggerate the nationwide threat of domestic terrorism. I witnessed overzealous practices to harass American patriots and realized the FBI was turning its investigative processes into a punishment. I had no choice but to blow the whistle on the politicized FBI. At each level of my chain of command, leadership cautioned that despite my exemplary work performance, whistleblowing placed my otherwise bright future with the FBI at risk. I knew my decision would ultimately cost me my dream career. As a married father of two, I knew it would affect my family, but I also knew this was important, so I stuck by my convictions. The FBI cynically elected to close ranks and attack the messenger. Within one month of my disclosures, the FBI weaponized the security clearance processes to remove me from active duty. I was an unpaid, indefinitely suspended man trying to feed his family when Kash Patel reached out to me and said he wanted to help support my efforts to fight back. The FBI was hell-bent on suppressing me from exposing the truth. In addition to an indefinite, unpaid suspension, the FBI initiated a campaign of humiliation and intimidation to punish and pressure me to resign. Individuals at the FBI leaked my private medical information to a reporter at The New York Times. The FBI denied my request to seek outside employment in an obvious attempt to deprive me of the ability to support my family. Finally, the FBI Inspection Division imposed an illegal gag order in an attempt to prevent me from communicating with my family and attorneys. But thanks to the support provided by The Kash Foundation, I was able to withstand these attacks and stand up to the Government Gangsters who are weaponizing our government. The Kash Foundation has also helped Kyle Seraphin, Garrett O 'Boyle, and Marcus Allen expose the weaponization of the FBI for political purposes. Your generous donation will help the Kash Foundation support and encourage the next whistleblowers who come forward with evidence against the Deep State. Thank you, Steve Friend The Kash Foundation is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. name: Amanda Chase
subject: Meet & Greet Schedule
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Come meet Amanda
| | | | Greetings!You're Invited to meet Senator Amanda Chase
---
---
| Greetings!, Voting will take place on Friday, December 13, which is only 11 days away.
I would like to personally invite you to several meet and greets my campaign is hosting this week to answer any questions you may have.
I'm running for state senate in a Special Election to fill John McGuire's term in the Virginia Senate to represent Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties.
The Republican Mass Meeting will be held Friday, December 13 at the Goochland Sports Complex, located at 1800 Sandy Hook Road, Goochland, Virginia 23063. Registration at the door begins at 4:30pm and ends at 6:30pm. Any registered voter may participate. You will need to bring your driver's license with you.
I hope you will save the date and join us.
---
| |
---
There is no cost to attend this event.
Please RSVP within 24 hours of the event so we can get an accurate count for refreshments.
Thank you! For God & Country,
---
|

clean_body: Come meet Amanda | | | | Greetings!You're Invited to meet Senator Amanda Chase | Greetings!, Voting will take place on Friday, December 13, which is only 11 days away. I would like to personally invite you to several meet and greets my campaign is hosting this week to answer any questions you may have. I'm running for state senate in a Special Election to fill John McGuire's term in the Virginia Senate to represent Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties. The Republican Mass Meeting will be held Friday, December 13 at the Goochland Sports Complex, located at 1800 Sandy Hook Road, Goochland, Virginia 23063. Registration at the door begins at 4:30pm and ends at 6:30pm. Any registered voter may participate. You will need to bring your driver's license with you. I hope you will save the date and join us. | | There is no cost to attend this event. Please RSVP within 24 hours of the event so we can get an accurate count for refreshments. Thank you! For God & Country, | | UPCOMING MEET & GREETS THIS WEEK | WESTERN HANOVER COUNTY | | | | mailto:craig@chaseforva.com | | | mailto:craig@chaseforva.com | | | | == | | | == | | == | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. **Team, the holiday season is here, and we're taking this time to show our gratitude for the president and first lady!**

President and Dr. Biden have spent the past four years improving the lives of all Americans. From strengthening the economy to lowering health care costs and more, they've brought dignity back to the White House -- and we're so grateful!

To thank them for all they've done, we're organizing a MASSIVE holiday card. But we can't send it until we hit our 100,000-signature goal, and **as of 12/02/2024 we don't have your signature on file! So please, before midnight:**

[**Sign the card to wish the Bidens Happy Holidays!**](http://go.dscc.org/go/20772?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241202-SignTheCard-BidenHolidayCard24RF-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241202-SignTheCard-BidenHolidayCard24RF-ETG-sl1&akid=19045%2E9716520%2EQA5UEC)

---
Peter, there was a big winner in Wisconsin this year: _Fair maps._
Our Democracy Defenders helped flip 14 seats from red to blue across both the state assembly and state senate — smashing the GOP’s supermajority that had been in place for most of the last 13 years. These victories also put Democrats on track to take back majorities in both chambers in 2026.
**While we celebrate these incredible gains, we must also recognize that years of organizing, activism, holding Republicans accountable, and A.G. Holder’s long view made this all possible.**
To understand how big these victories were, we need to go all the way back to 2011. Upon taking office, newly elected Governor Scott Walker wasted no time focusing on manipulating the Badger State’s legislative maps.
He and his extreme allies in the state legislature quickly got to work, changing the rules of the state supreme court to undermine the state’s longstanding chief justice, gutting the state’s nonpartisan elections board, and enacting a horrifying gerrymander, which guaranteed them an unearned lock on power for a decade.
**When the NDRC was founded in 2017, we began to build an infrastructure for activism and organizing which put a spotlight on just how badly Republicans were bending the rules.**
In 2018, Governor Tony Evers won and promised to be a fair maps champion. But the GOP-controlled legislature immediately stripped away many of his powers.
**_In that critical moment, we didn’t back down._ We took our organizing to another level.**
Since then, NDRC Chair Eric Holder has made numerous trips to mobilize voters, raised millions of dollars, and brought increased national attention to critical state-level races in Wisconsin.
All that work culminated last year in the election of Judge Janet Protasiewicz to the Wisconsin Supreme Court, breaking the long-held conservative stranglehold on the body. Republicans knew their days of running rampant with maps were over. The legislature passed Governor Evers’ fair maps ahead of this year’s elections.
This cycle, the NDRC endorsed 90 Wisconsin candidates as a part of our Democracy Defenders program. Committed Democrats like you understood the importance of these state-level races that too often go overlooked — and you put in the work.
**That’s how we won: Laying the groundwork for fair representation by securing fair maps. And that’s how we’ll continue to win in states across the country:_Together._**
Thank you,
Team NDRC

clean_body: Here’s how we’ll continue to win in states across the country: | | = Peter, there was a big winner in Wisconsin this year: Fair maps. Our Democracy Defenders helped flip 14 seats from red to blue across both the state assembly and state senate — smashing the GOP’s supermajority that had been in place for most of the last 13 years. These victories also put Democrats on track to take back majorities in both chambers in 2026. While we celebrate these incredible gains, we must also recognize that years of organizing, activism, holding Republicans accountable, and A.G. Holder’s long view made this all possible. To understand how big these victories were, we need to go all the way back to 2011. Upon taking office, newly elected Governor Scott Walker wasted no time focusing on manipulating the Badger State’s legislative maps. He and his extreme allies in the state legislature quickly got to work, changing the rules of the state supreme court to undermine the state’s longstanding chief justice, gutting the state’s nonpartisan elections board, and enacting a horrifying gerrymander, which guaranteed them an unearned lock on power for a decade. When the NDRC was founded in 2017, we began to build an infrastructure for activism and organizing which put a spotlight on just how badly Republicans were bending the rules. In 2018, Governor Tony Evers won and promised to be a fair maps champion. But the GOP-controlled legislature immediately stripped away many of his powers. In that critical moment, we didn’t back down. We took our organizing to another level. Since then, NDRC Chair Eric Holder has made numerous trips to mobilize voters, raised millions of dollars, and brought increased national attention to critical state-level races in Wisconsin. All that work culminated last year in the election of Judge Janet Protasiewicz to the Wisconsin Supreme Court, breaking the long-held conservative stranglehold on the body. Republicans knew their days of running rampant with maps were over. The legislature passed Governor Evers’ fair maps ahead of this year’s elections. This cycle, the NDRC endorsed 90 Wisconsin candidates as a part of our Democracy Defenders program. Committed Democrats like you understood the importance of these state-level races that too often go overlooked — and you put in the work. That’s how we won: Laying the groundwork for fair representation by securing fair maps. And that’s how we’ll continue to win in states across the country:Together. Thank you, Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, Suite #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

I’m grateful to have you with me.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98029103/515329951/1328794144?refcode=ea.b405c2ca-ffb0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.b405c2ca-ffb0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0MDVjMmNhLWZmYjAtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_idoMNQbHE9lfIozxf-H7RwQOG1IEXC8NSkkpJ-dBxU=&emci=62b07706-e8b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=b405c2ca-ffb0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=4823105)

Hello, I’ve spent this month reflecting. On the presidential election, of course — and let’s be frank, the consequences of Donald Trump’s reelection are dire. But more than that, I’ve been thinking about the effective and _inspirational_ movement for change that we are creating together. I can’t thank you enough for being part of it. With your help, JanePAC-endorsed candidates won nearly 100 key races in states from California to Nebraska. Their presence on city councils, in state legislatures, and in Congress will help build a firewall of defense against the Trump administration’s anti-climate agenda. We can’t stop there. Activism is a calling. It’s a lifelong commitment, and the true impact of the work we’re doing now won’t be seen for a generation or more. In so many ways, our fight for the planet now is a message of hope for everyone who comes after us. Over the next few weeks, as we look toward 2025, I want us to focus on one guiding principle: **Each of us can do something — no matter how small — to leave the world better than we found it.** As we sort out our plans for the future, I just wanted to let you know how grateful I am to have you with me. xx Jane [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98029104/515329952/2105508926?refcode=ea.b405c2ca-ffb0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.b405c2ca-ffb0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0MDVjMmNhLWZmYjAtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_idoMNQbHE9lfIozxf-H7RwQOG1IEXC8NSkkpJ-dBxU=) | [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98029106/515329954/2105508926?refcode=ea.b405c2ca-ffb0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.b405c2ca-ffb0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0MDVjMmNhLWZmYjAtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_idoMNQbHE9lfIozxf-H7RwQOG1IEXC8NSkkpJ-dBxU=)

name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: ADD YOUR NAME: Defend Bernie from establishment attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Bernie isn’t afraid to call out Musk and Trump to put their money where
their mouth is when it comes to rhetoric — like cutting a bloated, deadly
Pentagon budget. Even if establishment Democrats throw a fit and attack
Bernie.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20598?source=email-20241202&t=1011&akid=7340%2E5885482%2EE5K6dK ]Add your name to stand strong with Bernie now: Urge Democrats AND
Republicans to stick to their word and slash war spending.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20598?source=email-20241202&t=1012&akid=7340%2E5885482%2EE5K6dK ][IMG]

Bernie is ready to call the bluff of Elon Musk and Trump. We’re all for
cutting the defense budget and giving less money to corrupt weapons
contractors, and we’re ready to back Bernie up.

But, like Bernie said, even many in the Democratic establishment don’t
want to cut Pentagon spending. Only 13 Senators voted against the last
$800+ billion defense budget. Now, proxies for the establishment are
attacking Bernie for taking a stand.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20598?source=email-20241202&t=1013&akid=7340%2E5885482%2EE5K6dK ][IMG]

The DNC Chair, Nancy Pelosi and many others in the Party have been
relentlessly attacking Bernie since the election. He needs our backing
more than ever before.

We support Bernie’s strategy to fight for positive change — no matter who
is in power.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20598?source=email-20241202&t=1014&akid=7340%2E5885482%2EE5K6dK ]If you stand with Bernie, urge Democrats and Republicans in Congress to
cut the Pentagon budget. We won’t abandon our principles just because Musk
and Trump say they support a populist policy. We’ll use it to our
advantage.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20598?source=email-20241202&t=1015&akid=7340%2E5885482%2EE5K6dK ]ADD YOUR NAME

We refuse to roll over and let Trump get away with his extreme right-wing
plans. We’ll also expose Trump, Musk, or anyone else on the MAGA right
when they make false populist promises.

It’s a win-win. Either we’ll cut the massive defense budget, which is a
win for Peace and a loss for defense contractors and weapons lobbyists —
OR — Musk and Trump fail to deliver and we call out their lies and
failures. We can’t sit back, we’re rolling up our sleeves alongside
Bernie.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20598?source=email-20241202&t=1016&akid=7340%2E5885482%2EE5K6dK ]Defend Bernie against the establishment’s attacks and support our
progressive policy agenda no matter what!

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

name: Alan Cohn
subject: We need Equal Justice Under Law!
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98029230/515330860/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI2ZWJiMjctMDFiMS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XUJ4daaEyoltw7ktDc7rU0qq708lAQ-FaPUi-HRtxWo=&emci=783ed389-efb0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=9b6ebb27-01b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
By saving the Supreme Court as an institution that assures “Equal justice under law,” we can save our Democracy.

SCOTUS is now controlled by a radical right-wing MAGA majority dedicated to robbing Americans of the right to privacy, stealing the rights of women to make their own healthcare decisions, and creating a special immunity for Trump to whatever he wants without and guardrails.

It doesn’t have to be that way. With your help, it won’t

This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court, the national campaign working with members of Congress to end lifetime appointments to SCOTUS and enact 18-year term limits.

We’re working with Senator-Elect Adam Schiff, Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries, and 75 members of the House and Senate co-sponsoring the TERM Act.

We started a movement. Polls show over 70% of Americans from both parties favor SCOTUS term limits.
Will you help us elect candidates who pledge to support the TERM Act and mount a public pressure campaign to force Congress to act?
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/term-limits-yes-inc-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98029234/515330868/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI2ZWJiMjctMDFiMS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XUJ4daaEyoltw7ktDc7rU0qq708lAQ-FaPUi-HRtxWo=)

**[>>>This is our moment, our opportunity to bring accountability back to the highest court in the land!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98029239/515330872/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI2ZWJiMjctMDFiMS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XUJ4daaEyoltw7ktDc7rU0qq708lAQ-FaPUi-HRtxWo=)**
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

**[Please pitch in what you can today to support the national campaign to create term limits for the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98029243/515330878/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI2ZWJiMjctMDFiMS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XUJ4daaEyoltw7ktDc7rU0qq708lAQ-FaPUi-HRtxWo=)**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the indoctrination of our children
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7de8dfeef5c8486184124ae3a28aef27&_e=I0_4zl5Ka27u8vgnr6zTL38UI936ZwmJ7DxTlezarGuVpG04ePntJ4vNKh322C56YzFjdWaBokohuZB9ofRzHrai7BhiFvfh0HT9W6waW5iwqhRDeAQqJEObG5G_2RObfYEP5U8dIOKxsCEWolSA1IOEX98ssuF5kgRUKOq-YF9JD-0V9vYBpCWHrmWQmrl_Y-oLOWDyZDS-8Uu6nRBJD1uJMuj_LQ4r0MB9BabQ-4pQpXilOygvkYUG9WfpIOVZ8tKCLpIFtZ2MQ8YVK_ztK-1EeHh9Ydsd9zdxYWnThyEbSIsEJIkbnUDRrWdsmEhz9ZhwQiUu7KLBoIdWhAnud0Rx-isf-qOhtbpFSABdVAbYJ6z_IRUaXMCsqsDZ-xGYn9l191eLAvOoHoOLTRFC1A%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7de8dfeef5c8486184124ae3a28aef27&_e=I0_4zl5Ka27u8vgnr6zTL38UI936ZwmJ7DxTlezarGuVpG04ePntJ4vNKh322C56YzFjdWaBokohuZB9ofRzHrai7BhiFvfh0HT9W6waW5iwqhRDeAQqJEObG5G_2RObfYEP5U8dIOKxsCEWolSA1IOEX98ssuF5kgRUKOq-YF9JD-0V9vYBpCWHrmWQmrl_Y-oLOWDyZDS-8Uu6nRBJD1uJMuj_LQ4r0MB9BabQ-4pQpXilOygvkYUG9WfpIOVZ_0aZowMAy5sqEqxl7TLAM2ymMuD_ln-m9guUNxrBWLJNTi_PaTT0ZmeguhTMhf934eVEEfUiMePXqc6--CmoBxLpcn0O1PvOr8h761uFhMVSk0OUKDpXxzsOAIJMSH-wmErnX0Vt1bO3DXOU0slM1A%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7de8dfeef5c8486184124ae3a28aef27&_e=I0_4zl5Ka27u8vgnr6zTL38UI936ZwmJ7DxTlezarGuVpG04ePntJ4vNKh322C56YzFjdWaBokohuZB9ofRzHrai7BhiFvfh0HT9W6waW5iwqhRDeAQqJEObG5G_2RObfYEP5U8dIOKxsCEWolSA1IOEX98ssuF5kgRUKOq-YF9JD-0V9vYBpCWHrmWQmrl_Y-oLOWDyZDS-8Uu6nRBJD1uJMuj_LQ4r0MB9BabQ-4pQpXilOygvkYUG9WfpIOVZvwaLjPQOOgfyjNK4HDpMywpnKXGn-CabnHX8Cakwbc-iYhwUYAVf08eZD6LBeaxuB_Qu3tI4IUPizBSaqcTng3o5KTJNz06Jy6MFt-x5FvvF5RsA7NrW1k47vQTWHzn_DyHb8uP5YL0da0geeQ4jWw%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. name: Justice Democrats
subject: “This is not democracy. It is oligarchy.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In case you missed it, outside spending in the 2024 elections “shattered
records” at $4.5 billion, with more than $1 billion spent by dark money
Super PACs and nearly $2 billion spent by just 150 billionaire families.

Meanwhile, over 36 million people are living in poverty in the United
States and their voices are being ignored.

This was made possible because of the Supreme Court’s 2010 decision in
Citizens United v. FEC, which ended century-old campaign finance laws that
previously prevented corporations and wealthy donors from spending
unlimited amounts of money on U.S. elections.

Senator Bernie Sanders and Rep. Rashida Tlaib are right:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241202?refcode=em20241202-36200&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36200_1203867_BpTfDs&akid=36200%2E1203867%2EBpTfDs ]Tweet from Bernie Sanders: Billionaires in the U.S. are .0005% of the
population, yet accounted for 18% of 2024 electoral spending. Just 150
billionaires families spent nearly $2 billion. This is not democracy. It
is oligarchy. Time to overturn Citizens United and move to public funding
of elections.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241202?refcode=em20241202-36200&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36200_1203867_BpTfDs&akid=36200%2E1203867%2EBpTfDs ]Tweet from Rashida Tlaib: Billionaires and special interest groups
spent a record-breaking $1 billion in dark money this election cycle. It’s
sick. Billionaires cannot continue to buy our elections. We need to end
Citizens United.

We are in the situation we are today — in which billionaires and corporate
interests can buy elections and hold immense influence over our leaders in
Washington — directly because of Citizens United.

If we want to get dark money out of politics and start prioritizing
working class people over corporations and the wealthiest few, we must
overturn it — and to do that, we need to elect more progressive, working
class leaders to Congress who refuse to take contributions from these bad
actors.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241202?refcode=em20241202-36200&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36200_1203867_BpTfDs&akid=36200%2E1203867%2EBpTfDs ]That’s exactly what Justice Democrats is working toward, but the number
of candidates we recruit and help run for office is determined by how much
we raise from grassroots donors like you. Will you invest in the next
generation of progressives who will fight to overturn Citizens United by
pitching in $5 today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241202?refcode=em20241202-36200&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36200_1203867_BpTfDs&akid=36200%2E1203867%2EBpTfDs ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241202-36200-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36200_1203867_BpTfDs&akid=36200%2E1203867%2EBpTfDs

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36200%2E1203867%2EBpTfDs

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. Gracias, friends. On Saturday, we came up against our first end-of-month fundraising deadline since Election Day, and I am happy to share that we met our goal! I can’t emphasize this enough: Your grassroots support has been the beating heart of this campaign, and I am so grateful to have you by my side. It has been an unprecedented year from start to end, as I know many of us are still processing the results of the presidential election. But it is heartening to know that folks like you helped us hold NM-02 blue for two consecutive terms for the first time in over 40 years. We have a lot of work ahead of us as we gear up for another presidency under Donald Trump, but for now, I just want to say thank you. — Gabe P.S. clean_body: Happy to share that we met our goal Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Gracias, friends. On Saturday, we came up against our first end-of-month fundraising deadline since Election Day, and I am happy to share that we met our goal! I can’t emphasize this enough: Your grassroots support has been the beating heart of this campaign, and I am so grateful to have you by my side. It has been an unprecedented year from start to end, as I know many of us are still processing the results of the presidential election. But it is heartening to know that folks like you helped us hold NM-02 blue for two consecutive terms for the first time in over 40 years. We have a lot of work ahead of us as we gear up for another presidency under Donald Trump, but for now, I just want to say thank you. — Gabe P.S. If you’d like to help jumpstart our work as we close out 2024 and enter 2025, = | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . name: Sean Feucht
subject: Revive in 25: Our Isaiah 61 MANDATE for 2025
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=07aa6663d3454a19b03188dcd24df30f&_e=W0YrKcEzuZ30siWtraUJn89pZF1s_7lnHGy7dS2bsVGt5JqPZZS9Al-Fegoufpv_35ZWk2bWVFpo_4OsD-f9n1d1VuFNjIC3i5HWvEVERdoa7QgM9Kidn3j8JTXzqJstbv3S9QJFP1nivvlkLRT5GsUuK93TqM571Ud2odY6_3V6KE_lHA-zNTikfy7GlhNpP8x1B56plgR0BbkUYlKIk3OfcxASxMiZ3HmGdHvzA2QA1uT-78-UkK9v53UHp7PdAVE6_qLb1_A432VQy0SfOO-SqKGlUze9mudStfmOe1qe8Vhb7bN4RPMbTT3ZEBEP)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Let Us Worship has traveled the nation over the past four years, holding revivals and worship celebrations, and two things are clear: our nation is broken, and people are hurting. America is teetering on a cliff; fewer and fewer people are living with hope. Starting next year, we are launching the "Revive in 25" tour, and we embark on this journey with a mandate straight out of Isaiah 61: "They will rebuild the ancient ruins and restore the places long devastated; they will renew the ruined cities that have been devastated for generations."—Isaiah 61:4 _**WATCH THE REVIVE IN 25 PROMO VIDEO**_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=07aa6663d3454a19b03188dcd24df30f&_e=W0YrKcEzuZ30siWtraUJn89pZF1s_7lnHGy7dS2bsVGt5JqPZZS9Al-Fegoufpv_35ZWk2bWVFpo_4OsD-f9n1d1VuFNjIC3i5HWvEVERdoa7QgM9Kidn3j8JTXzqJstbv3S9QJFP1nivvlkLRT5GsUuK93TqM571Ud2odY6_3Wzl_olhjSKDm5aJiKU2cQ2UpnLkrxbr8gBAXiiRjl0tMldJPOV2uXMD1O7s4jXZXeDGGzSEVtNiIqIckZQZeSNT8U26HJoXlilFm7IwfC8C9ojgvDvCmswTTGcaE6qH5mpgnjOT-W0lwscKj5JSLS8)
---
We will head into America's darkest, most broken cities; cities where people have been ignored by their leaders and where homelessness, crime, drug addiction and poverty are strangling the population. With the power of the Holy Spirit, we will bring the Gospel and a heart of praise to those downcast and downtrodden souls. Tomorrow is Giving Tuesday, where non-profits around the world raise money for their specific causes. We don’t have a cause; we have a Kingdom to share with the world. What we raise for the rest of the year will launch Revive in 25 and help bring life to the darkest cities of America. If you feel led, please contribute here.
---
[**HELP FUND REVIVE IN 2025 >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=07aa6663d3454a19b03188dcd24df30f&_e=W0YrKcEzuZ30siWtraUJn89pZF1s_7lnHGy7dS2bsVGt5JqPZZS9Al-Fegoufpv_35ZWk2bWVFpo_4OsD-f9n1d1VuFNjIC3i5HWvEVERdoa7QgM9Kidn3j8JTXzqJstbv3S9QJFP1nivvlkLRT5GsUuK93TqM571Ud2odY6_3VnyroeEqCyCcTAiQfm-iRXxvUQW2UTd5s9ZFu0fL3yYufrOFQchrfSdV6s9bnQOsx3NkYoe90QUaL4qUVWNqWTo7mFn5ir3NlVDmF0eaQ1Prtd9p9_WGbqjHqvuN3RUY01KkJfRrxWHtcoW7G4ezcv)
---
Till all hear,
---
---
Sean

clean_body: Make Your Voice Heard| | | Peter, I'll keep this quick. November 5th sent shockwaves to the Swamp and delivered a clear mandate for conservatives to LEAD!! As we close out 2024 and look forward to 2025, I want to hear from you. What issues matter to you and your family, and what issues do you want this new Republican majority to tackle? Take the quick survey below to make your voice heard! | | | | - | | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: Tomorrow’s Giving Tuesday goal matters more than ever, Peter
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE4Mzk3ODcS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDQ5Mzc1OAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — Tomorrow is Giving Tuesday, and with Donald Trump headed back to the White House next month, this global day of
generosity matters more than usual. We’ve just been given a big opportunity: a major donor has offered to match up to $100,000 to fund LCV’s campaignsto protect the environment, preserve democracy, AND stop Trump’s dangerous
agenda in 2025 — but there’s a catch: We only get those funds if 1,000 grassroots donors ALSO renew their LCV membership before midnight on Giving Tuesday. Even $5 helps us reach our goal. https://links.messages.lcv. To help us reach this critical goal, we’ll send a free tote bag to LCV members who start an annual gift of $19 or more this Giving Tuesday. NAME EMAIL YOUR STATUS P. FRENCH - Current Peter Willis dpwillis67@gmail.com RENEW NOW FOR $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/L6b_ M. BLAKE - Current Trump has Big Oil and fossil fuel interests on his side, and it’s going to take everyonein our movement standing together to disrupt his dangerous anti-environmental
agenda. Here are just a few reasons why your Giving Tuesday gift is EXTRA
important right now: Because we’re up against a critical deadline to secure environmental progress before Trump takes office. Right now, we’re campaigning for the Biden administration to protect clean air and public lands, and for the Senate to confirm pro-environment judges before Trump’s inauguration in January. We’re counting on your support to safeguard environmental progress. Renew your membership now for just $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/vNR6fEx7__
Because we’re fighting back against Donald Trump’s most extreme anti-science nominees. By nominating climate change deniers like Chris Wright — a Big Oil CEO — to lead federal agencies, Trump is putting polluters’ profits before people like you and me. We’re leading the fight to keep them from key positions. We can block these nominations, but only if the environmental movement shows up >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/KybpT-38ppH~
Because we need to be ready on DAY ONE to oppose Trump’s dangerous Project 2025 agenda. From abolishing the National Weather Service, to gutting environmental enforcement and allowing more toxic pollution into our air and water, to allowing more oil and gas drilling and infrastructure, Trump has laid out a blueprint for environmental disaster. We’re ready to fight this pro-polluter agenda in Congress, in the states, and the courts — but we need your help >> https://links.messages.lcv.
Because a group of donors has offered $100,000 in matching gift funds. Bottom line: Your contribution goes further to support environmental campaigns that matter if you give now and help unlock this critical funding. Renew your LCV membership now for just $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv. Meeting our Giving Tuesday goal matters — now more than ever.I hope you’ll pitch in: Our match unlock goal is 1,000 donors, but it ends at
midnight tomorrow. Renew your membership now for just $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv. And remember: if you start an annual gift of $19 or more by this Giving Tuesday,
you’ll receive a free tote bag from LCV to show your support for the environment year-round. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/z9e0fzvdDDQ~ Thanks for your support of LCV, the environment, and our democracy. We couldn’t
do this work without you, Peter. Onward, Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11839787&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDQ5Mzc1OAS2&spReportId=MjEwMDQ5Mzc1OAS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11839787&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDQ5Mzc1OAS2&spReportId=MjEwMDQ5Mzc1OAS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.

name: Team Pramila
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Every donation — whether $1, $10, $50, or more — is a declaration of hope and a stand for our progressive values.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241202-4558-footer&t=1&akid=4558%2E420207%2EuYsyuR)
Thank you, Peter!
**Because of this grassroots movement and the thousands of people who pitched in last month, we closed November on a strong note.**
Every donation — whether $1, $10, $50, or more — is a declaration of hope, a stand for our progressive values, and an investment in a future that prioritizes people over profits.
Your continued support ensures that Pramila has the resources to protect our progress and continue advocating bold, populist, working-class policies.
We’re so glad you’re on this team, and thank you for all you do to support our progressive movement. [**If you’d like to help us continue to prepare for the fight ahead, please pitch in $3 now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241202?refcode=em20241202-4558&amount=3&refcode2=4558_420207_uYsyuR&akid=4558%2E420207%2EuYsyuR)

Team Pramila

name: Confirm your vote ASAP
subject: We were going through our voting records and can’t seem to find your results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Did you vote for President Trump and Republicans?
This is odd, Fellow Patriot.

We were going through our voting records and can't seem to find your results.

Did you vote for President Trump and Republicans?

body:

From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=62e1a908d0d84ef4a28d3c1fdd793e10&_e=AtqWBgx2YkA1MhpbO4vutsFHU2Z12oKf7omZhIB_c7ngQ2KUAIsGb07k-b3Sg1TmvmqWBAjZss83KAPTjO7pbkTKRvAK1UwG9a_zA2R_XK3xwHK0BFbWL8dM8z1tcVwx6BvbZWb1KcQ4jTh_JF6iNS66GN3lyXPqkHSw2XsS0PjYJ3EBVlU7CjCxqnjVs8bBqSQEPu8ERFq9z2Y6EBeU6xxEHSqldhZyvyiqlDqyGNxPolP0DjzC8oyrPizMkM8msNdvxPMZUCW3nTcQLOgctXRylMjcBCt3to7W6hVaM55kTTf-9V9-7XuBCkUrEl9bsfSJWlSoQgMxTvaU_cVAhWRSflXhSB6ToqXda1Q3mCNnYwCluDYnmyvPR9sW5MPSrpxLlkcn_MckPkZkBfPy01RtYD0lwLOY6wn5Gncswyk%3D)**

| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=62e1a908d0d84ef4a28d3c1fdd793e10&_e=AtqWBgx2YkA1MhpbO4vutsFHU2Z12oKf7omZhIB_c7ngQ2KUAIsGb07k-b3Sg1TmvmqWBAjZss83KAPTjO7pbkTKRvAK1UwG9a_zA2R_XK3xwHK0BFbWL8dM8z1tcVwx6BvbZWb1KcQ4jTh_JF6iNS66GN3lyXPqkHSw2XsS0PjYJ3EBVlU7CjCxqnjVs8bBqSQEPu8ERFq9z2Y6EBeU6xxEHSqldhZyvyiqlDqyGNxPolP0DjzC8oyrPizMkM8m56LbaWJz_8wDmtODmVpwNDdiJXLo_rH21q_kq4AibbgilGplo-8JTdFY9xnrqXcwdSF5BCI2mfgcgtIShFpl0zRaOCn9vHU8SY1WsCx2iUKCjeelxOjFDstKxzP7GcoyQQNwyEISBb-8h6iKsmnI3WDAFT-Ys_3nG9I_w8f5RRI%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=62e1a908d0d84ef4a28d3c1fdd793e10&_e=AtqWBgx2YkA1MhpbO4vutsFHU2Z12oKf7omZhIB_c7ngQ2KUAIsGb07k-b3Sg1TmvmqWBAjZss83KAPTjO7pbkTKRvAK1UwG9a_zA2R_XK3xwHK0BFbWL8dM8z1tcVwx6BvbZWb1KcQ4jTh_JF6iNS66GN3lyXPqkHSw2XsS0PjYJ3EBVlU7CjCxqnjVs8bBqSQEPu8ERFq9z2Y6EBeU6xxEHSqldhZyvyiqlDqyGNxPolP0DjzC8oyrPizMkM8mzUUFMvzXX5LTVPyV93OfgZEqEHG8OAMY509n8NXsZFeHYGUfj_-QHCZH81pn4zRxfnlp1xk5VA1iWcxBIoOvGr45GyCy6fJzMDXTccepmrwmK-PtEuy88pmkVaXr4cUnKa9_PYIWWG4bWJoquZXlE9X7LYhdRty2dhj35mt6DZY%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=62e1a908d0d84ef4a28d3c1fdd793e10&_e=AtqWBgx2YkA1MhpbO4vutsFHU2Z12oKf7omZhIB_c7ngQ2KUAIsGb07k-b3Sg1TmvmqWBAjZss83KAPTjO7pbkTKRvAK1UwG9a_zA2R_XK3xwHK0BFbWL8dM8z1tcVwx6BvbZWb1KcQ4jTh_JF6iNS66GN3lyXPqkHSw2XsS0PjYJ3EBVlU7CjCxqnjVs8bBqSQEPu8ERFq9z2Y6EBeU6xxEHSqldhZyvyiqlDqyGNxPolP0DjzC8oyrPizMkM8mXk9mCFjDWm5bZ9VLrM-tjG6wsc8vLZU79e4_OwaNnTiT2Nj6ZjHx2ml8cyGuqBag9UdHaPKOiy5dlPgQaP0DbTjURG8qd8FfNQq_2XZFwF_uRh-V7GlZHw4n0lAynf9_cgYXBs4xknN_JLhWUh9hTPLP8X3TkotRK0a0_EqQjEc%3D)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake

Kari Lake

Arrested Pro-Life protestors. **And sued me for defamation.** Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the **“First Amendment Fund”** that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. Thank you for your support during this difficult time.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=62e1a908d0d84ef4a28d3c1fdd793e10&_e=AtqWBgx2YkA1MhpbO4vutsFHU2Z12oKf7omZhIB_c7ngQ2KUAIsGb07k-b3Sg1TmvmqWBAjZss83KAPTjO7pbkTKRvAK1UwG9a_zA2R_XK3xwHK0BFbWL8dM8z1tcVwx6BvbZWb1KcQ4jTh_JF6iNS66GN3lyXPqkHSw2XsS0PjYJ3EBVlU7CjCxqnjVs8bBqSQEPu8ERFq9z2Y6EBeU6xxEHSqldhZyvyiqlDqyGNxPolP0DjzC8oyrPizMkM8m1ADZj5_RjH9hxgeRFl_6zXhRUHGVXMJZLzZ2BTOMEyeSxCIxa6St5HcWliQRPLGOVnKZ9K_bnYZD-dqDILPM9Ezu8YWRyZAiDB8xv6aYc6Dcd7Jsastaki2ff7OqG5jFfVdZHBQCTzGHJKe9N7p6J4aFy-wd4VaJlhBfNbuSzCE%3D)**

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Warning: The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner
body:
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. | |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0c2160ec1f7f4dea8ce98a7908a25fbc&_e=S3CEqoq6OHFu6STFOcaQnQ3Rb2kstEsL4PrvvpHK3bp0-U0mJRV06Dq3s7Q4ks9UhUJ5hXDUjxNL8Kk1AUImdZU1craigRhz4zcbGEhTnaF_8Qry0eNUvvDfLFwst65nK7U44priNIBVLSkN4FhPjXSRy11XJvBFzM8LLrefqd0DiiYiNNWl1Sr-xnHOZqo37VyPlfkgxO2e8LmTL0lq03izRtOW-4L2UZRxNFCn2SK_ml29_USb1nnYq_jGl6r_AdMkXt3AIEXePFCsDMLOIbrPo2A3bMFkhUtkSRwC-nfbDxm0hkpmOu3GSLZRUoDIbQTF-zm9-UDTJz7HNvbOqGFWkxdQETWBY7pM4oM4ZIYzqkdbEhcs7rtkTrCribwIkuBNxsUgkYPEZnN3u7kwuw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0c2160ec1f7f4dea8ce98a7908a25fbc&_e=S3CEqoq6OHFu6STFOcaQnQ3Rb2kstEsL4PrvvpHK3bp0-U0mJRV06Dq3s7Q4ks9UhUJ5hXDUjxNL8Kk1AUImdZU1craigRhz4zcbGEhTnaF_8Qry0eNUvvDfLFwst65nK7U44priNIBVLSkN4FhPjXSRy11XJvBFzM8LLrefqd0DiiYiNNWl1Sr-xnHOZqo37VyPlfkgxO2e8LmTL0lq03izRtOW-4L2UZRxNFCn2SK_ml29_USb1nnYq_jGl6r_0JSHYdgEm79H_wUu9h4QtA-OquyJrKV5f34T16ZVpl4VJ5ZLbzPmKFv4OPDPsgVH8fRcI7HK-RUzkZUk-vaNJFfeKMlXQetZeqP30ZZhD_Exr-JfyAvPhII_HblYogkOxdwFosYaqRGK6ruYtHxODg%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0c2160ec1f7f4dea8ce98a7908a25fbc&_e=S3CEqoq6OHFu6STFOcaQnQ3Rb2kstEsL4PrvvpHK3bp0-U0mJRV06Dq3s7Q4ks9UhUJ5hXDUjxNL8Kk1AUImdZU1craigRhz4zcbGEhTnaF_8Qry0eNUvvDfLFwst65nK7U44priNIBVLSkN4FhPjXSRy11XJvBFzM8LLrefqd0DiiYiNNWl1Sr-xnHOZqo37VyPlfkgxO2e8LmTL0lq03izRtOW-4L2UZRxNFCn2SK_ml29_USb1nnYq_jGl6r_pZGUt6G2JbK-Da02vBINbPALqteb2z8KBcqQBYIj0iiyQrRtH-u4MlfB2-SMze9rb_sjI1oMOsaJsaBzn-pIJLX3r2jvy4_NiJ98irpG3fzuJHswIgKT6jXYFhgYgiG528NVeBDOziWBv-mECB64Yg%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

name: Eric Burlison
subject: Mark my words... these people will destroy this country
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=5111f2216d2f44c48838d4a56a950b2d&_e=zwvMfTDGO2o0XF1dhT0vGQgcw1wY5hpgJiIltKg6wa9ROMhER4FyZldAIHTfUedWKu1OLy_aEK68cNos5i_gfYfMhAupmm6cxRw4ISDCjJMs9PnektiCDz_XnMFohhgoHqFvZxzwwwbDDzPRADxBfkrRvoouwNU2g7X6Th1GjvwvFsoHqc4iYa0cmRPlApJuu7e8Oy8IablUpcm7IOb__Dl3Ttrmz4X9jw5-kRGHpZB3Kx7VeiUdsWpZ8rwSVXoXRxPADKwuY_0gY2uKVMDUUfM7etFYUU2cs3TEiCQfzuRBVv8rvXhq7QbIumdd67pSL2r2nAXwbihDb-TOLCWB0hc_PZXZss8OoRSiIVLJK3gZ4Xx8glXi8N-20825VAM2mifBrgzTX_Pg-j4xyHLYskPNUm55RNMPS6QDLsDqezFknqeBWG1TMiUbjQ6FIm9qp_lYINOaL1dKYmoOUUvudg%3D%3D)

Peter,

When it's time to get reelected, politicians make all the promises in the world to fix everything they just haven't gotten around to...

But _follow through_ on those promises? Not so much.

Have you ever thought, "If these people won't represent my interest, then I'll just have to do it myself?" **... You're NOT alone.**

I often wondered why politicians were powerless to secure our borders, solve the national debt, or stop funding global wars while our country suffers. Then, I decided to take action.

Thankfully, Young Americans for Liberty Foundation was there to help. YAL Foundation is one of the few organizations that offers training that can take you from activist to representative and how to be a champion for liberty once elected to office.

**In fact, I consider myself one of their success stories.**

I'm Congressman Eric Burlison from Southwest Missouri. YAL Foundation's efforts have been essential to my career in public service.

[I told Jeff Frazee, the Founder of YAL Foundation, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to train the next generation of liberty leaders. Will you please chip in toward that goal with a donation of $10 or more?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=5111f2216d2f44c48838d4a56a950b2d&_e=zwvMfTDGO2o0XF1dhT0vGQgcw1wY5hpgJiIltKg6wa9ROMhER4FyZldAIHTfUedWKu1OLy_aEK68cNos5i_gfYfMhAupmm6cxRw4ISDCjJMs9PnektiCDz_XnMFohhgoHqFvZxzwwwbDDzPRADxBfkrRvoouwNU2g7X6Th1GjvwvFsoHqc4iYa0cmRPlApJuu7e8Oy8IablUpcm7IOb__Dl3Ttrmz4X9jw5-kRGHpZB3Kx7VeiUdsWpZ8rwSVXoXRxPADKwuY_0gY2uKVMDUUaekimsLnKNELAlwI_YbsV1gCOU_aInaMUGgFz8_K_uQa3KXJdl4Qg29kYYvfoWR5JGfdI3Iwh90KIeFhBXOSpDZrsB-TpAyfWj35LoxLDKqMj2jWC0Qcf8ORmN8QDnVO9pAILWw0f-lbF6hwF4JuYsrSt9mBGNj-7LvnHBNk37jwK_f88WEjsxUVnJn6JybAQ%3D%3D)

[Donate](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=5111f2216d2f44c48838d4a56a950b2d&_e=zwvMfTDGO2o0XF1dhT0vGQgcw1wY5hpgJiIltKg6wa9ROMhER4FyZldAIHTfUedWKu1OLy_aEK68cNos5i_gfYfMhAupmm6cxRw4ISDCjJMs9PnektiCDz_XnMFohhgoHqFvZxzwwwbDDzPRADxBfkrRvoouwNU2g7X6Th1GjvwvFsoHqc4iYa0cmRPlApJuu7e8Oy8IablUpcm7IOb__Dl3Ttrmz4X9jw5-kRGHpZB3Kx7VeiUdsWpZ8rwSVXoXRxPADKwuY_0gY2uKVMDUUf4nDf84CHZGVJktn6pqe13PO0e01vyAAVi1QWRf_S6or-4b7QIxI9KaXjxUXdRpx2LkOFYRB2Lu7Uwb_9JWQiiwfJ-ddQVNXg9l2o-6SI0humqknBAiujhfzAmxJCZYDRTSuNKxEY5c8yJcmfgHo9ryWbnjSPyVw1XXC6Jr_FOkiY-KsEBfo0-qcOkU6ZmBOw%3D%3D)

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=5111f2216d2f44c48838d4a56a950b2d&_e=zwvMfTDGO2o0XF1dhT0vGQgcw1wY5hpgJiIltKg6wa9ROMhER4FyZldAIHTfUedWKu1OLy_aEK68cNos5i_gfYfMhAupmm6cxRw4ISDCjJMs9PnektiCDz_XnMFohhgoHqFvZxzwwwbDDzPRADxBfkrRvoouwNU2g7X6Th1GjvwvFsoHqc4iYa0cmRPlApJuu7e8Oy8IablUpcm7IOb__Dl3Ttrmz4X9jw5-kRGHpZB3Kx7VeiUdsWpZ8rwSVXoXRxPADKwuY_0gY2uKVMDUUU8S2OK3XKWuSjvfMkV31xMPJCRe_nApww7KGxcKfpuMZ8ZnSScoVmHc7RTklto5NClHZZL-ToOitYKvQQZs3_rmy8f0eISjbtJtMKYhhlqHOcGlZfqV6OpLgC2cBOzI3DnPnrJ6UfFZ8Qg1mVyWAdcA7d5fNvPaAksiY5ZBlAOU9Wkxvp2nL1T4vzdBFKqbTA%3D%3D)
_YAL 's chief operating officer, Sean Themea, and I speaking at FreedomFest 2024 in Las Vegas._

My life would not have been the same without the support of Young Americans for Liberty Foundation. Their mission is to advance liberty across the country by-

1) **Identifying** Youth Leaders through a National Campus Program
2) **Educating** through On-Campus Activism Events
3) **Training** Students, Activists, and Legislators on How to Make Liberty Win!

This elite training gives both YAL students the advantage when fighting for liberty on campus and legislators the advantage when standing up to the Uniparty in office. Other organizations just can't match!

_YAL 's training took me from freedom activist to the Freedom Caucus_, and with your support, I want to help train even more students to fight for liberty.

[Young Americans for Liberty Foundation is one of the only organizations training future leaders in this country who can fight for our freedom. That's why I am personally committed to helping them raise $20,000 before the end of the month. Will you please donate $10 or more toward that goal?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=5111f2216d2f44c48838d4a56a950b2d&_e=zwvMfTDGO2o0XF1dhT0vGQgcw1wY5hpgJiIltKg6wa9ROMhER4FyZldAIHTfUedWKu1OLy_aEK68cNos5i_gfYfMhAupmm6cxRw4ISDCjJMs9PnektiCDz_XnMFohhgoHqFvZxzwwwbDDzPRADxBfkrRvoouwNU2g7X6Th1GjvwvFsoHqc4iYa0cmRPlApJuu7e8Oy8IablUpcm7IOb__Dl3Ttrmz4X9jw5-kRGHpZB3Kx7VeiUdsWpZ8rwSVXoXRxPADKwuY_0gY2uKVMDUUaekimsLnKNELAlwI_YbsV0gvha8hXt7m2ZK-DmGaWKEZ-50i92uA-0haMIrdSJifnxYrjqEphLzCY_kGcJ9zkJC-Zn1baaVq-DJX1rr7c2W9XrI9zhV7aBtsRHPtDnIBkz8nCHtGuZSIvSgQYWsGmBaUyTEV6q_t-ZdOqiYI-u1_WP5PW8rxF20S3RDFeFG3Q%3D%3D)

Long story short, I didn't play ball. Instead, I found a way to pass Constitutional Carry in Missouri. I'm also happy to say that the same guy is the guy that I beat in the congressional primary.

And it all started because YAL Foundation helped train me.

clean_body: Peter, When it's time to get reelected, politicians make all the promises in the world to fix everything they just haven't gotten around to... But follow through on those promises? Not so much. Have you ever thought, "If these people won't represent my interest, then I'll just have to do it myself?" ... You're NOT alone. I often wondered why politicians were powerless to secure our borders, solve the national debt, or stop funding global wars while our country suffers. Then, I decided to take action. Thankfully, Young Americans for Liberty Foundation was there to help. YAL Foundation is one of the few organizations that offers training that can take you from activist to representative and how to be a champion for liberty once elected to office. In fact, I consider myself one of their success stories. I'm Congressman Eric Burlison from Southwest Missouri. YAL Foundation's efforts have been essential to my career in public service. YAL 's chief operating officer, Sean Themea, and I speaking at FreedomFest 2024 in Las Vegas. My life would not have been the same without the support of Young Americans for Liberty Foundation. Their mission is to advance liberty across the country by- 1) Identifying Youth Leaders through a National Campus Program 2) Educating through On-Campus Activism Events 3) Training Students, Activists, and Legislators on How to Make Liberty Win! This elite training gives both YAL students the advantage when fighting for liberty on campus and legislators the advantage when standing up to the Uniparty in office. Other organizations just can't match! YAL 's training took me from freedom activist to the Freedom Caucus, and with your support, I want to help train even more students to fight for liberty. Throughout my career, I have worked to keep the government from infringing upon our rights. When I first got elected to the House in Missouri, there was a senior member who pulled me aside on a Committee hearing and said, " Son, let me tell you how things really work up here and what you're going to do." Long story short, I didn't play ball. Instead, I found a way to pass Constitutional Carry in Missouri. I'm also happy to say that the same guy is the guy that I beat in the congressional primary. And it all started because YAL Foundation helped train me. In liberty, Congressman Eric Burlison Young Americans for Liberty Foundation is a nonprofit organization formed under section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code.
